 474
 475## Phase 5 — Deployment & Launch
 476
 477**Goal:** Deploy WorkBridge PH to a production environment running PHP 8.2+, Laravel 11, and MySQL 8.0.
 478**Status:** 🔲 Not Started
 479
 480| Task | Status | Notes |
 481|------|--------|-------|
 482| Choose hosting — shared hosting (cPanel) or VPS | 🔲 Todo | cPanel hosts with PHP 8.2 + MySQL are affordable and globally available |
 483| Register domain (e.g., `workbridgeph.com`) | 🔲 Todo | |
 484| Upload Laravel project — point document root to `public/` | 🔲 Todo | |
 485| Create production MySQL database and user | 🔲 Todo | |
 486| Set production `.env` — `APP_ENV=production`, `APP_DEBUG=false` | 🔲 Todo | Never commit `.env` to version control |
 487| Run `php artisan migrate --force` on production | 🔲 Todo | |
 488| Run `php artisan db:seed` with demo/initial data | 🔲 Todo | |
 489| Run `php artisan storage:link` for file storage | 🔲 Todo | |
 490| Run `php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache` | 🔲 Todo | Performance optimization |
 491| Set up SSL/HTTPS | 🔲 Todo | Let's Encrypt via hosting panel or Certbot |
 492| Configure daily MySQL backups | 🔲 Todo | Automated via cPanel or cron |
 493| Set up error logging | 🔲 Todo | Laravel Log channel; optionally Sentry |
 494| Soft launch — test all flows with real accounts | 🔲 Todo | |
 495| Public launch | 🔲 Todo | |
 496
 497---
 498
 499## Known Gaps vs. Proposal
 500
 501The following items from the project proposal are not yet fully implemented:
 502
 503| Proposal Item | Current State | Plan |
 504|--------------|---------------|------|
 505| Dedicated public Job Categories page (white/blue-collar, household/service) | Homepage has category section only | Add standalone `/categories.html` in Phase 2 |
 506| Employment and livelihood guidance materials | Covered partially in `help.html` | Expand in Phase 2 |
 507| Real location-based job opportunities | UI filter exists, no real geolocation | Implement in Phase 3 |
 508| Actual file storage (resumes, company docs) | Simulated only | Phase 2 file upload with server storage |
 509| Real email notifications | Not implemented | Phase 3 |
 510| Real-time messaging | Simulated in localStorage | Phase 3 WebSocket or polling |
 511
 512---
 513
 514## Progress Log
 515
 516| Date | Milestone | Notes |
 517|------|-----------|-------|
 518| 2026-04-04 | Phase 1 Complete | All UI pages built and functional with localStorage mock backend |
 519| 2026-04-16 | Phase 1.5 QA Round 1 | Fixed: employer profile edit, apply confirmation + skill/resume check, navigation context for logged-in users, dark mode readability |
 520| 2026-04-16 | Phase 1.5 QA Round 2 | Fixed: resume toast error, verification suspend status, saved-jobs re-render, settings validation, dark mode toggle lag, seeded demo resumes, upgraded messages to functional chat UI |
 521| 2026-04-16 | Phase 1.5 XSS Hardening | Applied `esc()` utility across all 13+ files with dynamic innerHTML |
 522| 2026-04-17 | Phase 2 Start | Backend integration — Laravel 11 + MySQL 8.0 |
 523
 524---
 525
 526## How to Update This Document
 527
 528When a task is completed:
 5291. Change `🔲 Todo` → `✅ Done`
 5302. Add an entry to the **Progress Log** with the date and milestone
 5313. Update the **Phase Summary** table at the top if a full phase is complete
 532
 533Status key:
 534- ✅ Done — Completed and verified
 535- ⚠️ Partial — Started but not complete or has known gaps
 536- 🔲 Todo — Not yet started
 537- 🚧 In Progress — Currently being worked on
 538- ❌ Blocked — Cannot proceed; waiting on dependency
 539
SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE.md · 890 lines
   1# WorkBridge PH — System Architecture & Design
   2
   3**Web-Based Unified Employment Platform for Decent Work Access**
   4*IT305 — Web Systems and Technologies | Major Course Output*
   5*Group 4 — Northwest Samar State University*
   6
   7---
   8
   9## Table of Contents
  10
  111. [System Overview](#system-overview)
  122. [Architecture Pattern](#architecture-pattern)
  133. [Technology Stack (Final)](#technology-stack-final)
  144. [System Design](#system-design)
  155. [Database Schema](#database-schema)
  166. [Feature Matrix (Final)](#feature-matrix-final)
  177. [User Roles & Permissions](#user-roles--permissions)
  188. [Page Map](#page-map)
  199. [Data Flow](#data-flow)
  2010. [Security Design](#security-design)
  2111. [UI/UX Design System](#uiux-design-system)
  2212. [Phased Roadmap (Deadline-Aligned)](#phased-roadmap-deadline-aligned)
  2313. [Deployment Architecture](#deployment-architecture)
  24
  25---
  26
  27## 1. System Overview
  28
  29WorkBridge PH is a globally accessible employment platform that connects job seekers with employers across all sectors — white-collar, blue-collar, and household/service workers. It addresses SDG 8 (Decent Work), SDG 1 (No Poverty), and SDG 10 (Reduced Inequalities).
  30
  31### Core Value Proposition
  32
  33| For | Value |
  34|-----|-------|
  35| **Job Seekers** | One unified platform to find verified, safe employment across all job sectors |
  36| **Employers** | Efficient recruitment with applicant tracking, verification, and quality candidates |
  37| **Administrators** | Complete oversight — employer verification, job moderation, abuse reporting, audit trails |
  38
  39### Scope Boundaries
  40
  41| In Scope | Out of Scope |
  42|----------|-------------|
  43| Job posting, search, filtering | Payment processing / payroll |
  44| Application tracking with status timeline | Video interviews |
  45| Employer verification workflow | AI resume scoring |
  46| Admin moderation & audit logs | Third-party job board integration |
  47| Scam awareness & safety guidelines | Mobile native app (web-responsive only) |
  48| Resume upload & management | Real-time chat (polling-based messaging only) |
  49| Role-based dashboards (3 roles) | Multi-language support |
  50
  51---
  52
  53## 2. Architecture Pattern
  54
  55```
  56┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  57│                      CLIENT (Browser)                       │
  58│                                                             │
  59│  ┌──────────┐  ┌──────────┐  ┌──────────┐  ┌───────────┐  │
  60│  │  Public   │  │  Seeker  │  │ Employer │  │   Admin   │  │
  61│  │  Pages    │  │Dashboard │  │Dashboard │  │  Panel    │  │
  62│  └────┬─────┘  └────┬─────┘  └────┬─────┘  └─────┬─────┘  │
  63│       │              │              │               │        │
  64│  ┌────┴──────────────┴──────────────┴───────────────┴────┐  │
  65│  │              Bootstrap 5.3.2 + tokens.css             │  │
  66│  │              (Responsive UI Framework)                 │  │
  67│  └────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │
  68│       │                                                      │
  69│  ┌────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
  70│  │  Phase 1: store.js (localStorage)                     │  │
  71│  │  Phase 2: api.js (fetch → Laravel REST API)           │  │
  72│  └───────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────┘  │
  73└──────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────┘
  74                               │ HTTP/HTTPS
  75                               ▼
  76┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  77│                    SERVER (Phase 2)                           │
  78│                                                              │
  79│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐│
  80│  │  Laravel 11.x  (PHP 8.2+)                              ││
  81│  │                                                         ││
  82│  │  ┌──────────┐  ┌──────────┐  ┌──────────────────────┐  ││
  83│  │  │ Sanctum  │  │Middleware│  │     Controllers       │  ││
  84│  │  │  Auth    │──│(Role,    │──│ Auth, Job, Company,   │  ││
  85│  │  │  Tokens  │  │ CORS)    │  │ Application, Admin    │  ││
  86│  │  └──────────┘  └──────────┘  └──────────┬───────────┘  ││
  87│  │                                          │              ││
  88│  │  ┌──────────┐  ┌──────────┐  ┌──────────┴───────────┐  ││
  89│  │  │  Form    │  │ Policies │  │   Eloquent Models     │  ││
  90│  │  │ Requests │  │ (RBAC)   │  │ (ORM + Relationships) │  ││
  91│  │  └──────────┘  └──────────┘  └──────────┬───────────┘  ││
  92│  └─────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────┘│
  93│                                            │                 │
  94│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────┴──────────────┐ │
  95│  │              MySQL 8.0+                                │ │
  96│  │  users, seekers, companies, jobs, applications,        │ │
  97│  │  categories, reports, audit_logs, notifications        │ │
  98│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
  99└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
 100```
 101
 102### Pattern Summary
 103
 104| Pattern | Description |
 105|---------|-------------|
 106| **MPA (Multi-Page Application)** | Each page is a standalone `.html` file. No SPA framework (React, Vue). Simple, fast, easy to maintain. |
 107| **REST API** | Laravel serves JSON responses. Frontend calls via `fetch()`. Clean separation of frontend and backend. |
 108| **MVC** | Laravel enforces Model-View-Controller. Models = Eloquent, Controllers = API logic, Views = HTML pages. |
 109| **RBAC** | Three roles — `seeker`, `employer`, `admin`. Enforced at route, middleware, and policy levels. |
 110| **Token Auth** | Laravel Sanctum issues API tokens. Stored in `localStorage`. Sent as `Authorization: Bearer` header. |
 111| **Token Design System** | All UI styling via CSS custom properties (`tokens.css`). Consistent look, easy theming. |
 112
 113### Why MPA (Not SPA)?
 114
 115| Reason | Detail |
 116|--------|--------|
 117| **Simplicity** | No build tools (Webpack, Vite). Just HTML + JS files served directly. |
 118| **Course-appropriate** | IT305 focuses on web fundamentals — HTML, CSS, JS, PHP, MySQL. No framework overhead. |
 119| **Fast to develop** | No component tree, no state management library, no routing library. Direct DOM manipulation. |
 120| **Easy to present** | Each page is independently viewable. Instructor can open any `.html` file. |
 121| **Bootstrap native** | Bootstrap 5 is designed for MPA — its grid, utilities, and components work without JS bundling. |
 122
 123---
 124
 125## 3. Technology Stack (Final)
 126
 127### Phase 1 — Frontend Prototype (Current Build)
 128
 129| Layer | Technology | Version | Purpose |
 130|-------|-----------|---------|---------|
 131| Markup | HTML5 | — | Semantic page structure |
 132| Styling | CSS3 Custom Properties | — | Design tokens, dark mode, theming |
 133| UI Framework | **Bootstrap 5** | **5.3.2** | Responsive grid, components, utilities |
 134| Icons | Bootstrap Icons | 1.11.1 | Consistent iconography |
 135| Scripting | Vanilla JavaScript | ES2020+ (ES Modules) | Application logic, DOM manipulation |
 136| Data Layer | `localStorage` | — | Mock backend (simulates database) |
 137| Routing | Custom router (`router.js`) | — | Role-based guards, query params |
 138| Testing | Playwright | ^1.58.2 | E2E browser tests |
 139
 140### Phase 2 — Full-Stack (Backend Integration)
 141
 142| Layer | Technology | Version | Purpose |
 143|-------|-----------|---------|---------|
 144| Language | **PHP** | **8.2+** | Server-side scripting |
 145| Framework | **Laravel** | **11.x** | MVC framework, routing, middleware |
 146| Auth | **Laravel Sanctum** | bundled | API token authentication |
 147| ORM | **Eloquent** | bundled | Database models, relationships, queries |
 148| Validation | **Form Requests** | bundled | Server-side input validation |
 149| Authorization | **Gates & Policies** | bundled | Per-resource ownership checks |
 150| File Storage | **Laravel Storage** | bundled | Resume/document uploads |
 151| Mail | **Laravel Mail** | bundled | Email verification, password reset |
 152| Queue | **Laravel Queue** | bundled | Background jobs |
 153| Database | **MySQL** | **8.0+** | Primary relational data store |
 154| Migrations | **Laravel Migrations** | bundled | Version-controlled schema |
 155| Dev Server | **XAMPP** | latest | Apache + MySQL + PHP (Windows) |
 156| PHP Packages | **Composer** | 2.x | Dependency management |
 157| Testing | **PHPUnit** | bundled | Backend unit + feature tests |
 158
 159### Tools Summary (For Tarpaulin / Lobby Posting)
 160
 161```
 162Frontend:   HTML5 · CSS3 · JavaScript (ES Modules) · Bootstrap 5.3.2
 163Backend:    PHP 8.2 · Laravel 11 · Laravel Sanctum
 164Database:   MySQL 8.0
 165Testing:    Playwright (E2E) · PHPUnit (Backend)
 166Dev Tools:  XAMPP · Composer · Git · VS Code
 167```
 168
 169---
 170
 171## 4. System Design
 172
 173### 4.1 Module Architecture
 174
 175The system is organized into 4 distinct modules, each with its own pages, logic, and permissions:
 176
 177```
 178WorkBridge PH
 179├── PUBLIC MODULE (No auth required)
 180│   ├── Homepage — hero search, categories, featured jobs
 181│   ├── Job Search — filter, sort, paginate
 182│   ├── Job Detail — overview, apply, save
 183│   ├── Company Directory — search, verified filter
 184│   ├── Company Detail — info, open positions
 185│   ├── Safety & Awareness — scam prevention
 186│   ├── About — platform purpose
 187│   └── Help / FAQ — guidance
 188│
 189├── AUTH MODULE (No auth required)
 190│   ├── Login — email/password, role-based redirect
 191│   ├── Register — role selection (seeker/employer)
 192│   ├── Forgot Password — email reset link
 193│   └── Reset Password — set new password
 194│
 195├── SEEKER MODULE (Auth: role=seeker)
 196│   ├── Dashboard — stats, recommended jobs
 197│   ├── Job Browse — save, apply from dashboard
 198│   ├── Saved Jobs — manage bookmarks
 199│   ├── Applications — filter by status, view timeline
 200│   ├── Application Detail — status timeline, notes
 201│   ├── Profile — edit name, location, skills
 202│   ├── Resume — upload/manage documents
 203│   ├── Notifications — activity alerts
 204│   ├── Messages — employer communication
 205│   └── Settings — account preferences
 206│
 207├── EMPLOYER MODULE (Auth: role=employer)
 208│   ├── Dashboard — KPIs, applicant charts
 209│   ├── Post Job — form with preview
 210│   ├── Manage Jobs — table, edit, delete
 211│   ├── Edit Job — update existing listing
 212│   ├── Applicants — per-job list, status actions
 213│   ├── Applicant Detail — resume, notes, shortlist/reject
 214│   ├── Company Profile — brand management
 215│   ├── Verification — submit documents for review
 216│   ├── Messages — seeker communication
 217│   └── Settings — account preferences
 218│
 219└── ADMIN MODULE (Auth: role=admin)
 220    ├── Dashboard — pending queues overview
 221    ├── Employer Verification — verify/reject employers
 222    ├── Verification Detail — review documents
 223    ├── Job Moderation — approve/reject postings
 224    ├── Job Review — split-view detailed review
 225    ├── Reports — scam/abuse management
 226    ├── Report Detail — resolution workflow
 227    ├── Users — search, view, edit, delete, suspend
 228    ├── User Detail — full user profile view
 229    ├── Analytics — platform-wide statistics
 230    ├── Categories — CRUD management
 231    ├── Audit Logs — action history
 232    └── Settings — system configuration
 233```
 234
 235### 4.2 Data Layer Design
 236
 237**Phase 1 (localStorage):**
 238```
 239Browser localStorage
 240├── workbridge_jobs         → Array of job objects
 241├── workbridge_companies    → Array of company objects
 242├── workbridge_seekers      → Array of seeker profiles
 243├── workbridge_applications → Array of application objects
 244├── workbridge_reports      → Array of report objects
 245├── workbridge_audit_logs   → Array of audit log entries
 246├── workbridge_categories   → Array of categories
 247├── workbridge_saved_jobs   → { userId: [jobId, ...] }
 248├── workbridge_notifications→ { userId: [notif, ...] }
 249├── workbridge_messages     → { userId: { threadId: [...] } }
 250├── workbridge_notes        → { key: "note text" }
 251├── workbridge_resumes      → { userId: [resume, ...] }
 252├── workbridge_user         → Current logged-in user object
 253├── workbridge_theme        → "light" or "dark"
 254└── workbridge_seeded       → boolean (seed data loaded?)
 255```
 256
 257**Phase 2 (MySQL):** See Database Schema section below.
 258
 259**Transition Strategy:**
 2601. Create `assets/js/api.js` with identical function signatures as `store.js`
 2612. Each function calls `fetch()` to Laravel API instead of `localStorage`
 2623. Replace imports page-by-page: `import { getJobs } from './store.js'` → `import { getJobs } from './api.js'`
 2634. No HTML changes needed — only JS import paths change
 264
 265---
 266
 267## 5. Database Schema
 268
 269### Entity Relationship Diagram (Text)
 270
 271```
 272users ──────────┬──── seekers (1:1) ──── seeker_skills (1:N)
 273                │
 274                ├──── companies (1:1) ──── verification_documents (1:N)
 275                │                    └──── jobs (1:N) ──── job_tags (1:N)
 276                │                                    └──── applications (1:N)
 277                │                                              └──── application_timeline (1:N)
 278                │
 279                ├──── saved_jobs (N:M between seekers and jobs)
 280                ├──── notifications (1:N)
 281                ├──── messages (sender/recipient)
 282                ├──── reports (reporter)
 283                └──── audit_logs (actor)
 284
 285categories (standalone)
 286```
 287
 288### Table Definitions
 289
 290#### `users`
 291| Column | Type | Constraints |
 292|--------|------|-------------|
 293| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK, AUTO_INCREMENT |
 294| name | VARCHAR(255) | NOT NULL |
 295| email | VARCHAR(255) | UNIQUE, NOT NULL |
 296| password | VARCHAR(255) | NOT NULL (bcrypt) |
 297| role | ENUM('seeker','employer','admin') | NOT NULL |
 298| email_verified_at | TIMESTAMP | NULLABLE |
 299| status | ENUM('active','suspended') | DEFAULT 'active' |
 300| created_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 301| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 302
 303#### `seekers`
 304| Column | Type | Constraints |
 305|--------|------|-------------|
 306| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK, AUTO_INCREMENT |
 307| user_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → users.id, UNIQUE |
 308| location | VARCHAR(255) | NULLABLE |
 309| country | VARCHAR(100) | NULLABLE |
 310| phone | VARCHAR(50) | NULLABLE |
 311| profile_strength | TINYINT | DEFAULT 0 |
 312| created_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 313| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 314
 315#### `seeker_skills`
 316| Column | Type | Constraints |
 317|--------|------|-------------|
 318| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK |
 319| seeker_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → seekers.id |
 320| skill | VARCHAR(100) | NOT NULL |
 321
 322#### `companies`
 323| Column | Type | Constraints |
 324|--------|------|-------------|
 325| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK, AUTO_INCREMENT |
 326| user_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → users.id, UNIQUE |
 327| name | VARCHAR(255) | NOT NULL |
 328| industry | VARCHAR(100) | NULLABLE |
 329| size | VARCHAR(50) | NULLABLE |
 330| location | VARCHAR(255) | NULLABLE |
 331| country | VARCHAR(100) | NULLABLE |
 332| verified_status | ENUM('Pending','Verified','Rejected') | DEFAULT 'Pending' |
 333| website | VARCHAR(255) | NULLABLE |
 334| about | TEXT | NULLABLE |
 335| logo_path | VARCHAR(255) | NULLABLE |
 336| contact_email | VARCHAR(255) | NULLABLE |
 337| contact_phone | VARCHAR(50) | NULLABLE |
 338| created_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 339| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 340
 341#### `jobs`
 342| Column | Type | Constraints |
 343|--------|------|-------------|
 344| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK, AUTO_INCREMENT |
 345| company_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → companies.id |
 346| title | VARCHAR(255) | NOT NULL |
 347| location | VARCHAR(255) | NOT NULL |
 348| country | VARCHAR(100) | NULLABLE |
 349| job_type | ENUM('Full-time','Part-time','Contract','Freelance','Internship') | NOT NULL |
 350| setup | ENUM('Remote','Hybrid','On-site') | NOT NULL |
 351| salary_min | INT UNSIGNED | NULLABLE |
 352| salary_max | INT UNSIGNED | NULLABLE |
 353| salary_currency | VARCHAR(10) | DEFAULT 'PHP' |
 354| experience_level | VARCHAR(50) | NULLABLE |
 355| description | TEXT | NOT NULL |
 356| requirements | TEXT | NULLABLE |
 357| benefits | TEXT | NULLABLE |
 358| status | ENUM('Pending','Active','Rejected','Closed') | DEFAULT 'Pending' |
 359| posted_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 360| closed_at | TIMESTAMP | NULLABLE |
 361
 362**Indexes:** `company_id`, `status`, `location`, `job_type`, `posted_at`
 363
 364#### `job_tags`
 365| Column | Type | Constraints |
 366|--------|------|-------------|
 367| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK |
 368| job_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → jobs.id |
 369| tag | VARCHAR(100) | NOT NULL |
 370
 371#### `applications`
 372| Column | Type | Constraints |
 373|--------|------|-------------|
 374| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK, AUTO_INCREMENT |
 375| job_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → jobs.id |
 376| seeker_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → seekers.id |
 377| status | ENUM('Submitted','Reviewed','Interview','Hired','Rejected') | DEFAULT 'Submitted' |
 378| notes | TEXT | NULLABLE |
 379| applied_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 380
 381**Unique:** (`job_id`, `seeker_id`) — one application per job per seeker
 382
 383#### `application_timeline`
 384| Column | Type | Constraints |
 385|--------|------|-------------|
 386| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK |
 387| application_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → applications.id |
 388| event | VARCHAR(100) | NOT NULL |
 389| note | TEXT | NULLABLE |
 390| created_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 391
 392#### `saved_jobs`
 393| Column | Type | Constraints |
 394|--------|------|-------------|
 395| seeker_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → seekers.id |
 396| job_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → jobs.id |
 397| saved_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 398
 399**Primary Key:** (`seeker_id`, `job_id`)
 400
 401#### `categories`
 402| Column | Type | Constraints |
 403|--------|------|-------------|
 404| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK |
 405| name | VARCHAR(100) | NOT NULL, UNIQUE |
 406| slug | VARCHAR(100) | NOT NULL, UNIQUE |
 407| created_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 408| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 409
 410#### `reports`
 411| Column | Type | Constraints |
 412|--------|------|-------------|
 413| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK |
 414| type | ENUM('Job','User','Company') | NOT NULL |
 415| target_id | VARCHAR(50) | NOT NULL |
 416| reason | VARCHAR(255) | NOT NULL |
 417| severity | ENUM('Low','Medium','High') | NOT NULL |
 418| status | ENUM('Open','Under Review','Resolved') | DEFAULT 'Open' |
 419| reporter_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → users.id |
 420| resolution_note | TEXT | NULLABLE |
 421| created_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 422| resolved_at | TIMESTAMP | NULLABLE |
 423
 424#### `audit_logs`
 425| Column | Type | Constraints |
 426|--------|------|-------------|
 427| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK |
 428| actor_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → users.id |
 429| action | VARCHAR(255) | NOT NULL |
 430| target | VARCHAR(255) | NULLABLE |
 431| created_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 432
 433#### `notifications`
 434| Column | Type | Constraints |
 435|--------|------|-------------|
 436| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK |
 437| user_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → users.id |
 438| title | VARCHAR(255) | NOT NULL |
 439| message | TEXT | NULLABLE |
 440| read_at | TIMESTAMP | NULLABLE |
 441| created_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 442
 443#### `messages`
 444| Column | Type | Constraints |
 445|--------|------|-------------|
 446| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK |
 447| sender_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → users.id |
 448| recipient_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → users.id |
 449| content | TEXT | NOT NULL |
 450| read_at | TIMESTAMP | NULLABLE |
 451| created_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 452
 453#### `resumes`
 454| Column | Type | Constraints |
 455|--------|------|-------------|
 456| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK |
 457| seeker_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → seekers.id |
 458| file_path | VARCHAR(255) | NOT NULL |
 459| original_name | VARCHAR(255) | NOT NULL |
 460| uploaded_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 461
 462#### `verification_documents`
 463| Column | Type | Constraints |
 464|--------|------|-------------|
 465| id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | PK |
 466| company_id | BIGINT UNSIGNED | FK → companies.id |
 467| file_path | VARCHAR(255) | NOT NULL |
 468| uploaded_at | TIMESTAMP | |
 469
 470---
 471
 472## 6. Feature Matrix (Final)
 473
 474These are the **final confirmed features** for WorkBridge PH. Nothing else will be added.
 475
 476### Core Features (Must Have — All Phases)
 477
 478| # | Feature | Module | Phase 1 (localStorage) | Phase 2 (Laravel + MySQL) |
 479|---|---------|--------|----------------------|--------------------------|
 480| 1 | User registration (seeker/employer) | Auth | Mock — sets current user + adds to store | Real — bcrypt password, creates DB records |
 481| 2 | User login/logout | Auth | Mock — checks hardcoded + registered accounts | Real — Sanctum token |
 482| 3 | Role-based access control | All | Client-side route guards | Server middleware + policies |
 483| 4 | Job posting with preview | Employer | Saves to localStorage | POST /api/jobs |
 484| 5 | Job editing | Employer | Updates localStorage | PATCH /api/jobs/{id} |
 485| 6 | Job deletion | Employer | Removes from localStorage | DELETE /api/jobs/{id} |
 486| 7 | Job search & filter | Public | Client-side filtering | Server-side Eloquent queries |
 487| 8 | Job detail (tabs: overview, requirements, benefits) | Public | Reads from localStorage | GET /api/jobs/{id} |
 488| 9 | Apply to job | Seeker | Adds application to localStorage | POST /api/jobs/{id}/apply |
 489| 10 | Save/unsave jobs | Seeker | localStorage saved_jobs | saved_jobs pivot table |
 490| 11 | Application tracking with timeline | Seeker | localStorage | application_timeline table |
 491| 12 | Applicant review (shortlist/interview/reject) | Employer | Updates localStorage | PATCH /api/applications/{id}/status |
 492| 13 | Seeker profile (name, location, skills) | Seeker | localStorage with persistence | PATCH /api/seeker/profile |
 493| 14 | Resume upload | Seeker | Simulated (file name only) | Real file upload via Laravel Storage |
 494| 15 | Company profile management | Employer | localStorage | PATCH /api/companies/{id} |
 495| 16 | Employer verification submission | Employer | Status display | Document upload + admin review |
 496| 17 | Admin: employer verification (verify/reject) | Admin | Updates company status | PATCH /api/admin/verifications/{id} |
 497| 18 | Admin: job moderation (approve/reject) | Admin | Updates job status | PATCH /api/admin/jobs/{id}/status |
 498| 19 | Admin: user management (view/edit/delete/suspend) | Admin | Updates localStorage | PATCH /api/admin/users/{id} |
 499| 20 | Admin: reports & resolution | Admin | localStorage | reports table workflow |
 500| 21 | Admin: analytics dashboard | Admin | Counts from localStorage | Aggregate queries |
 501| 22 | Admin: category CRUD | Admin | localStorage | categories table |
 502| 23 | Admin: audit logs | Admin | localStorage | audit_logs table |
 503| 24 | Notifications | All | localStorage per-user | notifications table |
 504| 25 | Messages (basic) | Seeker/Employer | localStorage | messages table |
 505| 26 | Dark mode toggle | All | CSS data-theme attribute | Same (frontend only) |
 506| 27 | Scam awareness / safety page | Public | Static HTML | Same |
 507| 28 | Password reset flow | Auth | Simulated | Real email link |
 508| 29 | Employer applicant notes | Employer | localStorage (notes) | notes column on applications |
 509| 30 | Seeker application notes | Seeker | localStorage (notes) | notes column on applications |
 510
 511### Not In Scope
 512
 513| Feature | Reason |
 514|---------|--------|
 515| Payment / payroll integration | Not relevant to job matching platform |
 516| Video interviews | Complexity beyond course scope |
 517| AI-powered job matching | Out of scope |
 518| Native mobile apps | Responsive web is sufficient |
 519| Multi-language (i18n) | English only |
 520| Social login (Google, Facebook) | Sanctum email/password is sufficient |
 521| Real-time WebSocket chat | Polling/refresh messaging is sufficient |
 522
 523---
 524
 525## 7. User Roles & Permissions
 526
 527### Role Matrix
 528
 529| Action | Guest | Seeker | Employer | Admin |
 530|--------|-------|--------|----------|-------|
 531| View jobs / companies | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
 532| Register / Login | Yes | — | — | — |
 533| Apply to job | — | Yes | — | — |
 534| Save / unsave jobs | — | Yes | — | — |
 535| View own applications | — | Yes | — | — |
 536| Edit own profile | — | Yes | Yes | — |
 537| Upload resume | — | Yes | — | — |
 538| Post job | — | — | Yes | — |
 539| Edit / delete own jobs | — | — | Yes | — |
 540| View applicants for own jobs | — | — | Yes | — |
 541| Update application status | — | — | Yes | — |
 542| Submit verification documents | — | — | Yes | — |
 543| Verify / reject employers | — | — | — | Yes |
 544| Approve / reject jobs | — | — | — | Yes |
 545| View / suspend users | — | — | — | Yes |
 546| Manage categories | — | — | — | Yes |
 547| Resolve reports | — | — | — | Yes |
 548| View audit logs | — | — | — | Yes |
 549| View analytics | — | — | — | Yes |
 550
 551### Authentication Flow
 552
 553```
 554Guest visits login.html
 555  ├── Enters email + password
 556  ├── Phase 1: mockLogin() checks DEMO_ACCOUNTS + registered users
 557  │   Phase 2: POST /api/auth/login → Sanctum token
 558  ├── On success: store user/token → redirect by role
 559  │   ├── seeker  → /seeker/dashboard.html
 560  │   ├── employer → /employer/dashboard.html
 561  │   └── admin   → /admin/dashboard.html
 562  └── On failure: show error toast
 563```
 564
 565### Route Guard Flow
 566
 567```
 568User navigates to /seeker/profile.html
 569  ├── app.js loads → runs checkRouteGuard()
 570  ├── Path contains "/seeker/" → requires role = "seeker"
 571  ├── Check: is user logged in?
 572  │   ├── No → redirect to /auth/login.html?redirect=...
 573  │   └── Yes → check user.role === "seeker"
 574  │       ├── No → redirect to /auth/login.html (wrong role)
 575  │       └── Yes → allow page to load
 576  └── Page renders layout + content
 577```
 578
 579---
 580
 581## 8. Page Map
 582
 583### Total Pages: 40
 584
 585| Module | Count | Pages |
 586|--------|-------|-------|
 587| **Public** | 10 | index, jobs, job-detail, companies, company-detail, safety, about, help, terms, privacy |
 588| **Auth** | 4 | login, register, forgot, reset |
 589| **Seeker** | 10 | dashboard, jobs, saved-jobs, applications, application-detail, profile, resume, notifications, messages, settings |
 590| **Employer** | 10 | dashboard, post-job, manage-jobs, job-edit, applicants, applicant-detail, company-profile, verification, messages, settings |
 591| **Admin** | 13 | dashboard, employer-verification, verification-detail, job-moderation, job-review, reports, report-detail, users, user-detail, analytics, categories, audit-logs, settings |
 592
 593---
 594
 595## 9. Data Flow
 596
 597### Job Posting Flow (Employer → Admin → Public)
 598
 599```
 600Employer fills Post Job form
 601  → Saves job with status = "Pending"
 602  → Job appears in Admin Job Moderation queue
 603  → Admin reviews job
 604    ├── Approve → status = "Active" → appears in public job search
 605    └── Reject → status = "Rejected" → employer sees rejection
 606  → Audit log entry created
 607```
 608
 609### Application Flow (Seeker → Employer)
 610
 611```
 612Seeker views Job Detail
 613  → Clicks "Apply Now"
 614  → Application created (status = "Submitted")
 615  → Timeline entry: "Applied"
 616  → Employer sees applicant in Applicants list
 617  → Employer actions:
 618    ├── Shortlist → status = "Reviewed", timeline: "Shortlisted"
 619    ├── Interview → status = "Interview", timeline: "Interview Scheduled"
 620    ├── Reject → status = "Rejected", timeline: "Rejected"
 621    └── Hire → status = "Hired", timeline: "Offer Accepted"
 622  → Seeker sees status changes in Applications page
 623```
 624
 625### Employer Verification Flow
 626
 627```
 628Employer registers
 629  → Company record created (verified_status = "Pending")
 630  → Employer uploads verification documents
 631  → Admin sees in Employer Verification queue
 632  → Admin reviews:
 633    ├── Verify → verified_status = "Verified" → badge shown on company
 634    ├── Reject → verified_status = "Rejected" → reason shown to employer
 635    └── Suspend → user status = "suspended" → cannot login
 636  → Audit log entry created
 637```
 638
 639---
 640
 641## 10. Security Design
 642
 643### Phase 1 (Frontend Only — Demo)
 644
 645| Concern | Approach |
 646|---------|----------|
 647| Auth | Mock login — no real security; demo-grade only |
 648| Route protection | Client-side guards (can be bypassed — acceptable for demo) |
 649| Data integrity | localStorage — no multi-user sharing |
 650| XSS | Must sanitize all `innerHTML` with text escaping utility |
 651| CSRF | Not applicable (no server) |
 652
 653### Phase 2 (Laravel Backend — Production)
 654
 655| Concern | Approach |
 656|---------|----------|
 657| Auth | Laravel Sanctum API tokens, bcrypt password hashing |
 658| Route protection | `auth:sanctum` middleware + custom `EnsureRole` middleware |
 659| Authorization | Laravel Policies — ownership checks (employer can only edit own jobs) |
 660| Input validation | Laravel Form Requests — server-side, per-endpoint |
 661| XSS | Laravel `{{ }}` auto-escaping in Blade; frontend uses `textContent` |
 662| SQL injection | Eloquent ORM parameterized queries |
 663| CSRF | Not needed for API token auth (Sanctum handles this) |
 664| File upload | Validate type + size in Form Request; store outside web root |
 665| Rate limiting | Laravel `throttle` middleware on auth endpoints |
 666| CORS | Configured in `config/cors.php` for frontend origin only |
 667| HTTPS | Required in production |
 668| Password reset | Laravel signed URL with expiry |
 669
 670---
 671
 672## 11. UI/UX Design System
 673
 674### Framework: Bootstrap 5.3.2 Only
 675
 676All UI components use Bootstrap 5 classes and utilities. No additional CSS frameworks.
 677
 678| Component | Implementation |
 679|-----------|---------------|
 680| Grid system | Bootstrap `.row`, `.col-*` responsive grid |
 681| Cards | Bootstrap `.card`, `.card-body`, `.card-header` |
 682| Forms | Bootstrap `.form-control`, `.form-select`, `.form-label` + custom `.form-input` |
 683| Buttons | Bootstrap `.btn`, `.btn-primary`, `.btn-secondary`, `.btn-sm` + custom `.btn-ghost` |
 684| Tables | Bootstrap `.table` with custom dark mode overrides |
 685| Badges | Custom `.badge-*` classes mapped to status colors |
 686| Navigation | Custom sidebar + topbar for dashboards; Bootstrap nav for public pages |
 687| Modals | Custom modal component (`ui.modal.js`) using Bootstrap patterns |
 688| Toasts | Custom toast component (`ui.toast.js`) |
 689| Dropdowns | Custom dropdown component (`ui.dropdown.js`) |
 690| Icons | Bootstrap Icons (`bi-*` classes) |
 691
 692### Design Tokens (tokens.css)
 693
 694| Token Category | Examples |
 695|---------------|----------|
 696| **Colors** | `--color-accent: #4F46E5` (Indigo), `--color-accent-teal: #0D9488`, `--color-accent-violet: #7C3AED` |
 697| **Status** | `--color-success: #059669`, `--color-warning: #D97706`, `--color-error: #DC2626` |
 698| **Spacing** | `--space-xs: 4px` through `--space-2xl: 48px` |
 699| **Radius** | `--radius-sm: 8px` through `--radius-xl: 16px` |
 700| **Shadows** | `--shadow-sm`, `--shadow-md`, `--shadow-lg`, `--shadow-card` |
 701| **Typography** | `--font-sans: system-ui, ...`, sizes from `--text-xs` to `--text-2xl` |
 702| **Layout** | `--sidebar-width: 260px`, `--topbar-height: 64px` |
 703
 704### Dark Mode
 705
 706- Toggled via `data-theme="dark"` attribute on `<html>`
 707- All tokens override in `[data-theme="dark"]` block
 708- Persisted in `localStorage` key `workbridge_theme`
 709
 710### Responsive Breakpoints (Bootstrap default)
 711
 712| Breakpoint | Size | Usage |
 713|-----------|------|-------|
 714| `xs` | <576px | Mobile phones |
 715| `sm` | ≥576px | Large phones |
 716| `md` | ≥768px | Tablets |
 717| `lg` | ≥992px | Desktops — sidebar visible |
 718| `xl` | ≥1200px | Large desktops |
 719
 720### Dashboard Layout
 721
 722```
 723┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
 724│  Topbar (hamburger, title, user menu)    │
 725├─────────┬────────────────────────────────┤
 726│         │                                │
 727│ Sidebar │       Main Content Area        │
 728│ (260px) │       (.app-content)           │
 729│         │                                │
 730│  - Nav  │                                │
 731│  - Links│                                │
 732│         │                                │
 733└─────────┴────────────────────────────────┘
 734
 735Mobile: Sidebar hidden, opens as drawer overlay
 736```
 737
 738---
 739
 740## 12. Phased Roadmap (Deadline-Aligned)
 741
 742### Timeline Overview
 743
 744```
 745April 16-22 (THIS WEEK)     → Phase 1.5: Fix all bugs, fully functional frontend
 746April 23 (NEXT WEEK)        → MIDTERM PRESENTATION (demo the system live)
 747April 24 - May 10           → Phase 2: Laravel backend + MySQL
 748May 11-15                   → Phase 3: Deploy, get 25 users, feedback forms
 749May 16+                     → Lobby tarpaulin posting
 750```
 751
 752---
 753
 754### Phase 1.5 — Bug Fixes & Finalization (April 16-22)
 755
 756**Goal:** Make the frontend prototype fully functional from input to output. Every button, form, and action must work correctly with localStorage.
 757
 758| # | Bug / Task | File(s) | Priority |
 759|---|-----------|---------|----------|
 760| 1 | Registration must persist new users to seekers/companies store | `auth.mock.js`, `register.html` | CRITICAL |
 761| 2 | Seeker profile edits must save back to localStorage | `seeker/profile.html` | CRITICAL |
 762| 3 | Employer company profile edits must persist | `employer/company-profile.html` | CRITICAL |
 763| 4 | Admin user edit/delete must persist to store | `admin-users.js` | CRITICAL |
 764| 5 | Post Job form: add experience level and tags fields | `employer/post-job.html` | HIGH |
 765| 6 | XSS sanitization: escape all innerHTML with utility function | All pages with innerHTML | HIGH |
 766| 7 | Admin verification actions must persist | `admin-verification.js` | HIGH |
 767| 8 | Newly registered users must be able to login | `auth.mock.js` | CRITICAL |
 768| 9 | End-to-end flow testing: register → login → use dashboard | All | CRITICAL |
 769
 770---
 771
 772### Phase 2 — Backend Integration (April 24 - May 10)
 773
 774**Goal:** Replace localStorage with Laravel REST API + MySQL. Multi-user support for 25 real users.
 775
 776#### Week 1 (April 24-30): Foundation
 777| Task | Details |
 778|------|---------|
 779| Install XAMPP + Composer | Local dev environment |
 780| Create Laravel 11 project | `composer create-project laravel/laravel backend` |
 781| Configure .env | Database credentials, app URL |
 782| Create all migrations | 15 tables (see schema above) |
 783| Create Eloquent models | With relationships |
 784| Create seeders | Convert data.seed.js to SQL |
 785| Install Sanctum | `php artisan install:api` |
 786| Build auth endpoints | register, login, logout, me |
 787
 788#### Week 2 (May 1-7): API + Frontend Integration
 789| Task | Details |
 790|------|---------|
 791| Build all API endpoints | Jobs, applications, companies, admin, seeker |
 792| Create Form Requests | Validation for all endpoints |
 793| Create Policies | Ownership checks |
 794| Create `api.js` | Replace `store.js` imports |
 795| Wire all pages to API | Page-by-page migration |
 796| File upload for resumes | Laravel Storage |
 797| Test all flows | Register → login → apply → review → hire |
 798
 799#### Week 3 (May 8-10): Polish
 800| Task | Details |
 801|------|---------|
 802| Fix bugs from testing | |
 803| Loading states (skeletons) | While API requests load |
 804| Error handling | 401, 403, 422, 500 responses |
 805| Final testing | All 3 roles, all flows |
 806
 807---
 808
 809### Phase 3 — Deploy & User Testing (May 11-15)
 810
 811**Goal:** Deploy to hosting, get 25 users, collect feedback.
 812
 813| Task | Details |
 814|------|---------|
 815| Deploy to shared hosting (cPanel) or free tier | Upload Laravel, configure production .env |
 816| Set up MySQL production database | Run migrations + seed |
 817| SSL/HTTPS | Let's Encrypt |
 818| Create user accounts OR open registration | For 25 testers |
 819| Create Feedback Form / Evaluation Sheet | Google Forms or built-in |
 820| Distribute to 25 users (IT + other departments) | Collect at least 2 faculty evaluations |
 821| Collect feedback | Compile results |
 822| Prepare lobby tarpaulin content | System name, tech stack, screenshots, QR code |
 823
 824---
 825
 826### Phase 4 — Lobby Posting (May 16+)
 827
 828**Tarpaulin Content:**
 829- System name: **WorkBridge PH**
 830- Subtitle: Web-Based Unified Employment Platform for Decent Work Access
 831- Screenshots of key pages
 832- Tech stack: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Bootstrap 5, PHP 8.2, Laravel 11, MySQL 8.0
 833- SDG alignment: SDG 8, SDG 1, SDG 10
 834- QR code to live system URL
 835- Group 4 members
 836
 837---
 838
 839## 13. Deployment Architecture
 840
 841### Development (Local)
 842
 843```
 844XAMPP (Windows)
 845├── Apache → serves Laravel from backend/public/
 846├── MySQL 8.0 → local database
 847├── PHP 8.2 → Laravel runtime
 848└── Frontend HTML files → served from Employment/ directory
 849```
 850
 851### Production
 852
 853```
 854Shared Hosting (cPanel) or VPS
 855├── Apache/Nginx → serves Laravel from public/
 856├── MySQL 8.0 → production database
 857├── PHP 8.2+ → Laravel runtime
 858├── SSL/HTTPS → Let's Encrypt
 859├── Frontend files → deployed alongside Laravel in public/
 860└── Laravel Storage → resumes, documents in storage/app/public/
 861```
 862
 863### Deployment Checklist
 864
 865```
 866□ APP_ENV=production
 867□ APP_DEBUG=false
 868□ APP_URL=https://yourdomain.com
 869□ DB credentials set
 870□ php artisan migrate --force
 871□ php artisan db:seed
 872□ php artisan storage:link
 873□ php artisan config:cache
 874□ php artisan route:cache
 875□ HTTPS enabled
 876□ Daily MySQL backups configured
 877```
 878
 879---
 880
 881## Document History
 882
 883| Date | Change |
 884|------|--------|
 885| 2026-04-16 | Initial system architecture document created |
 886
 887---
 888
 889*This is the definitive architecture document for WorkBridge PH. All development decisions should align with this document.*
 890
about.html · 41 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>About — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/public.css">
  13</head>
  14<body>
  15  <header class="public-nav">
  16    <div class="public-nav-inner">
  17      <a href="index.html" class="public-nav-brand">WorkBridge PH</a>
  18      <ul class="public-nav-links">
  19        <li><a href="jobs.html">Jobs</a></li>
  20        <li><a href="categories.html">Categories</a></li>
  21        <li><a href="companies.html">Companies</a></li>
  22        <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
  23        <li><a href="auth/login.html" class="btn btn-primary">Log in</a></li>
  24      </ul>
  25    </div>
  26  </header>
  27
  28  <main class="container page-transition py-5">
  29    <div class="card">
  30      <div class="card-body p-5">
  31        <h1>About WorkBridge PH</h1>
  32        <p class="lead">A web-based unified employment platform for decent work access in the Philippines.</p>
  33        <p>WorkBridge PH connects job seekers with employers across the archipelago. We believe every Filipino deserves access to quality employment opportunities.</p>
  34        <p>Our mission is to bridge the gap between talent and opportunity through a transparent, safe, and efficient platform.</p>
  35      </div>
  36    </div>
  37  </main>
  38  <script type="module" src="assets/js/app.js"></script>
  39</body>
  40</html>

admin/analytics.html · 193 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Analytics — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/admin.css">
  14</head>
  15<body class="wb-loading">
  16  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  17    <main class="app-main">
  18      <div class="app-content">
  19        <h1 class="mb-4">Analytics</h1>
  20
  21        <!-- Top-line counters -->
  22        <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
  23          <div class="col-md-3">
  24            <div class="stat-card card">
  25              <div class="stat-value" id="total-users">—</div>
  26              <div class="stat-label">Total Users</div>
  27            </div>
  28          </div>
  29          <div class="col-md-3">
  30            <div class="stat-card card">
  31              <div class="stat-value" id="total-jobs">—</div>
  32              <div class="stat-label">Total Jobs</div>
  33            </div>
  34          </div>
  35          <div class="col-md-3">
  36            <div class="stat-card card">
  37              <div class="stat-value" id="total-companies">—</div>
  38              <div class="stat-label">Companies</div>
  39            </div>
  40          </div>
  41          <div class="col-md-3">
  42            <div class="stat-card card">
  43              <div class="stat-value" id="open-jobs">—</div>
  44              <div class="stat-label">Open Jobs</div>
  45            </div>
  46          </div>
  47        </div>
  48
  49        <!-- Charts row 1: composition donuts -->
  50        <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
  51          <div class="col-lg-6">
  52            <div class="card h-100">
  53              <div class="card-header"><h3 class="card-title mb-0">Users by Role</h3></div>
  54              <div class="card-body">
  55                <div style="position:relative;height:280px"><canvas id="chart-users-role"></canvas></div>
  56              </div>
  57            </div>
  58          </div>
  59          <div class="col-lg-6">
  60            <div class="card h-100">
  61              <div class="card-header"><h3 class="card-title mb-0">Companies by Verification</h3></div>
  62              <div class="card-body">
  63                <div style="position:relative;height:280px"><canvas id="chart-companies-verif"></canvas></div>
  64              </div>
  65            </div>
  66          </div>
  67        </div>
  68
  69        <!-- Charts row 2: pipeline + jobs -->
  70        <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
  71          <div class="col-lg-6">
  72            <div class="card h-100">
  73              <div class="card-header"><h3 class="card-title mb-0">Applications Pipeline</h3></div>
  74              <div class="card-body">
  75                <div style="position:relative;height:280px"><canvas id="chart-apps-status"></canvas></div>
  76              </div>
  77            </div>
  78          </div>
  79          <div class="col-lg-6">
  80            <div class="card h-100">
  81              <div class="card-header"><h3 class="card-title mb-0">Jobs by Status</h3></div>
  82              <div class="card-body">
  83                <div style="position:relative;height:280px"><canvas id="chart-jobs-status"></canvas></div>
  84              </div>
  85            </div>
  86          </div>
  87        </div>
  88      </div>
  89    </main>
  90  </div>
  91
  92  <!-- Chart.js for visualizations. ~60KB; loaded once. -->
  93  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.1/dist/chart.umd.js"></script>
  94  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  95  <script type="module">
  96    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  97    import { apiAdminDashboard } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  98
  99    renderLayout('admin', 'Analytics');
 100
 101    // Brand palette tied to the design tokens — keeps charts consistent with the rest of the UI.
 102    const PALETTE = {
 103      primary:   '#4F46E5',  // indigo / accent
 104      teal:      '#0D9488',  // verified
 105      amber:     '#F59E0B',  // pending
 106      rose:      '#E11D48',  // rejected
 107      slate:     '#64748B',  // neutral
 108      emerald:   '#10B981',  // hired/success
 109      sky:       '#0EA5E9',  // info / interview
 110      violet:    '#8B5CF6',
 111    };
 112
 113    function donut(ctx, labels, data, colors) {
 114      return new Chart(ctx, {
 115        type: 'doughnut',
 116        data: { labels, datasets: [{ data, backgroundColor: colors, borderWidth: 0 }] },
 117        options: {
 118          responsive: true,
 119          maintainAspectRatio: false,
 120          cutout: '60%',
 121          plugins: {
 122            legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { padding: 16, boxWidth: 12, font: { size: 12 } } },
 123            tooltip: { callbacks: { label: (c) => `${c.label}: ${c.parsed}` } },
 124          },
 125        },
 126      });
 127    }
 128
 129    function bar(ctx, labels, data, colors) {
 130      return new Chart(ctx, {
 131        type: 'bar',
 132        data: { labels, datasets: [{ data, backgroundColor: colors, borderRadius: 6, borderWidth: 0 }] },
 133        options: {
 134          responsive: true,
 135          maintainAspectRatio: false,
 136          plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
 137          scales: {
 138            y: { beginAtZero: true, ticks: { precision: 0 }, grid: { color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.05)' } },
 139            x: { grid: { display: false } },
 140          },
 141        },
 142      });
 143    }
 144
 145    apiAdminDashboard().then(d => {
 146      // Top-line counters
 147      document.getElementById('total-users').textContent     = d.total_users ?? '—';
 148      document.getElementById('total-jobs').textContent      = d.total_jobs ?? '—';
 149      document.getElementById('total-companies').textContent = d.total_companies ?? '—';
 150      document.getElementById('open-jobs').textContent       = d.open_jobs ?? '—';
 151
 152      // Users by role — doughnut
 153      const roles = d.users_by_role || {};
 154      donut(
 155        document.getElementById('chart-users-role'),
 156        ['Seekers', 'Employers', 'Admins'],
 157        [roles.seeker || 0, roles.employer || 0, roles.admin || 0],
 158        [PALETTE.primary, PALETTE.teal, PALETTE.violet]
 159      );
 160
 161      // Companies by verification — doughnut
 162      const verif = d.companies_by_verification || {};
 163      donut(
 164        document.getElementById('chart-companies-verif'),
 165        ['Verified', 'Pending', 'Rejected', 'Suspended', 'Unverified'],
 166        [verif.Verified || 0, verif.Pending || 0, verif.Rejected || 0, verif.Suspended || 0, verif.Unverified || 0],
 167        [PALETTE.teal, PALETTE.amber, PALETTE.rose, PALETTE.slate, PALETTE.slate]
 168      );
 169
 170      // Applications pipeline — doughnut (status order matches lifecycle)
 171      const apps = d.applications_by_status || {};
 172      donut(
 173        document.getElementById('chart-apps-status'),
 174        ['Pending', 'Reviewing', 'Interview', 'Hired', 'Rejected'],
 175        [apps.Pending || 0, apps.Reviewing || 0, apps.Interview || 0, apps.Hired || 0, apps.Rejected || 0],
 176        [PALETTE.amber, PALETTE.sky, PALETTE.violet, PALETTE.emerald, PALETTE.rose]
 177      );
 178
 179      // Jobs by status — bar
 180      const jobs = d.jobs_by_status || {};
 181      bar(
 182        document.getElementById('chart-jobs-status'),
 183        ['Open', 'Draft', 'Closed'],
 184        [jobs.Open || 0, jobs.Draft || 0, jobs.Closed || 0],
 185        [PALETTE.teal, PALETTE.amber, PALETTE.slate]
 186      );
 187    }).catch(err => {
 188      console.error('Failed to load analytics', err);
 189    });
 190  </script>
 191</body>
 192</html>
 193
admin/audit-logs.html · 70 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Audit Logs — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Audit Logs</h1>
  19        <div class="card mb-4">
  20          <div class="card-body">
  21            <input type="text" id="filter-action" class="form-input me-2" placeholder="Filter by action" style="max-width:200px">
  22            <button id="apply-filter" class="btn btn-secondary">Filter</button>
  23          </div>
  24        </div>
  25        <div class="card">
  26          <div class="table-wrap">
  27            <table class="table">
  28              <thead><tr><th>Actor</th><th>Action</th><th>Target</th><th>Timestamp</th></tr></thead>
  29              <tbody id="logs-tbody"><tr><td colspan="4" class="text-secondary">Loading…</td></tr></tbody>
  30            </table>
  31          </div>
  32        </div>
  33      </div>
  34    </main>
  35  </div>
  36
  37  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  38  <script type="module">
  39    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  40    import { apiAdminAuditLogs } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  41    import { esc, skeletonTableRows } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  42
  43    renderLayout('admin', 'Audit Logs');
  44    document.getElementById('logs-tbody').innerHTML = skeletonTableRows(5, 4);
  45
  46    let allLogs = [];
  47
  48    function render() {
  49      const q = (document.getElementById('filter-action').value || '').toLowerCase();
  50      const logs = q ? allLogs.filter(l => (l.action || '').toLowerCase().includes(q)) : allLogs;
  51      const tbody = document.getElementById('logs-tbody');
  52      if (!logs.length) { tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="4" class="text-secondary">No logs found.</td></tr>'; return; }
  53      tbody.innerHTML = logs.map(l => {
  54        const actor = l.actor?.name || l.actor_email || '—';
  55        return `<tr><td>${esc(actor)}</td><td>${esc(l.action)}</td><td>${esc(l.target_type + ':' + l.target_id)}</td><td>${new Date(l.created_at).toLocaleString()}</td></tr>`;
  56      }).join('');
  57    }
  58
  59    document.getElementById('apply-filter').onclick = render;
  60
  61    apiAdminAuditLogs().then(res => {
  62      allLogs = res.data || res;
  63      render();
  64    }).catch(err => {
  65      document.getElementById('logs-tbody').innerHTML = `<tr><td colspan="4" class="text-danger">${esc(err.message)}</td></tr>`;
  66    });
  67  </script>
  68</body>
  69</html>
  70
admin/categories.html · 98 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Categories — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/admin.css">
  14</head>
  15<body class="wb-loading">
  16  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  17    <main class="app-main">
  18      <div class="app-content">
  19        <h1 class="mb-4">Categories</h1>
  20        <div class="card mb-4">
  21          <div class="card-body">
  22            <div class="row g-2 align-items-end">
  23              <div class="col-md-4">
  24                <label class="form-label">New category</label>
  25                <input type="text" id="new-cat" class="form-input" placeholder="Category name">
  26              </div>
  27              <div class="col-md-2">
  28                <button id="add-cat" class="btn btn-primary w-100">Add</button>
  29              </div>
  30            </div>
  31          </div>
  32        </div>
  33        <div class="card">
  34          <div class="table-wrap">
  35            <table class="table">
  36              <thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Slug</th><th>Jobs</th><th>Actions</th></tr></thead>
  37              <tbody id="cats-tbody"><tr><td colspan="4" class="text-secondary">Loading…</td></tr></tbody>
  38            </table>
  39          </div>
  40        </div>
  41      </div>
  42    </main>
  43  </div>
  44
  45  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  46  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  47  <script type="module">
  48    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  49    import { apiGetCategories, apiAdminAddCategory, apiAdminDeleteCategory } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  50    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  51    import { esc, skeletonTableRows } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  52
  53    renderLayout('admin', 'Categories');
  54    document.getElementById('cats-tbody').innerHTML = skeletonTableRows(5, 4);
  55
  56    let cats = [];
  57
  58    function render() {
  59      const tbody = document.getElementById('cats-tbody');
  60      if (!cats.length) { tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="4" class="text-secondary">No categories found.</td></tr>'; return; }
  61      tbody.innerHTML = cats.map(c =>
  62        `<tr><td>${esc(c.name)}</td><td>${esc(c.slug)}</td><td>${c.job_listings_count ?? 0}</td><td><button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm delete-cat" data-id="${esc(String(c.id))}">Delete</button></td></tr>`
  63      ).join('');
  64      document.querySelectorAll('.delete-cat').forEach(b => {
  65        b.onclick = async () => {
  66          if (!confirm('Delete this category?')) return;
  67          b.disabled = true;
  68          try {
  69            await apiAdminDeleteCategory(b.dataset.id);
  70            cats = cats.filter(x => String(x.id) !== b.dataset.id);
  71            render();
  72            toastSuccess('Category deleted');
  73          } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); b.disabled = false; }
  74        };
  75      });
  76    }
  77
  78    document.getElementById('add-cat').onclick = async () => {
  79      const name = document.getElementById('new-cat').value.trim();
  80      if (!name) { toastError('Enter a category name'); return; }
  81      const btn = document.getElementById('add-cat');
  82      btn.disabled = true;
  83      try {
  84        const cat = await apiAdminAddCategory(name);
  85        cats.push(cat);
  86        render();
  87        document.getElementById('new-cat').value = '';
  88        toastSuccess('Category added');
  89      } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); }
  90      finally { btn.disabled = false; }
  91    };
  92
  93    apiGetCategories().then(res => { cats = res.data || res; render(); })
  94      .catch(err => { document.getElementById('cats-tbody').innerHTML = `<tr><td colspan="4" class="text-danger">${esc(err.message)}</td></tr>`; });
  95  </script>
  96</body>
  97</html>
  98
admin/dashboard.html · 83 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Admin Dashboard — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/admin.css">
  14</head>
  15<body class="wb-loading">
  16  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  17    <main class="app-main">
  18      <div class="app-content">
  19        <h1 class="mb-4">Admin Dashboard</h1>
  20        <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
  21          <div class="col-md-4 col-12">
  22            <a href="employer-verification.html" class="text-decoration-none text-dark">
  23              <div class="stat-card card">
  24                <div class="stat-value" id="pending-verify">0</div>
  25                <div class="stat-label">Pending Employer Verifications</div>
  26              </div>
  27            </a>
  28          </div>
  29          <div class="col-md-4 col-12">
  30            <a href="job-moderation.html" class="text-decoration-none text-dark">
  31              <div class="stat-card card">
  32                <div class="stat-value" id="pending-jobs">0</div>
  33                <div class="stat-label">Pending Job Reviews</div>
  34              </div>
  35            </a>
  36          </div>
  37          <div class="col-md-4 col-12">
  38            <a href="reports.html" class="text-decoration-none text-dark">
  39              <div class="stat-card card">
  40                <div class="stat-value" id="open-reports">0</div>
  41                <div class="stat-label">Open Reports</div>
  42              </div>
  43            </a>
  44          </div>
  45        </div>
  46        <div class="card">
  47          <div class="card-header"><h3 class="card-title mb-0">Quick Actions</h3></div>
  48          <div class="card-body">
  49            <a href="employer-verification.html" class="btn btn-primary me-2">Employer Verification</a>
  50            <a href="job-moderation.html" class="btn btn-secondary me-2">Job Moderation</a>
  51            <a href="reports.html" class="btn btn-secondary me-2">Reports</a>
  52            <a href="analytics.html" class="btn btn-secondary">Analytics</a>
  53          </div>
  54        </div>
  55      </div>
  56    </main>
  57  </div>
  58
  59  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  60  <script type="module">
  61    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  62    import { getDashboardStats, getPendingVerifications, getOpenReports } from '../assets/js/admin.module.js';
  63
  64    renderLayout('admin', 'Dashboard');
  65
  66    Promise.all([getDashboardStats(), getPendingVerifications(), getOpenReports()]).then(([stats, pendingVerif, openReports]) => {
  67      const pv = document.getElementById('pending-verify');
  68      const pj = document.getElementById('pending-jobs');
  69      const or = document.getElementById('open-reports');
  70      if (pv) pv.textContent = stats.pending_verif ?? pendingVerif.length;
  71      if (pj) pj.textContent = stats.total_jobs ?? 0;
  72      if (or) or.textContent = stats.open_reports ?? openReports.length;
  73
  74      // Extra stats if elements exist
  75      const tu = document.getElementById('total-users');
  76      const tj = document.getElementById('total-jobs');
  77      if (tu) tu.textContent = stats.total_users ?? '—';
  78      if (tj) tj.textContent = stats.total_jobs ?? '—';
  79    }).catch(() => {});
  80  </script>
  81</body>
  82</html>
  83
admin/employer-verification.html · 47 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Employer Verification — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/admin.css">
  14</head>
  15<body class="wb-loading">
  16  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  17    <main class="app-main">
  18      <div class="app-content">
  19        <h1 class="mb-4">Employer Verification</h1>
  20        <div class="card mb-4">
  21          <div class="card-body">
  22            <input type="text" id="search-company" class="form-input me-2" placeholder="Company" style="max-width:200px">
  23            <select id="filter-status" class="form-select" style="max-width:150px">
  24              <option value="">All</option>
  25              <option value="Pending">Pending</option>
  26              <option value="Verified">Verified</option>
  27              <option value="Rejected">Rejected</option>
  28            </select>
  29          </div>
  30        </div>
  31        <div class="card">
  32          <div class="table-wrap">
  33            <table class="table">
  34              <thead><tr><th>Company</th><th>Type</th><th>Location</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead>
  35              <tbody id="verify-tbody"></tbody>
  36            </table>
  37          </div>
  38        </div>
  39      </div>
  40    </main>
  41  </div>
  42
  43  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  44  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/admin-verification.js"></script>
  45</body>
  46</html>
  47
admin/job-moderation.html · 116 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Job Moderation — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Job Moderation</h1>
  19        <div class="card mb-4">
  20          <div class="card-body">
  21            <select id="f-status" class="form-select d-inline-block me-2" style="max-width:140px">
  22              <option value="">All Status</option>
  23              <option value="Open">Open</option>
  24              <option value="Draft">Draft</option>
  25              <option value="Closed">Closed</option>
  26            </select>
  27            <input type="text" id="f-search" class="form-input d-inline-block" placeholder="Search title or company…" style="max-width:220px">
  28          </div>
  29        </div>
  30        <div class="card">
  31          <div class="table-wrap">
  32            <table class="table">
  33              <thead><tr><th>Job Title</th><th>Company</th><th>Status</th><th>Posted</th><th>Actions</th></tr></thead>
  34              <tbody id="mod-tbody"><tr><td colspan="5" class="text-secondary">Loading…</td></tr></tbody>
  35            </table>
  36          </div>
  37        </div>
  38      </div>
  39    </main>
  40  </div>
  41
  42  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  43  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  44  <script type="module">
  45    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  46    import { apiAdminAllJobs, apiAdminApproveJob, apiAdminTakedownJob } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  47    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  48    import { esc, skeletonTableRows } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  49
  50    renderLayout('admin', 'Job Moderation');
  51    document.getElementById('mod-tbody').innerHTML = skeletonTableRows(5, 5);
  52
  53    let allJobs = [];
  54
  55    function render() {
  56      const status = document.getElementById('f-status').value;
  57      const q = (document.getElementById('f-search').value || '').toLowerCase();
  58      let list = allJobs;
  59      if (status) list = list.filter(j => j.status === status);
  60      if (q) list = list.filter(j => (j.title + ' ' + (j.company?.name || '')).toLowerCase().includes(q));
  61
  62      const tbody = document.getElementById('mod-tbody');
  63      if (!list.length) { tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="5" class="text-secondary">No jobs found.</td></tr>'; return; }
  64
  65      tbody.innerHTML = list.map(j => {
  66        const badgeCls = j.status === 'Open' ? 'verified' : j.status === 'Draft' ? 'pending' : 'rejected';
  67        return `<tr>
  68          <td><a href="job-review.html?id=${esc(String(j.id))}" class="text-dark">${esc(j.title)}</a></td>
  69          <td>${esc(j.company?.name || '—')}</td>
  70          <td><span class="badge badge-${badgeCls}">${esc(j.status)}</span></td>
  71          <td>${new Date(j.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
  72          <td>
  73            <a href="job-review.html?id=${esc(String(j.id))}" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm me-1">Review</a>
  74            ${j.status !== 'Open' ? `<button class="btn btn-success btn-sm me-1 approve-btn" data-id="${esc(String(j.id))}">Approve</button>` : ''}
  75            ${j.status !== 'Closed' ? `<button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm takedown-btn" data-id="${esc(String(j.id))}">Close</button>` : ''}
  76          </td>
  77        </tr>`;
  78      }).join('');
  79
  80      tbody.querySelectorAll('.approve-btn').forEach(btn => {
  81        btn.onclick = async () => {
  82          btn.disabled = true;
  83          try {
  84            await apiAdminApproveJob(btn.dataset.id);
  85            toastSuccess('Job approved');
  86            const job = allJobs.find(j => String(j.id) === btn.dataset.id);
  87            if (job) job.status = 'Open';
  88            render();
  89          } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); btn.disabled = false; }
  90        };
  91      });
  92
  93      tbody.querySelectorAll('.takedown-btn').forEach(btn => {
  94        btn.onclick = async () => {
  95          if (!confirm('Close this job listing?')) return;
  96          btn.disabled = true;
  97          try {
  98            await apiAdminTakedownJob(btn.dataset.id);
  99            toastSuccess('Job closed');
 100            const job = allJobs.find(j => String(j.id) === btn.dataset.id);
 101            if (job) job.status = 'Closed';
 102            render();
 103          } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); btn.disabled = false; }
 104        };
 105      });
 106    }
 107
 108    document.getElementById('f-status').onchange = render;
 109    document.getElementById('f-search').oninput = render;
 110
 111    apiAdminAllJobs().then(res => { allJobs = res.data || res; render(); })
 112      .catch(err => { document.getElementById('mod-tbody').innerHTML = `<tr><td colspan="5" class="text-danger">${esc(err.message)}</td></tr>`; });
 113  </script>
 114</body>
 115</html>
 116
admin/job-review.html · 96 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Job Review — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <a href="job-moderation.html" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm mb-3"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back</a>
  19        <div class="row">
  20          <div class="col-lg-8">
  21            <div id="job-content" class="card mb-4"><div class="card-body"><p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p></div></div>
  22          </div>
  23          <div class="col-lg-4">
  24            <div class="card sticky-top" style="top:80px">
  25              <div class="card-header"><h3 class="card-title mb-0">Moderation</h3></div>
  26              <div class="card-body">
  27                <textarea id="mod-reason" class="form-textarea mb-3" rows="2" placeholder="Reason (optional)"></textarea>
  28                <button id="btn-approve" class="btn btn-success w-100 mb-2">Approve (Set Open)</button>
  29                <button id="btn-reject" class="btn btn-danger w-100">Close / Takedown</button>
  30              </div>
  31            </div>
  32          </div>
  33        </div>
  34      </div>
  35    </main>
  36  </div>
  37
  38  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  39  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  40  <script type="module">
  41    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  42    import { apiGetJob, apiAdminApproveJob, apiAdminTakedownJob } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  43    import { getQueryParams } from '../assets/js/router.js';
  44    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  45    import { esc } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  46
  47    renderLayout('admin', 'Job Review');
  48
  49    const params = getQueryParams();
  50    const el = document.getElementById('job-content');
  51
  52    if (!params.id) {
  53      el.innerHTML = '<div class="card-body"><p>No job selected.</p></div>';
  54    } else {
  55      apiGetJob(params.id).then(job => {
  56        const tags = (job.tags || []).map(t => `<span class="badge me-1">${esc(t.tag || t)}</span>`).join('');
  57        el.innerHTML = `
  58          <div class="card-header"><h2 class="card-title mb-0">${esc(job.title)}</h2></div>
  59          <div class="card-body">
  60            <p class="text-secondary">${esc(job.company?.name || '—')} · ${esc(job.location)}</p>
  61            <p><span class="badge badge-${job.status === 'Open' ? 'verified' : 'pending'}">${esc(job.status)}</span></p>
  62            ${tags ? `<div class="mb-3">${tags}</div>` : ''}
  63            <h5>Description</h5>
  64            <p>${esc(job.description || '')}</p>
  65            ${job.requirements ? `<h5>Requirements</h5><p>${esc(job.requirements)}</p>` : ''}
  66            <p class="text-muted small">Posted: ${new Date(job.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}</p>
  67          </div>`;
  68
  69        document.getElementById('btn-approve').onclick = async () => {
  70          const btn = document.getElementById('btn-approve');
  71          btn.disabled = true;
  72          try {
  73            await apiAdminApproveJob(job.id);
  74            toastSuccess('Job approved — status set to Open');
  75            setTimeout(() => location.href = 'job-moderation.html', 800);
  76          } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); btn.disabled = false; }
  77        };
  78
  79        document.getElementById('btn-reject').onclick = async () => {
  80          if (!confirm('Close this job listing?')) return;
  81          const btn = document.getElementById('btn-reject');
  82          btn.disabled = true;
  83          try {
  84            await apiAdminTakedownJob(job.id);
  85            toastSuccess('Job closed');
  86            setTimeout(() => location.href = 'job-moderation.html', 800);
  87          } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); btn.disabled = false; }
  88        };
  89      }).catch(() => {
  90        el.innerHTML = '<div class="card-body"><p class="text-danger">Job not found.</p></div>';
  91      });
  92    }
  93  </script>
  94</body>
  95</html>
  96
admin/report-detail.html · 86 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Report Detail — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <a href="reports.html" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm mb-3"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back</a>
  19        <div id="report-detail" class="card"><div class="card-body"><p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p></div></div>
  20      </div>
  21    </main>
  22  </div>
  23
  24  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  25  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  26  <script type="module">
  27    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  28    import { apiAdminReports, apiAdminResolveReport } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  29    import { getQueryParams } from '../assets/js/router.js';
  30    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  31    import { esc } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  32
  33    renderLayout('admin', 'Report Detail');
  34
  35    const params = getQueryParams();
  36    const el = document.getElementById('report-detail');
  37
  38    if (!params.id) {
  39      el.innerHTML = '<div class="card-body"><p>Not found.</p></div>';
  40    } else {
  41      apiAdminReports().then(res => {
  42        const reports = res.data || res;
  43        const r = reports.find(x => String(x.id) === params.id);
