assets/js/admin-users.js · 83 lines
   1import { renderLayout } from './layout.js';
   2import { apiAdminUsers, apiAdminBanUser, apiAdminUnbanUser } from './api.js';
   3import { toastSuccess, toastError } from './ui.toast.js';
   4import { esc, skeletonTableRows } from './utils.js';
   5
   6renderLayout('admin', 'Users');
   7
   8let allUsers = [];
   9let roleFilter = '';
  10
  11function render() {
  12  const q = (document.getElementById('search-user').value || '').toLowerCase();
  13  const list = allUsers.filter(u => {
  14    const matchQ = !q || (u.name || '').toLowerCase().includes(q) || (u.email || '').toLowerCase().includes(q);
  15    const matchR = !roleFilter || u.role === roleFilter;
  16    return matchQ && matchR;
  17  });
  18
  19  document.getElementById('users-tbody').innerHTML = list.length
  20    ? list.map(u => {
  21        const isBanned = u.status === 'banned';
  22        const roleBadge = u.role === 'admin' ? 'badge-teal' : u.role === 'employer' ? 'badge-pending' : '';
  23        return `<tr>
  24          <td>${esc(u.name)}</td>
  25          <td>${esc(u.email)}</td>
  26          <td><span class="badge ${roleBadge}">${esc(u.role)}</span></td>
  27          <td><span class="badge badge-${isBanned ? 'rejected' : 'verified'}">${esc(u.status)}</span></td>
  28          <td style="white-space:nowrap">
  29            <a href="user-detail.html?id=${esc(String(u.id))}" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm">View</a>
  30            ${u.role !== 'admin' ? `
  31              <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm ban-btn" data-id="${esc(String(u.id))}" data-banned="${isBanned}" style="color:var(--color-error)">
  32                ${isBanned ? 'Unban' : 'Ban'}
  33              </button>` : ''}
  34          </td>
  35        </tr>`;
  36      }).join('')
  37    : '<tr><td colspan="5" class="text-secondary text-center py-3">No users found.</td></tr>';
  38
  39  document.querySelectorAll('.ban-btn').forEach(btn => {
  40    btn.onclick = async () => {
  41      const isBanned = btn.dataset.banned === 'true';
  42      btn.disabled = true;
  43      try {
  44        if (isBanned) {
  45          await apiAdminUnbanUser(btn.dataset.id);
  46          toastSuccess('User unbanned');
  47        } else {
  48          await apiAdminBanUser(btn.dataset.id);
  49          toastSuccess('User banned');
  50        }
  51        await loadUsers();
  52      } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); btn.disabled = false; }
  53    };
  54  });
  55}
  56
  57async function loadUsers() {
  58  try {
  59    const res = await apiAdminUsers();
  60    allUsers = res.data || res;
  61    render();
  62  } catch (err) {
  63    document.getElementById('users-tbody').innerHTML =
  64      `<tr><td colspan="5" class="text-danger">${esc(err.message)}</td></tr>`;
  65  }
  66}
  67
  68// Role filter chips — if they exist in the HTML
  69document.querySelectorAll('[data-role-filter]')?.forEach(btn => {
  70  btn.onclick = () => {
  71    roleFilter = btn.dataset.roleFilter;
  72    document.querySelectorAll('[data-role-filter]').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  73    btn.classList.add('active');
  74    render();
  75  };
  76});
  77
  78document.getElementById('search-user').oninput = render;
  79
  80// Initial load
  81document.getElementById('users-tbody').innerHTML = skeletonTableRows(5, 5);
  82loadUsers();
  83
assets/js/admin-verification.js · 56 lines
   1import { renderLayout } from './layout.js';
   2import { apiAdminVerifications } from './api.js';
   3import { esc, skeletonTableRows } from './utils.js';
   4
   5renderLayout('admin', 'Employer Verification');
   6
   7let allCompanies = [];
   8
   9function render() {
  10  const q      = (document.getElementById('search-company').value || '').toLowerCase();
  11  const status = document.getElementById('filter-status').value;
  12
  13  const list = allCompanies.filter(c => {
  14    const matchQ = !q || (c.name || '').toLowerCase().includes(q);
  15    const matchS = !status || c.verified_status === status;
  16    return matchQ && matchS;
  17  });
  18
  19  const tbody = document.getElementById('verify-tbody');
  20
  21  if (!list.length) {
  22    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="4" class="text-secondary text-center py-3">No companies found.</td></tr>';
  23    return;
  24  }
  25
  26  tbody.innerHTML = list.map(c => {
  27    const vs = c.verified_status || 'Unverified';
  28    const badgeCls = vs === 'Verified' ? 'verified'
  29                   : vs === 'Rejected' ? 'rejected'
  30                   : vs === 'Suspended' ? 'rejected'
  31                   : 'pending';
  32    const location = [c.city, c.province].filter(Boolean).join(', ') || c.location || '—';
  33    return `<tr role="button" style="cursor:pointer"
  34              onclick="location.href='verification-detail.html?id=${esc(String(c.id))}'">
  35      <td>${esc(c.name)}</td>
  36      <td>${esc(c.industry || '—')}</td>
  37      <td>${esc(location)}</td>
  38      <td><span class="badge badge-${badgeCls}">${esc(vs)}</span></td>
  39    </tr>`;
  40  }).join('');
  41}
  42
  43document.getElementById('search-company').oninput  = render;
  44document.getElementById('filter-status').onchange  = render;
  45
  46// Initial load
  47document.getElementById('verify-tbody').innerHTML =
  48  skeletonTableRows(5, 4);
  49
  50apiAdminVerifications()
  51  .then(res => { allCompanies = res.data || res; render(); })
  52  .catch(err => {
  53    document.getElementById('verify-tbody').innerHTML =
  54      `<tr><td colspan="4" class="text-danger">${esc(err.message)}</td></tr>`;
  55  });
  56
assets/js/admin.module.js · 28 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Admin module (API-backed)
   3 */
   4
   5import { apiAdminDashboard, apiAdminVerifications, apiAdminReports } from './api.js';
   6
   7export async function getDashboardStats() {
   8    return apiAdminDashboard();
   9}
  10
  11export async function getPendingVerifications() {
  12    const res = await apiAdminVerifications();
  13    return (res.data || res).map(c => ({
  14        id: c.id,
  15        name: c.name,
  16        industry: c.industry,
  17        verifiedStatus: c.verified_status,
  18        userId: c.user_id,
  19        docs: c.verification_documents || [],
  20        submittedAt: c.created_at,
  21    }));
  22}
  23
  24export async function getOpenReports() {
  25    const res = await apiAdminReports({ status: 'Open' });
  26    return (res.data || res);
  27}
  28
assets/js/api.js · 335 lines
   1/**
   2 * api.js — HTTP adapter for WorkBridge PH backend
   3 * Replaces store.js localStorage calls with real API calls.
   4 * BASE_URL points to the Laravel dev server.
   5 */
   6
   7const BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:8000/api';
   8
   9function getToken() {
  10    const user = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('workbridge_user') || 'null');
  11    return user?.api_token || null;
  12}
  13
  14async function request(method, path, body = null, isFormData = false) {
  15    const token = getToken();
  16    const headers = { Accept: 'application/json' };
  17
  18    if (token) headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;
  19    if (body && !isFormData) headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
  20
  21    const opts = { method, headers };
  22    if (body) opts.body = isFormData ? body : JSON.stringify(body);
  23
  24    const res = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}${path}`, opts);
  25    const json = await res.json().catch(() => null);
  26
  27    if (!res.ok) {
  28        const fromErrors = json?.errors
  29            ? Object.values(json.errors).flat().join(' ').trim()
  30            : '';
  31        const msg =
  32            (json?.message && String(json.message).trim()) ||
  33            fromErrors ||
  34            `HTTP ${res.status}`;
  35        throw new Error(msg);
  36    }
  37    return json;
  38}
  39
  40// ── Auth ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  41
  42export async function apiLogin(email, password) {
  43    const data = await request('POST', '/auth/login', { email, password });
  44    _saveSession(data);
  45    return data.user;
  46}
  47
  48export async function apiRegister(name, email, password, role, companyName = null) {
  49    const body = { name, email, password, password_confirmation: password, role };
  50    if (companyName) body.company_name = companyName;
  51    const data = await request('POST', '/auth/register', body);
  52    _saveSession(data);
  53    return data.user;
  54}
  55
  56export async function apiLogout() {
  57    await request('POST', '/auth/logout').catch(() => {});
  58    localStorage.removeItem('workbridge_user');
  59}
  60
  61export async function apiMe() {
  62    return request('GET', '/auth/me');
  63}
  64
  65function _saveSession({ user, token }) {
  66    localStorage.setItem('workbridge_user', JSON.stringify({ ...user, api_token: token }));
  67}
  68
  69// ── Jobs ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  70
  71export async function apiGetJobs(params = {}) {
  72    const q = new URLSearchParams(params).toString();
  73    return request('GET', `/jobs${q ? '?' + q : ''}`);
  74}
  75
  76export async function apiGetJob(id) {
  77    return request('GET', `/jobs/${id}`);
  78}
  79
  80export async function apiCreateJob(data) {
  81    return request('POST', '/employer/jobs', data);
  82}
  83
  84export async function apiUpdateJob(id, data) {
  85    return request('PUT', `/employer/jobs/${id}`, data);
  86}
  87
  88export async function apiDeleteJob(id) {
  89    return request('DELETE', `/employer/jobs/${id}`);
  90}
  91
  92export async function apiMyJobs() {
  93    return request('GET', '/employer/jobs');
  94}
  95
  96export async function apiEmployerDashboard() {
  97    return request('GET', '/employer/dashboard');
  98}
  99
 100// ── Applications ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 101
 102export async function apiApply(jobId, data = {}) {
 103    return request('POST', `/jobs/${jobId}/apply`, data);
 104}
 105
 106export async function apiMyApplications() {
 107    return request('GET', '/seeker/applications');
 108}
 109
 110export async function apiJobApplications(jobId) {
 111    return request('GET', `/employer/jobs/${jobId}/applications`);
 112}
 113
 114export async function apiUpdateApplicationStatus(appId, status, note = null) {
 115    return request('PATCH', `/applications/${appId}/status`, { status, note });
 116}
 117
 118export async function apiWithdraw(appId) {
 119    return request('DELETE', `/applications/${appId}/withdraw`);
 120}
 121
 122// ── Seeker ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 123
 124export async function apiSeekerProfile() {
 125    return request('GET', '/seeker/profile');
 126}
 127
 128export async function apiUpdateSeekerProfile(data) {
 129    return request('PUT', '/seeker/profile', data);
 130}
 131
 132export async function apiUploadResume(file) {
 133    const fd = new FormData();
 134    fd.append('resume', file);
 135    return request('POST', '/seeker/resumes', fd, true);
 136}
 137
 138export async function apiUploadPhoto(file) {
 139    const fd = new FormData();
 140    fd.append('photo', file);
 141    return request('POST', '/seeker/photo', fd, true);
 142}
 143
 144/** Convert a backend storage path ("avatars/x.jpg") to a full URL. */
 145export function storageUrl(path) {
 146    if (!path) return '';
 147    if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(path)) return path; // already absolute
 148    return BASE_URL.replace('/api', '/storage/') + path.replace(/^\/+/, '');
 149}
 150
 151export async function apiDeleteResume(id) {
 152    return request('DELETE', `/seeker/resumes/${id}`);
 153}
 154
 155export async function apiDownloadResume(id, filename) {
 156    const token = getToken();
 157    const res = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/seeker/resumes/${id}/download`, {
 158        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, Accept: '*/*' },
 159    });
 160    if (!res.ok) {
 161        const json = await res.json().catch(() => null);
 162        throw new Error(json?.message || `HTTP ${res.status}`);
 163    }
 164    const blob = await res.blob();
 165    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
 166    const a = document.createElement('a');
 167    a.href = url;
 168    a.download = filename || 'resume';
 169    a.click();
 170    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
 171}
 172
 173export async function apiSavedJobs() {
 174    return request('GET', '/seeker/saved-jobs');
 175}
 176
 177export async function apiSaveJob(jobId) {
 178    return request('POST', `/seeker/saved-jobs/${jobId}`);
 179}
 180
 181export async function apiUnsaveJob(jobId) {
 182    return request('DELETE', `/seeker/saved-jobs/${jobId}`);
 183}
 184
 185// ── Company ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 186
 187export async function apiGetCompanies(params = {}) {
 188    const q = new URLSearchParams(params).toString();
 189    return request('GET', `/companies${q ? '?' + q : ''}`);
 190}
 191
 192export async function apiGetCompany(id) {
 193    return request('GET', `/companies/${id}`);
 194}
 195
 196export async function apiMyCompany() {
 197    return request('GET', '/employer/company');
 198}
 199
 200export async function apiUpdateCompany(data) {
 201    return request('PUT', '/employer/company', data);
 202}
 203
 204export async function apiUploadLogo(file) {
 205    const fd = new FormData();
 206    fd.append('logo', file);
 207    return request('POST', '/employer/company/logo', fd, true);
 208}
 209
 210export async function apiUploadVerificationDoc(file, docType) {
 211    const fd = new FormData();
 212    fd.append('document', file);
 213    fd.append('doc_type', docType);
 214    return request('POST', '/employer/company/docs', fd, true);
 215}
 216
 217// ── Messages ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 218
 219export async function apiGetContacts() {
 220    return request('GET', '/messages/contacts');
 221}
 222
 223export async function apiGetThread(userId) {
 224    return request('GET', `/messages/${userId}`);
 225}
 226
 227export async function apiSendMessage(recipientId, body) {
 228    return request('POST', '/messages', { recipient_id: recipientId, body });
 229}
 230
 231export async function apiUnreadMessages() {
 232    return request('GET', '/messages/unread');
 233}
 234
 235// ── Notifications ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 236
 237export async function apiGetNotifications() {
 238    return request('GET', '/notifications');
 239}
 240
 241export async function apiMarkNotificationRead(id) {
 242    return request('PATCH', `/notifications/${id}/read`);
 243}
 244
 245export async function apiMarkAllNotificationsRead() {
 246    return request('PATCH', '/notifications/read-all');
 247}
 248
 249export async function apiUnreadNotifications() {
 250    return request('GET', '/notifications/unread');
 251}
 252
 253// ── Admin ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 254
 255export async function apiAdminDashboard() {
 256    return request('GET', '/admin/dashboard');
 257}
 258
 259export async function apiAdminUsers(params = {}) {
 260    const q = new URLSearchParams(params).toString();
 261    return request('GET', `/admin/users${q ? '?' + q : ''}`);
 262}
 263
 264export async function apiAdminBanUser(id) {
 265    return request('PATCH', `/admin/users/${id}/ban`);
 266}
 267
 268export async function apiAdminUnbanUser(id) {
 269    return request('PATCH', `/admin/users/${id}/unban`);
 270}
 271
 272export async function apiAdminVerifications() {
 273    return request('GET', '/admin/verifications');
 274}
 275
 276export async function apiAdminVerifyCompany(id, status, note = null) {
 277    return request('PATCH', `/admin/companies/${id}/verify`, { status, note });
 278}
 279
 280export async function apiAdminReports(params = {}) {
 281    const q = new URLSearchParams(params).toString();
 282    return request('GET', `/admin/reports${q ? '?' + q : ''}`);
 283}
 284
 285export async function apiAdminResolveReport(id, status, note = null) {
 286    return request('PATCH', `/admin/reports/${id}/resolve`, { status, note });
 287}
 288
 289export async function apiAdminAllJobs(params = {}) {
 290    const q = new URLSearchParams(params).toString();
 291    return request('GET', `/admin/jobs${q ? '?' + q : ''}`);
 292}
 293
 294export async function apiAdminTakedownJob(id) {
 295    return request('PATCH', `/admin/jobs/${id}/takedown`);
 296}
 297
 298export async function apiAdminAuditLogs() {
 299    return request('GET', '/admin/audit-logs');
 300}
 301
 302export async function apiChangePassword(currentPassword, newPassword) {
 303    return request('POST', '/auth/change-password', { current_password: currentPassword, new_password: newPassword });
 304}
 305
 306export async function apiForgotPassword(email) {
 307    return request('POST', '/auth/forgot-password', { email });
 308}
 309
 310export async function apiResetPassword(email, token, password, passwordConfirmation) {
 311    return request('POST', '/auth/reset-password', {
 312        email, token, password, password_confirmation: passwordConfirmation,
 313    });
 314}
 315
 316export async function apiGetApplication(id) {
 317    return request('GET', `/applications/${id}`);
 318}
 319
 320export async function apiGetCategories() {
 321    return request('GET', '/categories');
 322}
 323
 324export async function apiAdminApproveJob(id) {
 325    return request('PATCH', `/admin/jobs/${id}/approve`);
 326}
 327
 328export async function apiAdminAddCategory(name) {
 329    return request('POST', '/admin/categories', { name });
 330}
 331
 332export async function apiAdminDeleteCategory(id) {
 333    return request('DELETE', `/admin/categories/${id}`);
 334}
