assets/js/app.js · 123 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Main App
   3 */
   4
   5import { getCurrentUser, getTheme, setTheme } from './store.js';
   6import { checkRouteGuard } from './router.js';
   7import { initDropdowns } from './ui.dropdown.js';
   8import { apiLogout } from './api.js';
   9
  10// Apply theme
  11const theme = getTheme();
  12if (theme === 'dark') {
  13  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'dark');
  14}
  15
  16// Route guard for protected pages
  17if (!checkRouteGuard()) {
  18  // Redirect happened
  19} else {
  20  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  21    initDropdowns();
  22    syncPublicNavWithLoginState();
  23    initPublicNavToggle();
  24  });
  25}
  26
  27/**
  28 * On phones the public nav has too many links to fit horizontally (Jobs,
  29 * Categories, Companies, About, Help, Log in). Inject a hamburger button
  30 * that toggles the nav links into a dropdown panel.
  31 *
  32 * No-ops on dashboard pages (no `.public-nav`).
  33 */
  34function initPublicNavToggle() {
  35  const inner = document.querySelector('.public-nav-inner');
  36  const links = document.querySelector('.public-nav-links');
  37  if (!inner || !links || inner.querySelector('.public-nav-toggle')) return;
  38
  39  const btn = document.createElement('button');
  40  btn.type = 'button';
  41  btn.className = 'public-nav-toggle';
  42  btn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Toggle navigation menu');
  43  btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
  44  btn.innerHTML = '<i class="bi bi-list"></i>';
  45  inner.insertBefore(btn, links);
  46
  47  btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  48    e.stopPropagation();
  49    const open = links.classList.toggle('show');
  50    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', open ? 'true' : 'false');
  51  });
  52
  53  // Close menu when clicking outside or on a nav link (after navigation)
  54  document.addEventListener('click', () => {
  55    if (links.classList.contains('show')) {
  56      links.classList.remove('show');
  57      btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
  58    }
  59  });
  60  links.addEventListener('click', () => {
  61    links.classList.remove('show');
  62    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
  63  });
  64}
  65
  66/**
  67 * Public pages (index, jobs, companies, etc.) have a static "Log in" button.
  68 * If the user is actually logged in (token in localStorage), that button is
  69 * misleading — they think they're a guest. Replace it with their name + a
  70 * link to their role dashboard, plus a Log out option.
  71 *
  72 * Runs only on pages with `.public-nav` markup; no-ops on dashboard pages.
  73 */
  74function syncPublicNavWithLoginState() {
  75  const navLinks = document.querySelector('.public-nav-links');
  76  if (!navLinks) return;
  77  const user = getCurrentUser();
  78  if (!user) return;
  79
  80  const dashUrl = user.role === 'seeker'   ? 'seeker/dashboard.html'
  81                : user.role === 'employer' ? 'employer/dashboard.html'
  82                : 'admin/dashboard.html';
  83  // Resolve relative to current page depth — works from /index.html and from /auth/login.html
  84  const depth = location.pathname.replace(/^\/workbridge\/?/, '').replace(/^\//, '').split('/').length - 1;
  85  const prefix = '../'.repeat(depth);
  86  const safeName = (user.name || user.email || 'Account').replace(/[<>"']/g, '');
  87
  88  const loginItem = navLinks.querySelector('.btn-primary')?.parentElement;
  89  if (!loginItem) return;
  90  loginItem.outerHTML = `
  91    <li><a href="${prefix}${dashUrl}" class="btn btn-primary"><i class="bi bi-grid"></i> Dashboard</a></li>
  92    <li>
  93      <a href="#" id="public-nav-logout" title="Logged in as ${safeName}">
  94        <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-right"></i> Log out
  95      </a>
  96    </li>`;
  97
  98  document.getElementById('public-nav-logout')?.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {
  99    e.preventDefault();
 100    await apiLogout().catch(() => {});
 101    window.location.reload();
 102  });
 103}
 104
 105export function switchRole(role) {
 106  const user = getCurrentUser();
 107  if (!user) {
 108    window.location.href = 'auth/login.html';
 109    return;
 110  }
 111  const path = role === 'seeker' ? 'seeker/dashboard.html' : role === 'employer' ? 'employer/dashboard.html' : 'admin/dashboard.html';
 112  const prefix = location.pathname.includes('/seeker/') || location.pathname.includes('seeker') ? '../' :
 113    location.pathname.includes('/employer/') || location.pathname.includes('employer') ? '../' :
 114    location.pathname.includes('/admin/') || location.pathname.includes('admin') ? '../' : '';
 115  window.location.href = prefix + path;
 116}
 117
 118export function toggleDarkMode() {
 119  const isDark = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark';
 120  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', isDark ? 'light' : 'dark');
 121  setTheme(isDark ? 'light' : 'dark');
 122}
 123
assets/js/auth.js · 53 lines
   1/**
   2 * auth.js — API-backed authentication
   3 * Drop-in async replacement for auth.mock.js
   4 */
   5
   6import { apiLogin, apiRegister, apiLogout } from './api.js';
   7import { getCurrentUser } from './store.js';
   8
   9export async function login(email, password) {
  10    try {
  11        const user = await apiLogin(email, password);
  12        return { ok: true, user };
  13    } catch (err) {
  14        return { ok: false, error: err.message };
  15    }
  16}
  17
  18export async function register(data) {
  19    try {
  20        const user = await apiRegister(
  21            data.name, data.email, data.password, data.role, data.companyName || null
  22        );
  23        return { ok: true, user };
  24    } catch (err) {
  25        return { ok: false, error: err.message };
  26    }
  27}
  28
  29export async function logout() {
  30    await apiLogout();
  31    window.location.href = '/auth/login.html';
  32}
  33
  34export function isAuthenticated() {
  35    return !!getCurrentUser();
  36}
  37
  38export function requireRole(role) {
  39    const user = getCurrentUser();
  40    if (!user) return false;
  41    if (Array.isArray(role)) return role.includes(user.role);
  42    return user.role === role;
  43}
  44
  45export function getRedirectAfterLogin(user) {
  46    switch (user.role) {
  47        case 'seeker':   return '../seeker/dashboard.html';
  48        case 'employer': return '../employer/dashboard.html';
  49        case 'admin':    return '../admin/dashboard.html';
  50        default:         return '../index.html';
  51    }
  52}
  53
assets/js/auth.mock.js · 124 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Mock Auth
   3 */
   4
   5import { setCurrentUser, getCurrentUser, get, set, getSeekers, setSeekers, getCompanies, setCompanies } from './store.js';
   6
   7const DEMO_ACCOUNTS = {
   8  // Aligned with backend DatabaseSeeder (use when wiring pages to auth.mock instead of API)
   9  'juan@example.com': { role: 'seeker', password: 'password', userId: 's1', name: 'Juan dela Cruz' },
  10  'hr@technova.ph': { role: 'employer', password: 'password', userId: 'c1', name: 'TechNova Solutions HR' },
  11  'admin@workbridge.ph': { role: 'admin', password: 'password', userId: 'admin1', name: 'Admin WorkBridge' },
  12};
  13
  14const REGISTERED_KEY = 'workbridge_registered_users';
  15
  16function getRegisteredUsers() {
  17  return get(REGISTERED_KEY, {});
  18}
  19
  20function setRegisteredUsers(users) {
  21  set(REGISTERED_KEY, users);
  22}
  23
  24export function mockLogin(email, password) {
  25  const key = email?.toLowerCase();
  26
  27  // Check demo accounts first
  28  const demo = DEMO_ACCOUNTS[key];
  29  if (demo && demo.password === password) {
  30    const user = { id: demo.userId, email: key, name: demo.name, role: demo.role };
  31    setCurrentUser(user);
  32    return { ok: true, user };
  33  }
  34
  35  // Check registered accounts
  36  const registered = getRegisteredUsers();
  37  const reg = registered[key];
  38  if (reg && reg.password === password) {
  39    const user = { id: reg.userId, email: key, name: reg.name, role: reg.role };
  40    setCurrentUser(user);
  41    return { ok: true, user };
  42  }
  43
  44  return { ok: false, error: 'Invalid email or password' };
  45}
  46
  47export function mockLogout() {
  48  setCurrentUser(null);
  49}
  50
  51export function mockRegister(data) {
  52  const key = data.email?.toLowerCase();
  53
  54  // Check against demo accounts
  55  if (DEMO_ACCOUNTS[key]) return { ok: false, error: 'Email already registered' };
  56
  57  // Check against registered accounts
  58  const registered = getRegisteredUsers();
  59  if (registered[key]) return { ok: false, error: 'Email already registered' };
  60
  61  const userId = 'u' + Date.now();
  62  const role = data.role || 'seeker';
  63
  64  // Save to registered users store (for login)
  65  registered[key] = { userId, name: data.name, role, password: data.password };
  66  setRegisteredUsers(registered);
  67
  68  // Persist to seekers or companies store (for profile data)
  69  if (role === 'seeker') {
  70    const seekers = getSeekers();
  71    seekers.push({
  72      id: userId,
  73      name: data.name,
  74      email: key,
  75      location: '',
  76      skills: [],
  77      profileStrength: 30,
  78      resumeFiles: [],
  79    });
  80    setSeekers(seekers);
  81  } else if (role === 'employer') {
  82    const companies = getCompanies();
  83    companies.push({
  84      id: userId,
  85      name: data.name,
  86      industry: '',
  87      size: '',
  88      location: '',
  89      verifiedStatus: 'Pending',
  90      website: '',
  91      about: '',
  92      logo: null,
  93      proofUrl: null,
  94      contacts: { email: key, phone: '' },
  95      registrationDate: new Date().toISOString(),
  96    });
  97    setCompanies(companies);
  98  }
  99
 100  const user = { id: userId, email: key, name: data.name, role };
 101  setCurrentUser(user);
 102  return { ok: true, user };
 103}
 104
 105export function isAuthenticated() {
 106  return !!getCurrentUser();
 107}
 108
 109export function requireRole(role) {
 110  const user = getCurrentUser();
 111  if (!user) return false;
 112  if (Array.isArray(role)) return role.includes(user.role);
 113  return user.role === role;
 114}
 115
 116export function getRedirectAfterLogin(user) {
 117  switch (user.role) {
 118    case 'seeker': return '/seeker/dashboard.html';
 119    case 'employer': return '/employer/dashboard.html';
 120    case 'admin': return '/admin/dashboard.html';
 121    default: return '/index.html';
 122  }
 123}
 124
assets/js/data.seed.js · 206 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Sample Data Seed
   3 */
   4
   5import { set, get, STORAGE_KEYS } from './store.js';
   6
   7const CITIES = ['Manila', 'Cebu City', 'Davao', 'Iloilo', 'Baguio', 'Cagayan de Oro', 'Bacolod', 'General Santos', 'Makati', 'Quezon City', 'Pasig', 'Taguig'];
   8const JOB_TYPES = ['Full-time', 'Part-time', 'Contract', 'Freelance', 'Internship'];
   9const SETUPS = ['Remote', 'Hybrid', 'On-site'];
  10const INDUSTRIES = ['Technology', 'Healthcare', 'Education', 'Retail', 'Manufacturing', 'Finance', 'Hospitality', 'Construction', 'Household'];
  11const EXPERIENCE = ['Entry level', '1-2 years', '3-5 years', '5+ years'];
  12
  13function rand(arr) {
  14  return arr[Math.floor(Math.random() * arr.length)];
  15}
  16
  17function id() {
  18  return 'id' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 11);
  19}
  20
  21function daysAgo(d) {
  22  const d2 = new Date();
  23  d2.setDate(d2.getDate() - d);
  24  return d2.toISOString();
  25}
  26
  27export function seedCompanies() {
  28  const names = [
  29    'XYZ Enterprises', 'Home Helper Services', 'ABC Corp', 'TechFlow Solutions',
  30    'Manila Care Inc', 'Cebu Digital Labs', 'Davao Build Co', 'Iloilo Education Hub',
  31    'Baguio Health Center', 'Sunrise Retail PH'
  32  ];
  33  return names.map((name, i) => ({
  34    id: 'c' + (i + 1),
  35    name,
  36    industry: rand(INDUSTRIES),
  37    size: rand(['1-10', '11-50', '51-200', '201-500']),
  38    location: rand(CITIES),
  39    verifiedStatus: i < 6 ? 'Verified' : i < 8 ? 'Pending' : 'Rejected',
  40    website: `https://${name.toLowerCase().replace(/\s/g, '')}.ph`,
  41    about: `${name} is a leading company in ${rand(INDUSTRIES)} serving the Philippines. We are committed to providing quality employment opportunities.`,
  42    logo: null,
  43    proofUrl: i < 3 ? '/assets/img/placeholders/proof.pdf' : null,
  44    contacts: { email: `contact@${name.toLowerCase().replace(/\s/g, '')}.ph`, phone: '+63 2 1234 5678' },
  45    registrationDate: daysAgo(30 + i * 5),
  46  }));
  47}
  48
  49export function seedJobs(companies) {
  50  const titles = [
  51    'Software Developer', 'Customer Service Representative', 'Marketing Specialist', 'Data Analyst',
  52    'Sales Associate', 'Admin Assistant', 'Graphic Designer', 'HR Officer', 'Accountant',
  53    'Nurse', 'Teacher', 'Driver', 'Cleaner', 'Cashier', 'Roofer', 'Electrician',
  54    'Content Writer', 'SEO Specialist', 'Project Manager', 'Quality Assurance Tester'
  55  ];
  56  const jobs = [];
  57  for (let i = 0; i < 24; i++) {
  58    const co = companies[i % companies.length];
  59    jobs.push({
  60      id: 'j' + (i + 1),
  61      title: titles[i % titles.length],
  62      companyId: co.id,
  63      location: rand(CITIES),
  64      type: rand(JOB_TYPES),
  65      setup: rand(SETUPS),
  66      salaryMin: 15000 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 30000),
  67      salaryMax: 25000 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 50000),
  68      experience: rand(EXPERIENCE),
  69      postedAt: daysAgo(Math.floor(Math.random() * 30)),
  70      tags: ['PHP', 'JavaScript', 'Communication', 'Teamwork'].slice(0, 2 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2)),
  71      description: 'We are looking for a motivated professional to join our team. You will be responsible for key deliverables and collaborating with stakeholders.',
  72      requirements: 'Bachelor\'s degree or equivalent experience. Strong communication skills. Willing to work in ' + rand(CITIES) + '.',
  73      benefits: 'HMO, 13th month pay, Performance bonus',
  74      status: i < 18 ? 'Active' : i < 21 ? 'Pending' : 'Closed',
  75      flaggedReasons: i === 5 ? ['Suspicious salary'] : [],
  76    });
  77  }
  78  return jobs;
  79}
  80
  81export function seedSeekers() {
  82  const names = ['Juan Dela Cruz', 'Maria Santos', 'Pedro Reyes', 'Ana Garcia', 'Jose Martinez', 'Liza Fernandez', 'Carlos Lopez', 'Rosa Tan'];
  83  return names.map((n, i) => ({
  84    id: 's' + (i + 1),
  85    name: n,
  86    email: `seeker${i + 1}@demo.com`,
  87    location: rand(CITIES),
  88    skills: ['Communication', 'Microsoft Office', 'Problem Solving'].slice(0, 2),
  89    profileStrength: 60 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 35),
  90    resumeFiles: [],
  91  }));
  92}
  93
  94export function seedApplications(jobs, seekers) {
  95  const statuses = ['Submitted', 'Reviewed', 'Interview', 'Rejected', 'Hired'];
  96  const apps = [];
  97  for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
  98    const job = jobs[i % jobs.length];
  99    const seeker = seekers[i % seekers.length];
 100    const status = statuses[i % statuses.length];
 101    const appliedAt = daysAgo(15 - i);
 102    const timeline = [
 103      { at: appliedAt, event: 'Applied', note: 'Application submitted' },
 104    ];
 105    if (['Reviewed', 'Interview', 'Hired'].includes(status)) {
 106      timeline.push({ at: daysAgo(14 - i), event: 'Reviewed', note: 'Profile under review' });
 107    }
 108    if (['Interview', 'Hired'].includes(status)) {
 109      timeline.push({ at: daysAgo(10 - i), event: 'Interview', note: 'Scheduled for interview' });
 110    }
 111    if (status === 'Hired') {
 112      timeline.push({ at: daysAgo(7 - i), event: 'Hired', note: 'Offer accepted' });
 113    }
 114    if (status === 'Rejected') {
 115      timeline.push({ at: daysAgo(12 - i), event: 'Rejected', note: 'Position filled' });
 116    }
 117    apps.push({
 118      id: 'a' + (i + 1),
 119      jobId: job.id,
 120      seekerId: seeker.id,
 121      appliedAt,
 122      status,
 123      timeline,
 124      notes: '',
 125    });
 126  }
 127  return apps;
 128}
 129
 130export function seedReports() {
 131  const types = ['Job', 'User', 'Company'];
 132  const reasons = ['Scam', 'Inappropriate content', 'Fake listing', 'Harassment', 'Spam'];
 133  const severities = ['Low', 'Medium', 'High'];
 134  const statuses = ['Open', 'Under Review', 'Resolved'];
 135  const reports = [];
 136  for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
 137    reports.push({
 138      id: 'r' + (i + 1),
 139      type: types[i % types.length],
 140      targetId: 'j' + (i + 1),
 141      reason: reasons[i % reasons.length],
 142      severity: severities[i % severities.length],
 143      status: statuses[i % statuses.length],
 144      createdAt: daysAgo(10 - i),
 145      reporterId: 's' + (i % 4 + 1),
 146      resolutionNote: i >= 5 ? 'Resolved after investigation' : null,
 147    });
 148  }
 149  return reports;
 150}
 151
 152export function seedAuditLogs() {
 153  const actions = ['Approved job', 'Rejected job', 'Verified employer', 'Rejected employer', 'Suspended user', 'Updated category'];
 154  const logs = [];
 155  for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
 156    logs.push({
 157      id: 'al' + (i + 1),
 158      actor: 'admin@workbridge.ph',
 159      action: actions[i % actions.length],
 160      target: 'j' + (i % 5 + 1),
 161      timestamp: daysAgo(20 - i),
 162    });
 163  }
 164  return logs;
 165}
 166
 167export function seedCategories() {
 168  return [
 169    { id: 'cat1', name: 'Technology', slug: 'technology', count: 8 },
 170    { id: 'cat2', name: 'Healthcare', slug: 'healthcare', count: 4 },
 171    { id: 'cat3', name: 'Education', slug: 'education', count: 3 },
 172    { id: 'cat4', name: 'Retail', slug: 'retail', count: 5 },
 173    { id: 'cat5', name: 'Finance', slug: 'finance', count: 2 },
 174    { id: 'cat6', name: 'Hospitality', slug: 'hospitality', count: 4 },
 175    { id: 'cat7', name: 'Construction', slug: 'construction', count: 3 },
 176  ];
 177}
 178
 179export function runSeed() {
 180  if (get(STORAGE_KEYS.SEEDED)) return;
 181  const companies = seedCompanies();
 182  const jobs = seedJobs(companies);
 183  const seekers = seedSeekers();
 184  const applications = seedApplications(jobs, seekers);
 185  const reports = seedReports();
 186  const auditLogs = seedAuditLogs();
 187  const categories = seedCategories();
 188
 189  set(STORAGE_KEYS.COMPANIES, companies);
 190  set(STORAGE_KEYS.JOBS, jobs);
 191  set(STORAGE_KEYS.SEEKERS, seekers);
 192  set(STORAGE_KEYS.APPLICATIONS, applications);
 193  set(STORAGE_KEYS.REPORTS, reports);
 194  set(STORAGE_KEYS.AUDIT_LOGS, auditLogs);
 195  set(STORAGE_KEYS.CATEGORIES, categories);
 196
 197  // Seed resumes for demo seekers so they can apply for jobs
 198  const resumes = {};
 199  seekers.forEach(s => {
 200    resumes[s.id] = [{ name: s.name.replace(/\s/g, '_') + '_Resume.pdf', date: daysAgo(10) }];
 201  });
 202  set(STORAGE_KEYS.RESUMES, resumes);
 203
 204  set(STORAGE_KEYS.SEEDED, true);
 205}
 206
assets/js/employer-manage.js · 77 lines
   1import { renderLayout } from './layout.js';
   2import { apiMyJobs, apiDeleteJob } from './api.js';
   3import { toastSuccess, toastError } from './ui.toast.js';
   4import { esc, skeletonTableRows } from './utils.js';
   5
   6renderLayout('employer', 'Manage Jobs');
   7
   8let allJobs     = [];
   9let statusFilter = '';
  10
  11function render() {
  12  const jobs = statusFilter
  13    ? allJobs.filter(j => j.status === statusFilter)
  14    : allJobs;
  15
  16  document.querySelectorAll('.chip').forEach(chip => {
  17    chip.classList.toggle('active', chip.dataset.status === statusFilter);
  18    chip.onclick = () => { statusFilter = chip.dataset.status; render(); };
  19  });
  20
  21  const tbody = document.getElementById('jobs-tbody');
  22
  23  if (!jobs.length) {
  24    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="5" class="text-secondary text-center py-3">' +
  25      (statusFilter ? 'No jobs with this status.' : 'No jobs posted yet.') + '</td></tr>';
  26    return;
  27  }
  28
  29  tbody.innerHTML = jobs.map(j => {
  30    const badgeCls = j.status === 'Open'   ? 'verified'
  31                   : j.status === 'Draft'  ? 'pending'
  32                   : 'rejected';
  33    const posted = j.created_at ? new Date(j.created_at).toLocaleDateString() : '—';
  34    return `<tr>
  35      <td><a href="../job-detail.html?id=${esc(String(j.id))}" class="text-dark">${esc(j.title)}</a></td>
  36      <td>${esc(j.location)}</td>
  37      <td><span class="badge badge-${badgeCls}">${esc(j.status)}</span></td>
  38      <td>${posted}</td>
  39      <td style="white-space:nowrap">
  40        <a href="job-edit.html?id=${esc(String(j.id))}" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm">Edit</a>
  41        <a href="../job-detail.html?id=${esc(String(j.id))}" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm">View</a>
  42        <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm delete-job" data-id="${esc(String(j.id))}"
  43          style="color:var(--color-error)">Delete</button>
  44      </td>
  45    </tr>`;
  46  }).join('');
  47
  48  tbody.querySelectorAll('.delete-job').forEach(btn => {
  49    btn.onclick = async () => {
  50      if (!confirm('Delete this job posting? This cannot be undone.')) return;
  51      btn.disabled = true;
  52      try {
  53        await apiDeleteJob(btn.dataset.id);
  54        toastSuccess('Job deleted');
  55        allJobs = allJobs.filter(j => String(j.id) !== btn.dataset.id);
  56        render();
  57      } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); btn.disabled = false; }
  58    };
  59  });
  60}
  61
  62async function loadJobs() {
  63  try {
  64    const jobs = await apiMyJobs();
  65    allJobs = jobs.data || jobs;
  66    render();
  67  } catch (err) {
  68    document.getElementById('jobs-tbody').innerHTML =
  69      `<tr><td colspan="5" class="text-danger">${esc(err.message)}</td></tr>`;
  70  }
  71}
  72
  73// Initial loading state
  74document.getElementById('jobs-tbody').innerHTML =
  75  skeletonTableRows(5, 5);
  76loadJobs();
  77
assets/js/employer.module.js · 29 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Employer module (API-backed)
   3 */
   4
   5import { apiMyJobs, apiJobApplications } from './api.js';
   6
   7export async function getEmployerJobs() {
   8    const res = await apiMyJobs();
   9    return (res.data || res).map(j => ({
  10        id: j.id,
  11        title: j.title,
  12        location: j.location,
  13        type: j.type,
  14        status: j.status,
  15        salaryMin: parseFloat(j.salary_min) || 0,
  16        salaryMax: parseFloat(j.salary_max) || 0,
  17        applicationsCount: j.applications_count || 0,
  18        postedAt: j.created_at,
  19        deadline: j.deadline,
  20        tags: (j.tags || []).map(t => t.tag || t),
  21    }));
  22}
  23
  24export async function getApplicantCounts() {
  25    const jobs = await getEmployerJobs();
  26    const total = jobs.reduce((sum, j) => sum + j.applicationsCount, 0);
  27    return { total, jobCount: jobs.length };
  28}
  29
assets/js/jobs.module.js · 89 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Jobs module (API-backed)
   3 */
   4
   5import { apiGetJobs, apiGetJob, apiGetCompany, apiGetCompanies } from './api.js';
   6import { buildQueryString } from './router.js';
   7
   8// Normalize API job object to match legacy field names used in templates
   9function normalizeJob(j) {
  10    return {
  11        id: j.id,
  12        title: j.title,
  13        description: j.description,
  14        requirements: j.requirements,
  15        location: j.location,
  16        type: j.type,
  17        setup: j.setup || 'On-site',
  18        experienceLevel: j.experience_level,
  19        salaryMin: parseFloat(j.salary_min) || 0,
  20        salaryMax: parseFloat(j.salary_max) || 0,
  21        slots: j.slots,
  22        deadline: j.deadline,
  23        status: j.status === 'Open' ? 'Active' : j.status,
  24        tags: (j.tags || []).map(t => t.tag || t),
  25        categoryId: j.category_id,
  26        companyId: j.company_id,
  27        company: j.company ? normalizeCompany(j.company) : null,
  28        postedAt: j.created_at,
  29    };
  30}
  31
  32function normalizeCompany(c) {
  33    return {
  34        id: c.id,
  35        name: c.name,
  36        slug: c.slug,
  37        industry: c.industry,
  38        size: c.size,
  39        location: c.city ? `${c.city}, ${c.province}` : (c.location || ''),
  40        city: c.city,
  41        province: c.province,
  42        website: c.website,
  43        about: c.description,
  44        description: c.description,
  45        logo: c.logo || null,
  46        verifiedStatus: c.verified_status,
  47        foundedYear: c.founded_year,
  48    };
  49}
  50
  51export async function getJobsWithCompanies(filters = {}) {
  52    const params = {};
  53    if (filters.keyword)  params.search = filters.keyword;
  54    if (filters.location) params.location = filters.location;
  55    if (filters.type)     params.type = filters.type;
  56    if (filters.experience) params.experience_level = filters.experience;
  57    if (filters.category) params.category_id = filters.category;
  58    if (filters.page)     params.page = filters.page;
  59
  60    const res = await apiGetJobs(params);
  61    let jobs = (res.data || res).map(normalizeJob);
  62
  63    if (filters.sort === 'salary')  jobs.sort((a, b) => b.salaryMax - a.salaryMax);
  64    if (filters.sort === 'newest')  jobs.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.postedAt) - new Date(a.postedAt));
  65
  66    return { jobs, total: res.total || jobs.length, lastPage: res.last_page || 1, currentPage: res.current_page || 1 };
  67}
  68
  69export async function getJobById(id) {
  70    const j = await apiGetJob(id);
  71    return normalizeJob(j);
  72}
  73
  74export async function getCompanyById(id) {
  75    const c = await apiGetCompany(id);
  76    const company = normalizeCompany(c);
  77    company.openJobs = (c.job_listings || []).map(normalizeJob);
  78    return company;
  79}
  80
  81export async function getCompaniesForBrowse(params = {}) {
  82    const res = await apiGetCompanies(params);
  83    return { companies: (res.data || res).map(normalizeCompany), total: res.total || 0, lastPage: res.last_page || 1 };
  84}
  85
  86export function jobsPageUrl(filters) {
  87    return '/jobs.html' + buildQueryString(filters);
  88}
  89
assets/js/layout.js · 159 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Shared layout (sidebar + topbar)
   3 */
   4
   5import { getCurrentUser } from './store.js';
   6import { apiLogout } from './api.js';
   7import { getActiveNav } from './router.js';
   8
   9const SEEKER_NAV = [
  10  { path: 'dashboard.html', label: 'Dashboard', icon: 'bi-grid' },
  11  { path: 'jobs.html', label: 'Jobs', icon: 'bi-briefcase' },
  12  { path: 'saved-jobs.html', label: 'Saved Jobs', icon: 'bi-bookmark' },
  13  { path: 'applications.html', label: 'Applications', icon: 'bi-file-earmark-text' },
  14  { path: 'profile.html', label: 'Profile', icon: 'bi-person' },
  15  { path: 'resume.html', label: 'Resume', icon: 'bi-file-text' },
  16  { path: 'notifications.html', label: 'Notifications', icon: 'bi-bell' },
  17  { path: 'messages.html', label: 'Messages', icon: 'bi-chat' },
  18  { path: 'settings.html', label: 'Settings', icon: 'bi-gear' },
  19];
  20
  21const EMPLOYER_NAV = [
  22  { path: 'dashboard.html', label: 'Dashboard', icon: 'bi-grid' },
  23  { path: 'post-job.html', label: 'Post Job', icon: 'bi-plus-circle' },
  24  { path: 'manage-jobs.html', label: 'Manage Jobs', icon: 'bi-briefcase' },
  25  { path: 'applicants.html', label: 'Applicants', icon: 'bi-people' },
  26  { path: 'company-profile.html', label: 'Company', icon: 'bi-building' },
  27  { path: 'verification.html', label: 'Verification', icon: 'bi-patch-check' },
  28  { path: 'messages.html', label: 'Messages', icon: 'bi-chat' },
  29  { path: 'settings.html', label: 'Settings', icon: 'bi-gear' },
  30];
  31
  32const ADMIN_NAV = [
  33  { path: 'dashboard.html', label: 'Dashboard', icon: 'bi-grid' },
  34  { path: 'employer-verification.html', label: 'Employer Verification', icon: 'bi-patch-check' },
  35  { path: 'job-moderation.html', label: 'Job Moderation', icon: 'bi-shield-check' },
  36  { path: 'reports.html', label: 'Reports', icon: 'bi-flag' },
  37  { path: 'users.html', label: 'Users', icon: 'bi-people' },
  38  { path: 'analytics.html', label: 'Analytics', icon: 'bi-graph-up' },
  39  { path: 'categories.html', label: 'Categories', icon: 'bi-tags' },
  40  { path: 'audit-logs.html', label: 'Audit Logs', icon: 'bi-journal-text' },
  41];
  42
  43export function renderLayout(role, title) {
  44  const user = getCurrentUser();
  45  if (!user) return;
  46
  47  const nav = role === 'seeker' ? SEEKER_NAV : role === 'employer' ? EMPLOYER_NAV : ADMIN_NAV;
  48  const active = getActiveNav();
  49
  50  // Path resolution: if we're inside /seeker/, /employer/, or /admin/, links are relative.
  51  // Otherwise (root-level pages like job-detail.html), prefix with role folder.
  52  const path = window.location.pathname.replace(/\\/g, '/');
  53  const insideRoleFolder = /\/(seeker|employer|admin)\//.test(path);
  54  const navPrefix    = insideRoleFolder ? '' : `${role}/`;
  55  const loginPrefix  = insideRoleFolder ? '../auth/' : 'auth/';
  56
  57  const sidebarHtml = `
  58    <div class="drawer-overlay" id="drawer-overlay"></div>
  59    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar-drawer">
  60      <div class="sidebar-logo"><a href="${navPrefix}dashboard.html" class="text-white text-decoration-none">WorkBridge PH</a></div>
  61      <button type="button" class="sidebar-close btn btn-ghost btn-sm" id="drawer-close" aria-label="Close drawer"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i></button>
  62      <ul class="sidebar-nav">
  63        ${nav.map(n => `
  64          <li><a href="${navPrefix}${n.path}" class="${(n.path.replace('.html','') === active || (active === 'dashboard' && n.path === 'dashboard.html')) ? 'active' : ''}">
  65            <i class="bi ${n.icon}"></i> ${n.label}
  66          </a></li>
  67        `).join('')}
  68      </ul>
  69    </aside>
  70    <div class="topbar">
  71      <button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm drawer-toggle" id="drawer-toggle" aria-label="Open navigation menu"><i class="bi bi-list"></i></button>
  72      <span class="topbar-title">${title || 'Dashboard'}</span>
  73      <div class="topbar-actions">
  74        <div class="dropdown">
  75          <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" data-dropdown="user-menu">
  76            <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i> ${user.name || user.email}
  77          </button>
  78          <div id="user-menu" class="dropdown-menu">
  79            <a href="${navPrefix}settings.html" class="dropdown-item">Settings</a>
  80            <a href="${loginPrefix}login.html" class="dropdown-item" id="logout-btn">Log out</a>
  81          </div>
  82        </div>
  83      </div>
  84    </div>
  85  `;
  86
  87  let container = document.getElementById('app-layout');
  88  if (!container) {
  89    container = document.createElement('div');
  90    container.id = 'app-layout';
  91    container.className = 'app-layout';
  92    const main = document.querySelector('main');
  93    const content = document.querySelector('.app-content, [data-main]');
  94    if (main) {
  95      main.classList.add('app-main');
  96      if (!content) {
  97        const div = document.createElement('div');
  98        div.className = 'app-content';
  99        while (main.firstChild) div.appendChild(main.firstChild);
 100        main.appendChild(div);
 101      }
 102      container.appendChild(main);
 103    }
 104    document.body.insertBefore(container, document.body.firstChild);
 105  }
 106
 107  const existingSidebar = container.querySelector('.sidebar');
 108  if (!existingSidebar) {
 109    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
 110    wrap.innerHTML = sidebarHtml;
 111    while (wrap.firstChild) container.insertBefore(wrap.firstChild, container.firstChild);
 112  }
 113
 114  document.getElementById('logout-btn')?.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {
 115    e.preventDefault();
 116    await apiLogout().catch(() => {});
 117    window.location.href = `${loginPrefix}login.html`;
 118  });
 119
 120  document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu').forEach(m => m.classList.remove('show'));
 121  container.querySelectorAll('[data-dropdown]').forEach(btn => {
 122    const menuId = btn.dataset.dropdown;
 123    const menu = document.getElementById(menuId);
 124    if (!menu || btn.dataset.dropdownInit) return;
 125    btn.dataset.dropdownInit = '1';
 126    btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
 127      e.stopPropagation();
 128      document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.show').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('show'));
 129      menu.classList.toggle('show');
 130    });
 131  });
 132  document.addEventListener('click', () => container.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.show').forEach(m => m.classList.remove('show')));
 133
 134  /* Drawer toggle */
 135  const sidebar = container.querySelector('.sidebar');
 136  const overlay = container.querySelector('#drawer-overlay');
 137  const toggle = container.querySelector('#drawer-toggle');
 138  const closeBtn = container.querySelector('#drawer-close');
 139
 140  function openDrawer() {
 141    sidebar?.classList.add('open');
 142    overlay?.classList.add('active');
 143    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
 144  }
 145  function closeDrawer() {
 146    sidebar?.classList.remove('open');
 147    overlay?.classList.remove('active');
 148    document.body.style.overflow = '';
 149  }
 150
 151  toggle?.addEventListener('click', openDrawer);
 152  closeBtn?.addEventListener('click', closeDrawer);
 153  overlay?.addEventListener('click', closeDrawer);
 154  sidebar?.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => a.addEventListener('click', closeDrawer));
 155
 156  /* Remove loading state - show page only after layout is ready */
 157  document.body.classList.remove('wb-loading');
 158}
 159
assets/js/router.js · 86 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Client-side Router & Guards
   3 */
   4
   5import { getCurrentUser } from './store.js';
   6import { toastError } from './ui.toast.js';
   7
   8const ROLE_PATHS = {
   9  admin: /^\/admin\//,
  10  employer: /^\/employer\//,
  11  seeker: /^\/seeker\//,
  12};
  13
  14export function getQueryParams() {
  15  // `serve` with clean URLs can redirect `page.html?id=x` → `/page` and drop `?id=` (see serve.json).
  16  // Fallback: fragment `#id=x` is preserved in the browser.
  17  const search = window.location.search;
  18  const fromHash =
  19    !search && window.location.hash && window.location.hash.length > 1
  20      ? window.location.hash.slice(1)
  21      : '';
  22  const p = new URLSearchParams(search || fromHash || '');
  23  const obj = {};
  24  p.forEach((v, k) => {
  25    obj[k] = v;
  26  });
  27  return obj;
  28}
  29
  30export function setQueryParams(params) {
  31  const u = new URL(window.location);
  32  Object.entries(params).forEach(([k, v]) => {
  33    if (v === null || v === '') u.searchParams.delete(k);
  34    else u.searchParams.set(k, v);
  35  });
  36  window.history.replaceState({}, '', u);
  37}
  38
  39export function buildQueryString(params) {
  40  const p = new URLSearchParams();
  41  Object.entries(params).forEach(([k, v]) => {
  42    if (v != null && v !== '') p.set(k, v);
  43  });
  44  const s = p.toString();
  45  return s ? '?' + s : '';
  46}
  47
  48export function checkRouteGuard() {
  49  const path = (window.location.pathname || window.location.href || '').replace(/\\/g, '/');
  50  const user = getCurrentUser();
  51
  52  const isAdmin = path.includes('/admin/') || path.includes('admin\\');
  53  const isEmployer = path.includes('/employer/') || path.includes('employer\\');
  54  const isSeeker = path.includes('/seeker/') || path.includes('seeker\\');
  55
  56  if (isAdmin || isEmployer || isSeeker) {
  57    const role = isAdmin ? 'admin' : isEmployer ? 'employer' : 'seeker';
  58    if (!user) {
  59      toastError('Please log in to access this page.');
  60      const authPath = path.startsWith('/') ? '/auth/login.html' : '../auth/login.html';
  61      window.location.href = authPath + '?redirect=' + encodeURIComponent(window.location.href);
  62      return false;
  63    }
  64    if (user.role !== role) {
  65      toastError('You do not have permission to access this page.');
  66      const authPath = path.startsWith('/') ? '/auth/login.html' : '../auth/login.html';
  67      window.location.href = authPath;
  68      return false;
  69    }
  70  }
  71  return true;
  72}
  73
  74export function getActiveNav(path) {
  75  const p = path || window.location.pathname;
  76  if (p.includes('/employer-verification') || p.includes('/verification-detail')) return 'employer-verification';
  77  if (p.includes('/job-moderation') || p.includes('/job-review')) return 'job-moderation';
  78  if (p.includes('/reports') || p.includes('/report-detail')) return 'reports';
  79  if (p.includes('/users') || p.includes('/user-detail')) return 'users';
  80  if (p.includes('/analytics')) return 'analytics';
  81  if (p.includes('/categories')) return 'categories';
  82  if (p.includes('/audit-logs')) return 'audit-logs';
  83  const m = p.match(/\/(seeker|employer|admin)\/([^/]+)/);
  84  return m ? m[2].replace('.html', '') : '';
  85}
  86
assets/js/seeker-jobs.js · 138 lines
   1import { renderLayout } from './layout.js';
   2import { getJobsWithCompanies } from './jobs.module.js';
   3import { getQueryParams, buildQueryString } from './router.js';
   4import { apiSavedJobs, apiSaveJob, apiUnsaveJob, apiMyApplications } from './api.js';
   5import { toastSuccess, toastError } from './ui.toast.js';
   6import { esc, formatSalaryRange, companyAvatar, verifiedBadge, emptyState, skeletonJobCards } from './utils.js';
   7
   8renderLayout('seeker', 'Jobs');
   9
  10let savedIds    = new Set();
  11let appliedIds  = new Set();
  12let lastPage    = 1;
  13let currentPage = 1;
  14
  15async function init() {
  16  try {
  17    const [savedRes, appsRes] = await Promise.allSettled([apiSavedJobs(), apiMyApplications()]);
  18    if (savedRes.status === 'fulfilled') {
  19      (savedRes.value.data || savedRes.value).forEach(j => savedIds.add(String(j.job_listing_id ?? j.id)));
  20    }
  21    if (appsRes.status === 'fulfilled') {
  22      (appsRes.value.data || appsRes.value).forEach(a => appliedIds.add(String(a.job_listing_id)));
  23    }
  24  } catch (_) { /* non-critical */ }
  25  render();
  26}
  27
  28async function render() {
  29  const params = getQueryParams();
  30  const page   = parseInt(params.page) || 1;
  31
  32  const grid = document.getElementById('jobs-list');
  33  grid.innerHTML = skeletonJobCards(6);
  34
  35  try {
  36    const { jobs, lastPage: lp } = await getJobsWithCompanies({ ...params, page });
  37    lastPage    = lp;
  38    currentPage = page;
  39
  40    if (!jobs.length) {
  41      grid.innerHTML = emptyState({
  42        icon: 'search',
  43        title: 'No jobs match your filters',
  44        subtitle: 'Try removing some filters or searching for different keywords.',
  45      });
  46      document.getElementById('pagination').innerHTML = '';
  47      return;
  48    }
  49
  50    const ids = ['keyword', 'location', 'type', 'setup', 'sort'];
  51    ids.forEach(k => { const e = document.getElementById('f-' + k); if (e) e.value = params[k] || ''; });
  52
  53    grid.innerHTML = jobs.map(j => {
  54      const applied     = appliedIds.has(String(j.id));
  55      const isSaved     = savedIds.has(String(j.id));
  56      const savedIcon   = isSaved ? 'bookmark-fill' : 'bookmark';
  57      return `<div class="card card-lift">
  58        <div class="card-body">
  59          <div class="d-flex justify-content-between gap-2 mb-2">
  60            <div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-start" style="min-width:0;flex:1">
  61              ${companyAvatar(j.company, 40)}
  62              <div style="min-width:0">
  63                <a href="../job-detail.html?id=${esc(String(j.id))}" class="text-dark text-decoration-none">
  64                  <h4 class="card-title mb-0">${esc(j.title)}</h4>
  65                </a>
  66                <p class="text-secondary small mb-0">${esc(j.company?.name || '—')}${verifiedBadge(j.company)} · ${esc(j.location || '—')}</p>
  67              </div>
  68            </div>
  69            <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm save-job flex-shrink-0" data-id="${esc(String(j.id))}" data-saved="${isSaved}">
  70              <i class="bi bi-${savedIcon}"></i>
  71            </button>
  72          </div>
  73          <p class="text-primary fw-bold mb-2">${formatSalaryRange(j.salaryMin, j.salaryMax)}</p>
  74          <a href="../job-detail.html?id=${esc(String(j.id))}" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm${applied ? ' disabled' : ''}">
  75            ${applied ? 'Applied' : 'Apply'}
  76          </a>
  77        </div>
  78      </div>`;
  79    }).join('');
  80
  81    grid.querySelectorAll('.save-job').forEach(btn => {
  82      btn.onclick = async () => {
  83        const id      = btn.dataset.id;
  84        const isSaved = btn.dataset.saved === 'true';
  85        btn.disabled  = true;
  86        try {
  87          if (isSaved) {
  88            await apiUnsaveJob(id);
  89            savedIds.delete(id);
  90            toastSuccess('Removed from saved');
  91          } else {
  92            await apiSaveJob(id);
  93            savedIds.add(id);
  94            toastSuccess('Job saved');
  95          }
  96          render();
  97        } catch (err) {
  98          toastError(err.message);
  99          btn.disabled = false;
 100        }
 101      };
 102    });
 103
 104    renderPagination(params);
 105  } catch (err) {
 106    grid.innerHTML = `<p class="text-danger">${esc(err.message)}</p>`;
 107  }
 108}
 109
 110function renderPagination(params) {
 111  const pag = document.getElementById('pagination');
 112  if (lastPage <= 1) { pag.innerHTML = ''; return; }
 113  let html = '';
 114  for (let i = 1; i <= lastPage; i++) {
 115    html += `<button class="${i === currentPage ? 'active' : ''}" data-page="${i}">${i}</button>`;
 116  }
 117  pag.innerHTML = html;
 118  pag.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => {
 119    b.onclick = () => {
 120      window.location.search = buildQueryString({ ...params, page: b.dataset.page });
 121    };
 122  });
 123}
 124
 125document.getElementById('filter-form').onsubmit = e => {
 126  e.preventDefault();
 127  const p = {
 128    keyword:  document.getElementById('f-keyword').value,
 129    location: document.getElementById('f-location').value,
 130    type:     document.getElementById('f-type').value,
 131    setup:    document.getElementById('f-setup').value,
 132    sort:     document.getElementById('f-sort').value,
 133  };
 134  window.location.href = 'jobs.html' + buildQueryString(p);
 135};
 136
 137init();
 138
assets/js/seeker.module.js · 53 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Seeker module (API-backed)
   3 */
   4
   5import { apiGetJobs, apiMyApplications, apiSeekerProfile } from './api.js';
   6
   7function normalizeJob(j) {
   8    return {
   9        id: j.id,
  10        title: j.title,
  11        description: j.description,
  12        location: j.location,
  13        type: j.type,
  14        salaryMin: parseFloat(j.salary_min) || 0,
  15        salaryMax: parseFloat(j.salary_max) || 0,
  16        status: j.status === 'Open' ? 'Active' : j.status,
  17        tags: (j.tags || []).map(t => t.tag || t),
  18        companyId: j.company_id,
  19        company: j.company ? { id: j.company.id, name: j.company.name, logo: j.company.logo } : null,
  20        postedAt: j.created_at,
  21    };
  22}
  23
  24export async function getRecommendedJobs(limit = 6) {
  25    const res = await apiGetJobs({});
  26    return (res.data || res).slice(0, limit).map(normalizeJob);
  27}
  28
  29export async function getMyApplications() {
  30    const res = await apiMyApplications();
  31    return (res.data || res).map(a => ({
  32        id: a.id,
  33        jobId: a.job_listing_id,
  34        status: a.status,
  35        skillFit: a.skill_fit,
  36        appliedAt: a.created_at,
  37        job: a.job_listing ? normalizeJob(a.job_listing) : null,
  38        timeline: a.timelines || [],
  39    }));
  40}
  41
  42export async function getSeekerStats() {
  43    const [apps, profile] = await Promise.allSettled([apiMyApplications(), apiSeekerProfile()]);
  44    const appList = apps.status === 'fulfilled' ? (apps.value.data || apps.value) : [];
  45    const byStatus = { Pending: 0, Reviewing: 0, Interview: 0, Hired: 0, Rejected: 0 };
  46    appList.forEach(a => { byStatus[a.status] = (byStatus[a.status] || 0) + 1; });
  47    return {
  48        totalApplications: appList.length,
  49        profileStrength: profile.status === 'fulfilled' ? (profile.value.profile_strength || 0) : 0,
  50        byStatus,
  51    };
  52}
  53
assets/js/store.js · 175 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Local Storage Store
   3 * Simulates backend with localStorage
   4 */
   5
   6const STORAGE_KEYS = {
   7  JOBS: 'workbridge_jobs',
   8  COMPANIES: 'workbridge_companies',
   9  SEEKERS: 'workbridge_seekers',
  10  APPLICATIONS: 'workbridge_applications',
  11  REPORTS: 'workbridge_reports',
  12  AUDIT_LOGS: 'workbridge_audit_logs',
  13  CATEGORIES: 'workbridge_categories',
  14  SAVED_JOBS: 'workbridge_saved_jobs',
  15  USER: 'workbridge_user',
  16  NOTIFICATIONS: 'workbridge_notifications',
  17  MESSAGES: 'workbridge_messages',
  18  NOTES: 'workbridge_notes',
  19  RESUMES: 'workbridge_resumes',
  20  THEME: 'workbridge_theme',
  21  SEEDED: 'workbridge_seeded',
  22};
  23
  24export function get(key, def = null) {
  25  try {
  26    const v = localStorage.getItem(key);
  27    return v ? JSON.parse(v) : def;
  28  } catch {
  29    return def;
  30  }
  31}
  32
  33export function set(key, value) {
  34  try {
  35    localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));
  36    return true;
  37  } catch {
  38    return false;
  39  }
  40}
  41
  42export function getJobs() {
  43  return get(STORAGE_KEYS.JOBS, []);
  44}
  45
  46export function setJobs(jobs) {
  47  set(STORAGE_KEYS.JOBS, jobs);
  48}
  49
  50export function getCompanies() {
  51  return get(STORAGE_KEYS.COMPANIES, []);
  52}
  53
  54export function setCompanies(companies) {
  55  set(STORAGE_KEYS.COMPANIES, companies);
  56}
  57
  58export function getSeekers() {
  59  return get(STORAGE_KEYS.SEEKERS, []);
  60}
  61
  62export function getApplications() {
  63  return get(STORAGE_KEYS.APPLICATIONS, []);
  64}
  65
  66export function setApplications(apps) {
  67  set(STORAGE_KEYS.APPLICATIONS, apps);
  68}
  69
  70export function getReports() {
  71  return get(STORAGE_KEYS.REPORTS, []);
  72}
  73
  74export function setReports(reports) {
  75  set(STORAGE_KEYS.REPORTS, reports);
  76}
  77
  78export function getAuditLogs() {
  79  return get(STORAGE_KEYS.AUDIT_LOGS, []);
  80}
  81
  82export function addAuditLog(entry) {
  83  const logs = getAuditLogs();
  84  logs.unshift({
  85    id: 'al' + Date.now(),
  86    actor: entry.actor,
  87    action: entry.action,
  88    target: entry.target,
  89    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
  90  });
  91  set(STORAGE_KEYS.AUDIT_LOGS, logs.slice(0, 500));
  92}
  93
  94export function getCategories() {
  95  return get(STORAGE_KEYS.CATEGORIES, []);
  96}
  97
  98export function setCategories(cats) {
  99  set(STORAGE_KEYS.CATEGORIES, cats);
 100}
 101
 102export function getSavedJobs(userId) {
 103  const all = get(STORAGE_KEYS.SAVED_JOBS, {});
 104  return all[userId] || [];
 105}
 106
 107export function setSavedJobs(userId, jobIds) {
 108  const all = get(STORAGE_KEYS.SAVED_JOBS, {});
 109  all[userId] = jobIds;
 110  set(STORAGE_KEYS.SAVED_JOBS, all);
 111}
 112
 113export function getCurrentUser() {
 114  return get(STORAGE_KEYS.USER, null);
 115}
 116
 117export function setCurrentUser(user) {
 118  set(STORAGE_KEYS.USER, user);
 119}
 120
 121export function getNotifications(userId) {
 122  const all = get(STORAGE_KEYS.NOTIFICATIONS, {});
 123  return all[userId] || [];
 124}
 125
 126export function setNotifications(userId, notifs) {
 127  const all = get(STORAGE_KEYS.NOTIFICATIONS, {});
 128  all[userId] = notifs;
 129  set(STORAGE_KEYS.NOTIFICATIONS, all);
 130}
 131
 132export function getNotes() {
 133  return get(STORAGE_KEYS.NOTES, {});
 134}
 135
 136export function setNotes(notes) {
 137  set(STORAGE_KEYS.NOTES, notes);
 138}
 139
 140export function getResumes(userId) {
 141  const all = get(STORAGE_KEYS.RESUMES, {});
 142  return all[userId] || [];
 143}
 144
 145export function setResumes(userId, resumes) {
 146  const all = get(STORAGE_KEYS.RESUMES, {});
 147  all[userId] = resumes;
 148  set(STORAGE_KEYS.RESUMES, all);
 149}
 150
 151export function getMessages(userId) {
 152  const all = get(STORAGE_KEYS.MESSAGES, {});
 153  return all[userId] || {};
 154}
 155
 156export function setMessages(userId, msgs) {
 157  const all = get(STORAGE_KEYS.MESSAGES, {});
 158  all[userId] = msgs;
 159  set(STORAGE_KEYS.MESSAGES, all);
 160}
 161
 162export function setSeekers(seekers) {
 163  set(STORAGE_KEYS.SEEKERS, seekers);
 164}
 165
 166export function getTheme() {
 167  return localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.THEME) || 'light';
 168}
 169
 170export function setTheme(theme) {
 171  localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.THEME, theme);
 172}
 173
 174export { STORAGE_KEYS };
 175
assets/js/ui.animations.js · 50 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Animations & Micro-interactions
   3 */
   4
   5export function animateCounter(el, target, duration = 800) {
   6  if (!el) return;
   7  const start = parseInt(el.textContent) || 0;
   8  const startTime = performance.now();
   9  function step(now) {
  10    const t = Math.min((now - startTime) / duration, 1);
  11    const ease = 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 3);
  12    el.textContent = Math.round(start + (target - start) * ease);
  13    if (t < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
  14  }
  15  requestAnimationFrame(step);
  16}
  17
  18export function pageEnter(element) {
  19  if (!element) return;
  20  element.classList.add('page-transition');
  21}
  22
  23export function showSkeleton(container, count = 3) {
  24  if (!container) return;
  25  container.innerHTML = '';
  26  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  27    const div = document.createElement('div');
  28    div.className = 'card card-lift';
  29    div.innerHTML = `
  30      <div class="skeleton skeleton-text" style="width:60%;height:20px;margin-bottom:8px"></div>
  31      <div class="skeleton skeleton-text" style="width:40%;height:14px;margin-bottom:8px"></div>
  32      <div class="skeleton skeleton-text" style="width:100%;height:14px"></div>
  33    `;
  34    container.appendChild(div);
  35  }
  36}
  37
  38export function hideSkeleton(container, contentFn) {
  39  if (!container) return;
  40  container.innerHTML = '';
  41  if (contentFn) contentFn(container);
  42}
  43
  44export function simulateLoad(container, contentFn, delay = 500) {
  45  showSkeleton(container);
  46  setTimeout(() => {
  47    hideSkeleton(container, contentFn);
  48  }, delay);
  49}
  50
assets/js/ui.dropdown.js · 21 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Dropdown
   3 */
   4
   5export function initDropdowns(container = document) {
   6  container.querySelectorAll('[data-dropdown]').forEach(btn => {
   7    if (btn.dataset.dropdownInit) return;
   8    btn.dataset.dropdownInit = '1';
   9    const menuId = btn.dataset.dropdown;
  10    const menu = document.getElementById(menuId);
  11    if (!menu) return;
  12    btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  13      e.stopPropagation();
  14      menu.classList.toggle('show');
  15    });
  16  });
  17  document.addEventListener('click', () => {
  18    container.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.show').forEach(m => m.classList.remove('show'));
  19  });
  20}
  21
assets/js/ui.modal.js · 50 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Modal Dialog
   3 *
   4 * Uses the `wb-modal` namespace (not `modal`) to avoid colliding with Bootstrap's
   5 * own .modal class, which forces `display: none` and would render us invisible.
   6 */
   7
   8export function openModal(options = {}) {
   9  // Prevent stacking: if any modal is already open, close it before opening a new one.
  10  // Otherwise rapid clicks (or accidental double-clicks) would layer multiple backdrops,
  11  // each adding 0.4 opacity, until the page goes fully black.
  12  document.querySelectorAll('.wb-modal-backdrop').forEach(b => b.remove());
  13
  14  const { title = '', body = '', onClose, footer } = options;
  15  const backdrop = document.createElement('div');
  16  backdrop.className = 'wb-modal-backdrop';
  17
  18  const modal = document.createElement('div');
  19  modal.className = 'wb-modal';
  20  modal.innerHTML = `
  21    <div class="wb-modal-header">
  22      <h3 class="wb-modal-title">${title}</h3>
  23      <button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm wb-modal-close" aria-label="Close">&times;</button>
  24    </div>
  25    <div class="wb-modal-body">${typeof body === 'string' ? body : ''}</div>
  26    ${footer ? `<div class="wb-modal-footer">${footer}</div>` : ''}
  27  `;
  28
  29  const close = () => {
  30    backdrop.remove();
  31    onClose?.();
  32  };
  33
  34  backdrop.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  35    if (e.target === backdrop) close();
  36  });
  37
  38  modal.querySelector('.wb-modal-close')?.addEventListener('click', close);
  39
  40  if (typeof body === 'function') {
  41    const bodyEl = modal.querySelector('.wb-modal-body');
  42    body(bodyEl, close);
  43  }
  44
  45  backdrop.appendChild(modal);
  46  document.body.appendChild(backdrop);
  47
  48  return { close, modal, backdrop };
  49}
  50
assets/js/ui.table.js · 27 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Table utilities
   3 */
   4
   5export function renderTable(columns, rows, opts = {}) {
   6  const { emptyMessage = 'No data found', rowClick } = opts;
   7  if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
   8    return `<div class="empty-state"><p>${emptyMessage}</p></div>`;
   9  }
  10  let html = '<div class="table-wrap"><table class="table"><thead><tr>';
  11  columns.forEach(col => {
  12    html += `<th>${col.label}</th>`;
  13  });
  14  html += '</tr></thead><tbody>';
  15  rows.forEach((row, i) => {
  16    const tr = rowClick ? ` role="button" tabindex="0" data-row-index="${i}"` : '';
  17    html += `<tr${tr}>`;
  18    columns.forEach(col => {
  19      const val = typeof col.render === 'function' ? col.render(row[col.key], row) : (row[col.key] ?? '-');
  20      html += `<td>${val}</td>`;
  21    });
  22    html += '</tr>';
  23  });
  24  html += '</tbody></table></div>';
  25  return html;
  26}
  27
assets/js/ui.toast.js · 33 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Toast Notifications
   3 */
   4
   5const CONTAINER_ID = 'toast-container';
   6
   7function getContainer() {
   8  let el = document.getElementById(CONTAINER_ID);
   9  if (!el) {
  10    el = document.createElement('div');
  11    el.id = CONTAINER_ID;
  12    el.className = 'toast-container';
  13    document.body.appendChild(el);
  14  }
  15  return el;
  16}
  17
  18export function toast(message, type = 'info') {
  19  const container = getContainer();
  20  const div = document.createElement('div');
  21  div.className = `toast toast-${type}`;
  22  div.textContent = message;
  23  container.appendChild(div);
  24  setTimeout(() => {
  25    div.style.animation = 'toastOut 0.2s ease-out forwards';
  26    setTimeout(() => div.remove(), 200);
  27  }, 3000);
  28}
  29
  30export function toastSuccess(msg) { toast(msg, 'success'); }
  31export function toastError(msg) { toast(msg, 'error'); }
  32export function toastWarning(msg) { toast(msg, 'warning'); }
  33
assets/js/utils.js · 205 lines
   1/**
   2 * WorkBridge PH — Shared Utilities
   3 */
   4
   5const ESC_MAP = { '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;', "'": '&#39;' };
   6
   7/**
   8 * Escape HTML special characters to prevent XSS when inserting into innerHTML.
   9 * @param {*} str - Value to escape (non-strings are converted)
  10 * @returns {string} Safe HTML string
  11 */
  12export function esc(str) {
  13  if (str == null) return '';
  14  return String(str).replace(/[&<>"']/g, c => ESC_MAP[c]);
  15}
  16
  17const PESO_FMT = new Intl.NumberFormat('en-PH', { maximumFractionDigits: 0 });
  18
  19/**
  20 * Format a peso amount with grouping separators. `formatPeso(18000)` → `₱18,000`.
  21 * @param {number|string} amount
  22 */
  23export function formatPeso(amount) {
  24  const n = Number(amount);
  25  if (!Number.isFinite(n)) return '—';
  26  return '₱' + PESO_FMT.format(n);
  27}
  28
  29/**
  30 * Format a salary range for job cards/details.
  31 * `formatSalaryRange(18000, 25000)` → `₱18,000 – ₱25,000/month`
  32 * Returns "Salary not specified" if both ends are missing or zero.
  33 *
  34 * @param {number|string} min
  35 * @param {number|string} max
  36 * @param {string} [period='month'] - 'month' | 'year' | 'hour'
  37 */
  38export function formatSalaryRange(min, max, period = 'month') {
  39  const lo = Number(min) || 0;
  40  const hi = Number(max) || 0;
  41  if (!lo && !hi) return 'Salary not specified';
  42  if (lo && !hi) return `${formatPeso(lo)}+/${period}`;
  43  if (!lo && hi) return `Up to ${formatPeso(hi)}/${period}`;
  44  if (lo === hi) return `${formatPeso(lo)}/${period}`;
  45  return `${formatPeso(lo)} – ${formatPeso(hi)}/${period}`;
  46}
  47
  48/* ---------- Company avatar (initials in colored circle) -------------------
  49   Pattern used by Linear, GitHub, Slack: when a company hasn't uploaded a
  50   logo, show the first 1–2 letters of the name on a colored background.
  51   Color is derived deterministically from the name so the same company
  52   always gets the same color — visual consistency across pages.        */
  53
  54const AVATAR_COLORS = [
  55  '#4F46E5', '#0D9488', '#F59E0B', '#E11D48',
  56  '#10B981', '#0EA5E9', '#8B5CF6', '#EC4899',
  57];
  58
  59function hashString(str) {
  60  let h = 0;
  61  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) {
  62    h = ((h << 5) - h) + str.charCodeAt(i);
  63    h |= 0;
  64  }
  65  return Math.abs(h);
  66}
  67
  68/** "MediCare Samar Hospital" → "MS"  ·  "TechNova Solutions" → "TS" */
  69export function companyInitials(name) {
  70  if (!name) return '?';
  71  return String(name)
  72    .split(/\s+/)
  73    .map(w => w[0])
  74    .filter(Boolean)
  75    .slice(0, 2)
  76    .join('')
  77    .toUpperCase();
  78}
  79
  80/* ---------- Loading skeletons --------------------------------------------
  81   Use BEFORE async data lands. Mimics the shape of the real content so the
  82   layout doesn't shift (CLS). Replace innerHTML with the skeleton, then
  83   replace again with real content when data arrives. */
  84
  85/** A skeleton placeholder for a single job card. Matches the card layout used
  86 *  on jobs.html, dashboard, etc. — avatar, title, company line, salary. */
  87export function skeletonJobCard() {
  88  return `<div class="card">
  89    <div class="card-body">
  90      <div class="d-flex gap-3 align-items-start mb-3">
  91        <span class="skeleton skeleton-circle" style="width:48px;height:48px;flex-shrink:0"></span>
  92        <div style="flex:1">
  93          <span class="skeleton skeleton-title" style="width:70%"></span>
  94          <span class="skeleton skeleton-text" style="width:45%"></span>
  95        </div>
  96      </div>
  97      <span class="skeleton skeleton-text" style="width:60%;margin-bottom:0"></span>
  98    </div>
  99  </div>`;
 100}
 101
 102/** Render N skeleton job cards (e.g. while jobs.html loads). */
 103export function skeletonJobCards(count = 6) {
 104  return Array.from({ length: count }, () => skeletonJobCard()).join('');
 105}
 106
 107/** Skeleton row for tables. `cols` is the number of <td>s. */
 108export function skeletonTableRow(cols = 4) {
 109  const cells = Array.from({ length: cols }, () =>
 110    `<td><span class="skeleton skeleton-text" style="width:80%;margin-bottom:0"></span></td>`
 111  ).join('');
 112  return `<tr>${cells}</tr>`;
 113}
 114
 115/** Render N skeleton table rows. */
 116export function skeletonTableRows(count = 5, cols = 4) {
 117  return Array.from({ length: count }, () => skeletonTableRow(cols)).join('');
 118}
 119
 120/** Skeleton for the dashboard stat card pattern (big number + label). */
 121export function skeletonStat() {
 122  return `<div class="stat-card card">
 123    <span class="skeleton" style="width:50%;height:2rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem"></span>
 124    <span class="skeleton skeleton-text" style="width:70%;margin-bottom:0"></span>
 125  </div>`;
 126}
 127
 128/**
 129 * Renders a polished empty state with icon, title, subtitle, and optional action.
 130 * Used everywhere we'd otherwise show "No data yet" text. Encourages the user
 131 * forward instead of leaving them at a dead end.
 132 *
 133 * @param {Object} opts
 134 * @param {string} [opts.icon='inbox']  - Bootstrap Icon name without `bi-` prefix
 135 * @param {string} opts.title           - Headline ("No saved jobs yet")
 136 * @param {string} [opts.subtitle]      - Helpful explanation
 137 * @param {string} [opts.actionLabel]   - CTA button text
 138 * @param {string} [opts.actionHref]    - CTA button link
 139 * @returns {string} HTML
 140 */
 141export function emptyState({ icon = 'inbox', title, subtitle = '', actionLabel = '', actionHref = '' } = {}) {
 142  const action = actionLabel && actionHref
 143    ? `<a href="${esc(actionHref)}" class="btn btn-primary">${esc(actionLabel)}</a>`
 144    : '';
 145  return `<div class="empty-state">
 146    <div class="empty-state-icon"><i class="bi bi-${esc(icon)}"></i></div>
 147    <div class="empty-state-title">${esc(title)}</div>
 148    ${subtitle ? `<p class="empty-state-subtitle">${esc(subtitle)}</p>` : ''}
 149    ${action}
 150  </div>`;
 151}
 152
 153/**
 154 * Twitter/X-style verified badge. Returns a small blue circle with a white
 155 * check next to the company name. Returns empty string if not verified, so
 156 * it's safe to interpolate unconditionally:
 157 *   `${esc(name)}${verifiedBadge(company)}`
 158 *
 159 * Accepts both normalized (`verifiedStatus`) and raw API (`verified_status`)
 160 * field names so callers don't need to remember which.
 161 *
 162 * @param {{verifiedStatus?:string, verified_status?:string}|null} company
 163 * @param {number} [size=14] - Diameter in pixels.
 164 */
 165export function verifiedBadge(company, size = 14) {
 166  if (!company) return '';
 167  const status = company.verifiedStatus || company.verified_status;
 168  if (status !== 'Verified') return '';
 169  return `<span title="Verified company" aria-label="Verified"
 170    style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
 171    width:${size}px;height:${size}px;border-radius:50%;background:#0EA5E9;
 172    color:#fff;margin-left:4px;font-size:${Math.round(size * 0.7)}px;
 173    vertical-align:0.1em;flex-shrink:0;line-height:1"
 174    ><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i></span>`;
 175}
 176
 177/**
 178 * Returns an HTML string: an <img> if a logo URL is provided, otherwise a
 179 * colored initials block. Safe to interpolate into innerHTML.
 180 *
 181 * @param {{name?:string, logo?:string|null}|null} company
 182 * @param {number} [size=40] - Width/height in pixels.
 183 */
 184export function companyAvatar(company, size = 40) {
 185  const name = company?.name || 'Company';
 186  const logo = company?.logo;
 187  const px   = `${size}px`;
 188  const radius = `${Math.round(size / 5)}px`;
 189
 190  if (logo) {
 191    return `<img src="${esc(logo)}" alt="${esc(name)} logo"
 192      style="width:${px};height:${px};border-radius:${radius};object-fit:cover;flex-shrink:0">`;
 193  }
 194
 195  const initials = companyInitials(name);
 196  const color    = AVATAR_COLORS[hashString(name) % AVATAR_COLORS.length];
 197  const fontSize = `${Math.round(size * 0.42)}px`;
 198
 199  return `<div aria-label="${esc(name)} logo"
 200    style="width:${px};height:${px};border-radius:${radius};background:${color};
 201    color:#fff;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
 202    font-weight:600;font-size:${fontSize};flex-shrink:0;letter-spacing:0.5px"
 203    >${esc(initials)}</div>`;
 204}
 205
auth/forgot.html · 81 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Forgot Password — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/auth.css">
  12</head>
  13<body>
  14  <div class="auth-page">
  15    <div class="auth-card card">
  16      <div class="card-body p-4">
  17        <a href="../index.html" class="d-block mb-4 text-dark text-decoration-none fw-bold">WorkBridge PH</a>
  18        <h1 class="h4 mb-2">Forgot password</h1>
  19        <p class="text-secondary small mb-4">Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.</p>
  20
  21        <form id="forgot-form">
  22          <div class="form-group">
  23            <label class="form-label">Email</label>
  24            <input type="email" name="email" class="form-input" required autocomplete="email">
  25          </div>
  26          <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100" id="submit-btn">Send reset link</button>
  27        </form>
  28
  29        <!-- Demo notice (replaces email in capstone build) -->
  30        <div id="demo-result" class="mt-3" hidden>
  31          <div class="alert alert-info" role="alert">
  32            <strong>Demo mode:</strong> in production this link is emailed.
  33            <a id="demo-link" href="#" class="d-block mt-2 text-break">Click here to reset your password</a>
  34          </div>
  35        </div>
  36
  37        <p class="mt-3 text-center text-secondary small"><a href="login.html">Back to log in</a></p>
  38      </div>
  39    </div>
  40  </div>
  41
  42  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  43  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  44  <script type="module">
  45    import { apiForgotPassword } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  46    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  47    import { esc } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  48
  49    document.getElementById('forgot-form').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
  50      e.preventDefault();
  51      const btn = document.getElementById('submit-btn');
  52      btn.disabled = true;
  53      btn.textContent = 'Sending…';
  54
  55      const fd = new FormData(e.target);
  56      const email = fd.get('email');
  57
  58      try {
  59        const res = await apiForgotPassword(email);
  60        toastSuccess(res.message || 'If that email is registered, a reset link has been sent.');
  61
  62        // Demo mode: backend includes the reset URL since SMTP isn't wired.
  63        // In production this field is absent and the user checks their email.
  64        if (res.demo_reset_url) {
  65          const wrap = document.getElementById('demo-result');
  66          const link = document.getElementById('demo-link');
  67          link.href = res.demo_reset_url;
  68          link.textContent = res.demo_reset_url;
  69          wrap.hidden = false;
  70        }
  71      } catch (err) {
  72        toastError(err.message);
  73      } finally {
  74        btn.disabled = false;
  75        btn.textContent = 'Send reset link';
  76      }
  77    });
  78  </script>
  79</body>
  80</html>
  81
auth/login.html · 72 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Log in — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/auth.css">
  13</head>
  14<body>
  15  <div class="auth-page">
  16    <div class="auth-card card">
  17      <div class="card-body p-4">
  18        <a href="../index.html" class="d-block mb-4 text-dark text-decoration-none fw-bold">WorkBridge PH</a>
  19        <h1 class="h4 mb-4">Log in</h1>
  20        <form id="login-form">
  21          <div class="form-group">
  22            <label class="form-label">Email</label>
  23            <input type="email" name="email" class="form-input" required placeholder="you@example.com">
  24          </div>
  25          <div class="form-group">
  26            <label class="form-label">Password</label>
  27            <input type="password" name="password" class="form-input" required>
  28          </div>
  29          <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100">Log in</button>
  30        </form>
  31        <p class="mt-3 text-center text-secondary small">
  32          <a href="forgot.html">Forgot password?</a> · <a href="register.html">Create account</a>
  33        </p>
  34        <div class="auth-demo">
  35          <strong>Demo accounts</strong>
  36          <p>juan@example.com / password (seeker)</p>
  37          <p>hr@technova.ph / password (employer)</p>
  38          <p>admin@workbridge.ph / password (admin)</p>
  39        </div>
  40      </div>
  41    </div>
  42  </div>
  43
  44  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  45  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  46  <script type="module">
  47    import { login, getRedirectAfterLogin } from './../assets/js/auth.js';
  48    import { toastError, toastSuccess } from './../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  49
  50    document.getElementById('login-form').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
  51      e.preventDefault();
  52      const btn = e.target.querySelector('button[type=submit]');
  53      btn.disabled = true;
  54      btn.textContent = 'Logging in…';
  55      const fd = new FormData(e.target);
  56      const result = await login(fd.get('email'), fd.get('password'));
  57      if (result.ok) {
  58        toastSuccess('Welcome back!');
  59        const redirect = new URLSearchParams(location.search).get('redirect');
  60        setTimeout(() => {
  61          window.location.href = redirect || getRedirectAfterLogin(result.user);
  62        }, 300);
  63      } else {
  64        toastError(result.error);
  65        btn.disabled = false;
  66        btn.textContent = 'Log in';
  67      }
  68    });
  69  </script>
  70</body>
  71</html>
  72
auth/register.html · 79 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Register — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/auth.css">
  13</head>
  14<body>
  15  <div class="auth-page">
  16    <div class="auth-card card">
  17      <div class="card-body p-4">
  18        <a href="../index.html" class="d-block mb-4 text-dark text-decoration-none fw-bold">WorkBridge PH</a>
  19        <h1 class="h4 mb-4">Create account</h1>
  20        <form id="register-form">
  21          <div class="form-group">
  22            <label class="form-label">Full name</label>
  23            <input type="text" name="name" class="form-input" required>
  24          </div>
  25          <div class="form-group">
  26            <label class="form-label">Email</label>
  27            <input type="email" name="email" class="form-input" required>
  28          </div>
  29          <div class="form-group">
  30            <label class="form-label">Password</label>
  31            <input type="password" name="password" class="form-input" required minlength="6">
  32          </div>
  33          <div class="form-group">
  34            <label class="form-label">I am a</label>
  35            <select name="role" class="form-select" required>
  36              <option value="seeker">Job Seeker</option>
  37              <option value="employer">Employer</option>
  38            </select>
  39          </div>
  40          <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100">Register</button>
  41        </form>
  42        <p class="mt-3 text-center text-secondary small"><a href="login.html">Already have an account? Log in</a></p>
  43      </div>
  44    </div>
  45  </div>
  46
  47  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  48  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  49  <script type="module">
  50    import { register, getRedirectAfterLogin } from './../assets/js/auth.js';
  51    import { toastError, toastSuccess } from './../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  52
  53    document.getElementById('register-form').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
  54      e.preventDefault();
  55      const btn = e.target.querySelector('button[type=submit]');
  56      btn.disabled = true;
  57      btn.textContent = 'Creating account…';
  58      const fd = new FormData(e.target);
  59      const result = await register({
  60        name: fd.get('name'),
  61        email: fd.get('email'),
  62        password: fd.get('password'),
  63        role: fd.get('role')
  64      });
  65      if (result.ok) {
  66        toastSuccess('Account created!');
  67        setTimeout(() => {
  68          window.location.href = getRedirectAfterLogin(result.user);
  69        }, 300);
  70      } else {
  71        toastError(result.error);
  72        btn.disabled = false;
  73        btn.textContent = 'Register';
  74      }
  75    });
  76  </script>
  77</body>
  78</html>
  79
auth/reset.html · 100 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Reset Password — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/auth.css">
  12</head>
  13<body>
  14  <div class="auth-page">
  15    <div class="auth-card card">
  16      <div class="card-body p-4">
  17        <a href="../index.html" class="d-block mb-4 text-dark text-decoration-none fw-bold">WorkBridge PH</a>
  18        <h1 class="h4 mb-2">Reset password</h1>
  19        <p id="reset-subtitle" class="text-secondary small mb-4">Enter your new password below.</p>
  20
  21        <div id="invalid-link" class="alert alert-danger" role="alert" hidden>
  22          This reset link is invalid or has expired.
  23          <a href="forgot.html" class="d-block mt-2">Request a new link</a>
  24        </div>
  25
  26        <form id="reset-form">
  27          <div class="form-group">
  28            <label class="form-label">New password</label>
  29            <input type="password" name="password" class="form-input" required minlength="6" autocomplete="new-password">
  30          </div>
  31          <div class="form-group">
  32            <label class="form-label">Confirm password</label>
  33            <input type="password" name="confirm" class="form-input" required minlength="6" autocomplete="new-password">
  34          </div>
  35          <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100" id="submit-btn">Reset password</button>
  36        </form>
  37
  38        <p class="mt-3 text-center text-secondary small"><a href="login.html">Back to log in</a></p>
  39      </div>
  40    </div>
  41  </div>
  42
  43  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  44  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  45  <script type="module">
  46    import { apiResetPassword } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  47    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  48    import { esc } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  49
  50    // Read token + email from URL query string (and hash fallback for `serve` clean URLs)
  51    const search = window.location.search || (window.location.hash ? window.location.hash.slice(1) : '');
  52    const params = new URLSearchParams(search);
  53    const token = params.get('token');
  54    const email = params.get('email');
  55
  56    const form = document.getElementById('reset-form');
  57    const subtitle = document.getElementById('reset-subtitle');
  58
  59    if (!token || !email) {
  60      // No token in the URL — user landed here directly. Show error and hide form.
  61      document.getElementById('invalid-link').hidden = false;
  62      form.hidden = true;
  63      subtitle.hidden = true;
  64    } else {
  65      subtitle.textContent = `Enter a new password for ${email}.`;
  66    }
  67
  68    form.addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
  69      e.preventDefault();
  70      const fd = new FormData(form);
  71      const password = fd.get('password');
  72      const confirm  = fd.get('confirm');
  73
  74      if (password !== confirm) {
  75        toastError('Passwords do not match.');
  76        return;
  77      }
  78      if (password.length < 6) {
  79        toastError('Password must be at least 6 characters.');
  80        return;
  81      }
  82
  83      const btn = document.getElementById('submit-btn');
  84      btn.disabled = true;
  85      btn.textContent = 'Resetting…';
  86
  87      try {
  88        await apiResetPassword(email, token, password, confirm);
  89        toastSuccess('Password reset! Redirecting to log in…');
  90        setTimeout(() => { window.location.href = 'login.html'; }, 1200);
  91      } catch (err) {
  92        toastError(err.message);
  93        btn.disabled = false;
  94        btn.textContent = 'Reset password';
  95      }
  96    });
  97  </script>
  98</body>
  99</html>
 100

   2APP_ENV=local
   3APP_KEY=

  10
  11APP_MAINTENANCE_DRIVER=file
  12# APP_MAINTENANCE_STORE=database
  13
  14# PHP_CLI_SERVER_WORKERS=4
