spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}@keyframes ping{75%,to{opacity:0;transform:scale(2)}}@keyframes pulse{50%{opacity:.5}}@keyframes bounce{0%,to{animation-timing-function:cubic-bezier(.8,0,1,1);transform:translateY(-25%)}50%{animation-timing-function:cubic-bezier(0,0,.2,1);transform:none}}@property --tw-translate-x{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:0}@property --tw-translate-y{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:0}@property --tw-translate-z{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:0}@property --tw-rotate-x{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:rotateX(0)}@property --tw-rotate-y{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:rotateY(0)}@property --tw-rotate-z{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:rotateZ(0)}@property --tw-skew-x{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:skewX(0)}@property --tw-skew-y{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:skewY(0)}@property --tw-space-x-reverse{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:0}@property --tw-border-style{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:solid}@property --tw-leading{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-font-weight{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-shadow{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:0 0 #0000}@property --tw-shadow-color{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-inset-shadow{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:0 0 #0000}@property --tw-inset-shadow-color{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-ring-color{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-ring-shadow{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:0 0 #0000}@property --tw-inset-ring-color{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-inset-ring-shadow{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:0 0 #0000}@property --tw-ring-inset{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-ring-offset-width{syntax:"<length>";inherits:false;initial-value:0}@property --tw-ring-offset-color{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:#fff}@property --tw-ring-offset-shadow{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:0 0 #0000}@property --tw-blur{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-brightness{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-contrast{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-grayscale{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-hue-rotate{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-invert{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-opacity{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-saturate{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-sepia{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-drop-shadow{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-duration{syntax:"*";inherits:false}@property --tw-content{syntax:"*";inherits:false;initial-value:""}
  19            </style>
  20        @endif
  21    </head>
  22    <body class="bg-[#FDFDFC] dark:bg-[#0a0a0a] text-[#1b1b18] flex p-6 lg:p-8 items-center lg:justify-center min-h-screen flex-col">
  23        <header class="w-full lg:max-w-4xl max-w-[335px] text-sm mb-6 not-has-[nav]:hidden">
  24            @if (Route::has('login'))
  25                <nav class="flex items-center justify-end gap-4">
  26                    @auth
  27                        <a
  28                            href="{{ url('/dashboard') }}"
  29                            class="inline-block px-5 py-1.5 dark:text-[#EDEDEC] border-[#19140035] hover:border-[#1915014a] border text-[#1b1b18] dark:border-[#3E3E3A] dark:hover:border-[#62605b] rounded-sm text-sm leading-normal"
  30                        >
  31                            Dashboard
  32                        </a>
  33                    @else
  34                        <a
  35                            href="{{ route('login') }}"
  36                            class="inline-block px-5 py-1.5 dark:text-[#EDEDEC] text-[#1b1b18] border border-transparent hover:border-[#19140035] dark:hover:border-[#3E3E3A] rounded-sm text-sm leading-normal"
  37                        >
  38                            Log in
  39                        </a>
  40
  41                        @if (Route::has('register'))
  42                            <a
  43                                href="{{ route('register') }}"
  44                                class="inline-block px-5 py-1.5 dark:text-[#EDEDEC] border-[#19140035] hover:border-[#1915014a] border text-[#1b1b18] dark:border-[#3E3E3A] dark:hover:border-[#62605b] rounded-sm text-sm leading-normal">
  45                                Register
  46                            </a>
  47                        @endif
  48                    @endauth
  49                </nav>
  50            @endif
  51        </header>
  52        <div class="flex items-center justify-center w-full transition-opacity opacity-100 duration-750 lg:grow starting:opacity-0">
  53            <main class="flex max-w-[335px] w-full flex-col-reverse lg:max-w-4xl lg:flex-row">
  54                <div class="text-[13px] leading-[20px] flex-1 p-6 pb-12 lg:p-20 bg-white dark:bg-[#161615] dark:text-[#EDEDEC] shadow-[inset_0px_0px_0px_1px_rgba(26,26,0,0.16)] dark:shadow-[inset_0px_0px_0px_1px_#fffaed2d] rounded-bl-lg rounded-br-lg lg:rounded-tl-lg lg:rounded-br-none">
  55                    <h1 class="mb-1 font-medium">Let's get started</h1>
  56                    <p class="mb-2 text-[#706f6c] dark:text-[#A1A09A]">Laravel has an incredibly rich ecosystem. <br>We suggest starting with the following.</p>
  57                    <ul class="flex flex-col mb-4 lg:mb-6">
  58                        <li class="flex items-center gap-4 py-2 relative before:border-l before:border-[#e3e3e0] dark:before:border-[#3E3E3A] before:top-1/2 before:bottom-0 before:left-[0.4rem] before:absolute">
  59                            <span class="relative py-1 bg-white dark:bg-[#161615]">
  60                                <span class="flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-[#FDFDFC] dark:bg-[#161615] shadow-[0px_0px_1px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03),0px_1px_2px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)] w-3.5 h-3.5 border dark:border-[#3E3E3A] border-[#e3e3e0]">
  61                                    <span class="rounded-full bg-[#dbdbd7] dark:bg-[#3E3E3A] w-1.5 h-1.5"></span>
  62                                </span>
  63                            </span>
  64                            <span>
  65                                Read the
  66                                <a href="https://laravel.com/docs" target="_blank" class="inline-flex items-center space-x-1 font-medium underline underline-offset-4 text-[#f53003] dark:text-[#FF4433] ml-1">
  67                                    <span>Documentation</span>
  68                                    <svg
  69                                        width="10"
  70                                        height="11"
  71                                        viewBox="0 0 10 11"

 273        @if (Route::has('login'))

 277</html>

backend/routes/api.php · 95 lines
   1<?php
   2
   3use App\Http\Controllers\Api\AdminController;
   4use App\Http\Controllers\Api\ApplicationController;
   5use App\Http\Controllers\Api\AuthController;
   6use App\Http\Controllers\Api\CompanyController;
   7use App\Http\Controllers\Api\JobController;
   8use App\Http\Controllers\Api\MessageController;
   9use App\Http\Controllers\Api\NotificationController;
  10use App\Http\Controllers\Api\SeekerController;
  11use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;
  12
  13// Public routes — rate limited
  14Route::post('/auth/register',         [AuthController::class, 'register'])->middleware('throttle:auth.register');
  15Route::post('/auth/login',            [AuthController::class, 'login'])->middleware('throttle:auth.login');
  16Route::post('/auth/forgot-password',  [AuthController::class, 'forgotPassword'])->middleware('throttle:auth.register');
  17Route::post('/auth/reset-password',   [AuthController::class, 'resetPassword'])->middleware('throttle:auth.register');
  18
  19Route::get('/categories',    [AdminController::class, 'categories']);
  20Route::get('/jobs',          [JobController::class, 'index']);
  21Route::get('/jobs/{id}',     [JobController::class, 'show']);
  22Route::get('/companies',     [CompanyController::class, 'index']);
  23Route::get('/companies/{id}', [CompanyController::class, 'show']);
  24Route::get('/jobs/company/{companyId}', [JobController::class, 'byCompany']);
  25
  26// Authenticated routes
  27Route::middleware('auth:sanctum')->group(function () {
  28    Route::post('/auth/logout',          [AuthController::class, 'logout']);
  29    Route::get('/auth/me',               [AuthController::class, 'me']);
  30    Route::post('/auth/change-password', [AuthController::class, 'changePassword']);
  31    Route::get('/applications/{id}',     [ApplicationController::class, 'show']);
  32
  33    // Notifications
  34    Route::get('/notifications',           [NotificationController::class, 'index']);
  35    Route::get('/notifications/unread',    [NotificationController::class, 'unreadCount']);
  36    Route::patch('/notifications/{id}/read', [NotificationController::class, 'markRead']);
  37    Route::patch('/notifications/read-all', [NotificationController::class, 'markAllRead']);
  38
  39    // Messages
  40    Route::get('/messages/contacts',      [MessageController::class, 'contacts']);
  41    Route::get('/messages/unread',        [MessageController::class, 'unreadCount']);
  42    Route::get('/messages/{userId}',      [MessageController::class, 'thread']);
  43    Route::post('/messages',              [MessageController::class, 'send'])->middleware('throttle:30,1');
  44
  45    // Seeker routes
  46    Route::middleware('role:seeker')->group(function () {
  47        Route::get('/seeker/profile',               [SeekerController::class, 'profile']);
  48        Route::put('/seeker/profile',               [SeekerController::class, 'updateProfile']);
  49        Route::post('/seeker/photo',                [SeekerController::class, 'uploadPhoto'])->middleware('throttle:uploads');
  50        Route::post('/seeker/resumes',              [SeekerController::class, 'uploadResume'])->middleware('throttle:uploads');
  51        Route::get('/seeker/resumes/{id}/download', [SeekerController::class, 'downloadResume']);
  52        Route::delete('/seeker/resumes/{id}',       [SeekerController::class, 'deleteResume']);
  53        Route::get('/seeker/saved-jobs',            [SeekerController::class, 'savedJobs']);
  54        Route::post('/seeker/saved-jobs/{jobId}',   [SeekerController::class, 'saveJob']);
  55        Route::delete('/seeker/saved-jobs/{jobId}', [SeekerController::class, 'unsaveJob']);
  56        Route::get('/seeker/applications',          [ApplicationController::class, 'myApplications']);
  57        Route::post('/jobs/{jobId}/apply',          [ApplicationController::class, 'apply']);
  58        Route::delete('/applications/{id}/withdraw', [ApplicationController::class, 'withdraw']);
  59    });
  60
  61    // Employer routes
  62    Route::middleware('role:employer')->group(function () {
  63        Route::get('/employer/company',          [CompanyController::class, 'myCompany']);
  64        Route::put('/employer/company',          [CompanyController::class, 'updateCompany']);
  65        Route::post('/employer/company/logo',    [CompanyController::class, 'uploadLogo'])->middleware('throttle:uploads');
  66        Route::post('/employer/company/docs',    [CompanyController::class, 'uploadVerificationDoc'])->middleware('throttle:uploads');
  67        Route::get('/employer/dashboard',        [JobController::class, 'employerDashboard']);
  68        Route::get('/employer/jobs',             [JobController::class, 'myJobs']);
  69        Route::post('/employer/jobs',            [JobController::class, 'store']);
  70        Route::put('/employer/jobs/{id}',        [JobController::class, 'update']);
  71        Route::delete('/employer/jobs/{id}',     [JobController::class, 'destroy']);
  72        Route::get('/employer/jobs/{id}/applications', [ApplicationController::class, 'forJob']);
  73        Route::patch('/applications/{id}/status', [ApplicationController::class, 'updateStatus']);
  74    });
  75
  76    // Admin routes
  77    Route::middleware('role:admin')->prefix('admin')->group(function () {
  78        Route::get('/dashboard',                   [AdminController::class, 'dashboard']);
  79        Route::get('/users',                        [AdminController::class, 'users']);
  80        Route::patch('/users/{id}/ban',             [AdminController::class, 'banUser']);
  81        Route::patch('/users/{id}/unban',           [AdminController::class, 'unbanUser']);
  82        Route::get('/verifications',                [AdminController::class, 'pendingVerifications']);
  83        Route::patch('/companies/{id}/verify',      [AdminController::class, 'verifyCompany']);
  84        Route::get('/reports',                      [AdminController::class, 'reports']);
  85        Route::patch('/reports/{id}/resolve',       [AdminController::class, 'resolveReport']);
  86        Route::get('/jobs',                         [AdminController::class, 'allJobs']);
  87        Route::patch('/jobs/{id}/takedown',         [AdminController::class, 'takedownJob']);
  88        Route::get('/audit-logs',                   [AdminController::class, 'auditLogs']);
  89        Route::patch('/jobs/{id}/approve',          [AdminController::class, 'approveJob']);
  90        Route::get('/categories',                   [AdminController::class, 'categories']);
  91        Route::post('/categories',                  [AdminController::class, 'addCategory']);
  92        Route::delete('/categories/{id}',           [AdminController::class, 'deleteCategory']);
  93    });
  94});
  95

backend/tests/Feature/AdminTest.php · 87 lines
   1<?php
   2
   3namespace Tests\Feature;
   4
   5use App\Models\Company;
   6use App\Models\User;
   7use Illuminate\Foundation\Testing\RefreshDatabase;
   8use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
   9use Laravel\Sanctum\Sanctum;
  10use Tests\TestCase;
  11
  12class AdminTest extends TestCase
  13{
  14    use RefreshDatabase;
  15
  16    /**
  17     * Regression target for Bug #6: the audit_logs migration was missing
  18     * target_type, target_id, meta, ip_address columns that the AdminController
  19     * tries to insert. Verifying a company writes an audit log — if the schema
  20     * drifts again, this test fails at the verify step with a SQL error.
  21     *
  22     * @test
  23     */
  24    public function admin_can_verify_company_and_audit_log_is_created()
  25    {
  26        // Set up an admin
  27        $admin = User::create([
  28            'name' => 'Admin', 'email' => 'admin@test.com',
  29            'password' => Hash::make('password'), 'role' => 'admin', 'status' => 'active',
  30        ]);
  31
  32        // Set up an employer + company in pending verification status
  33        $employer = User::create([
  34            'name' => 'Pending Employer', 'email' => 'pending@test.com',
  35            'password' => Hash::make('password'), 'role' => 'employer', 'status' => 'active',
  36        ]);
  37        $company = Company::create([
  38            'user_id' => $employer->id, 'name' => 'Pending Co.',
  39            'slug' => 'pending-' . $employer->id,
  40            'verified_status' => 'Pending',
  41        ]);
  42
  43        // Authenticate as admin
  44        Sanctum::actingAs($admin);
  45
  46        // Verify the company
  47        $this->patchJson("/api/admin/companies/{$company->id}/verify", [
  48            'status' => 'Verified',
  49            'note'   => 'All documents look good.',
  50        ])->assertStatus(200);
  51
  52        // Company status updated
  53        $this->assertDatabaseHas('companies', [
  54            'id'              => $company->id,
  55            'verified_status' => 'Verified',
  56        ]);
  57
  58        // Audit log row was inserted — this is the regression target.
  59        // If audit_logs is missing target_type/target_id columns, this insert
  60        // fails with a SQL error and the whole request returns 500.
  61        $this->assertDatabaseHas('audit_logs', [
  62            'actor_id'    => $admin->id,
  63            'actor_email' => 'admin@test.com',
  64            'action'      => 'verify_company:Verified',
  65            'target_type' => 'company',
  66            'target_id'   => $company->id,
  67        ]);
  68    }
  69
  70    /**
  71     * Sanity check that role middleware actually blocks non-admins.
  72     * @test
  73     */
  74    public function non_admin_cannot_call_admin_endpoints()
  75    {
  76        $seeker = User::create([
  77            'name' => 'Just a seeker', 'email' => 'seeker@test.com',
  78            'password' => Hash::make('password'), 'role' => 'seeker', 'status' => 'active',
  79        ]);
  80
  81        Sanctum::actingAs($seeker);
  82
  83        $this->getJson('/api/admin/users')->assertStatus(403);
  84        $this->getJson('/api/admin/dashboard')->assertStatus(403);
  85    }
  86}
  87
backend/tests/Feature/ApplicationTest.php · 83 lines
   1<?php
   2
   3namespace Tests\Feature;
   4
   5use App\Models\Application;
   6use App\Models\Company;
   7use App\Models\JobListing;
   8use App\Models\Seeker;
   9use App\Models\User;
  10use Illuminate\Foundation\Testing\RefreshDatabase;
  11use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
  12use Laravel\Sanctum\Sanctum;
  13use Tests\TestCase;
  14
  15class ApplicationTest extends TestCase
  16{
  17    use RefreshDatabase;
  18
  19    /**
  20     * This test was the regression target for Bug #1: applying to a job inserts
  21     * into wb_notifications, which had a schema mismatch (missing type/body/link
  22     * columns). If the migration ever drifts from the model again, this test
  23     * will fail at the apply step with a SQL error.
  24     *
  25     * @test
  26     */
  27    public function seeker_can_apply_to_job_and_notification_is_created()
  28    {
  29        // Set up an employer + company + job listing
  30        $employerUser = User::create([
  31            'name' => 'Test Employer', 'email' => 'employer@test.com',
  32            'password' => Hash::make('password'), 'role' => 'employer', 'status' => 'active',
  33        ]);
  34        $company = Company::create([
  35            'user_id' => $employerUser->id, 'name' => 'Acme Corp', 'slug' => 'acme-' . $employerUser->id,
  36            'verified_status' => 'Verified',
  37        ]);
  38        $job = JobListing::create([
  39            'company_id' => $company->id, 'title' => 'Software Engineer',
  40            'description' => 'Build things.', 'location' => 'Remote',
  41            'type' => 'Full-time', 'experience_level' => 'Mid-level',
  42            'status' => 'Open',
  43        ]);
  44
  45        // Set up a seeker
  46        $seekerUser = User::create([
  47            'name' => 'Test Seeker', 'email' => 'seeker@test.com',
  48            'password' => Hash::make('password'), 'role' => 'seeker', 'status' => 'active',
  49        ]);
  50        Seeker::create(['user_id' => $seekerUser->id]);
  51
  52        // Authenticate as the seeker (bypasses login flow for test speed)
  53        Sanctum::actingAs($seekerUser);
  54
  55        // Apply to the job
  56        $response = $this->postJson("/api/jobs/{$job->id}/apply", [
  57            'skill_fit' => 75,
  58        ])->assertStatus(201);
  59
  60        // Application row created
  61        $this->assertDatabaseHas('applications', [
  62            'job_listing_id' => $job->id,
  63            'seeker_id'      => $seekerUser->seeker->id,
  64            'status'         => 'Pending',
  65        ]);
  66
  67        // Timeline entry was logged
  68        $appId = Application::where('job_listing_id', $job->id)->first()->id;
  69        $this->assertDatabaseHas('application_timelines', [
  70            'application_id' => $appId,
  71            'status'         => 'Pending',
  72        ]);
  73
  74        // Notification fired to the employer (this is the regression target)
  75        // Insert into wb_notifications must succeed — if columns drift again, this fails.
  76        $this->assertDatabaseHas('wb_notifications', [
  77            'user_id' => $employerUser->id,
  78            'type'    => 'new_application',
  79            'is_read' => false,
  80        ]);
  81    }
  82}
  83
backend/tests/Feature/AuthTest.php · 132 lines
   1<?php
   2
   3namespace Tests\Feature;
   4
   5use App\Models\User;
   6use Illuminate\Foundation\Testing\RefreshDatabase;
   7use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
   8use Tests\TestCase;
   9
  10class AuthTest extends TestCase
  11{
  12    use RefreshDatabase;
  13
  14    /** @test */
  15    public function register_creates_user_seeker_record_and_returns_token()
  16    {
  17        $response = $this->postJson('/api/auth/register', [
  18            'name'                  => 'Test Seeker',
  19            'email'                 => 'seeker@test.com',
  20            'password'              => 'password',
  21            'password_confirmation' => 'password',
  22            'role'                  => 'seeker',
  23        ]);
  24
  25        $response->assertStatus(201)
  26            ->assertJsonStructure(['user' => ['id', 'email', 'role'], 'token']);
  27
  28        $this->assertDatabaseHas('users', [
  29            'email' => 'seeker@test.com',
  30            'role'  => 'seeker',
  31        ]);
  32
  33        // Seeker profile row should be auto-created on register
  34        $user = User::where('email', 'seeker@test.com')->first();
  35        $this->assertDatabaseHas('seekers', ['user_id' => $user->id]);
  36
  37        // Password must be hashed, not stored plaintext
  38        $this->assertNotEquals('password', $user->password);
  39        $this->assertTrue(Hash::check('password', $user->password));
  40    }
  41
  42    /** @test */
  43    public function login_returns_token_for_valid_credentials_and_rejects_wrong_password()
  44    {
  45        User::create([
  46            'name'     => 'Existing User',
  47            'email'    => 'existing@test.com',
  48            'password' => Hash::make('correct-password'),
  49            'role'     => 'seeker',
  50            'status'   => 'active',
  51        ]);
  52
  53        // Happy path
  54        $this->postJson('/api/auth/login', [
  55            'email'    => 'existing@test.com',
  56            'password' => 'correct-password',
  57        ])->assertStatus(200)
  58          ->assertJsonStructure(['user' => ['id', 'email', 'role'], 'token']);
  59
  60        // Wrong password — must NOT issue token, must not leak which field was wrong
  61        $this->postJson('/api/auth/login', [
  62            'email'    => 'existing@test.com',
  63            'password' => 'wrong-password',
  64        ])->assertStatus(422);
  65    }
  66
  67    /** @test */
  68    public function forgot_and_reset_password_completes_full_cycle()
  69    {
  70        $user = User::create([
  71            'name'     => 'Forgetful User',
  72            'email'    => 'forgot@test.com',
  73            'password' => Hash::make('old-password'),
  74            'role'     => 'seeker',
  75            'status'   => 'active',
  76        ]);
  77
  78        // Step 1: request reset → backend returns demo URL containing the token
  79        $forgotResponse = $this->postJson('/api/auth/forgot-password', [
  80            'email' => 'forgot@test.com',
  81        ])->assertStatus(200)
  82          ->assertJsonStructure(['message', 'demo_reset_url']);
  83
  84        $resetUrl = $forgotResponse->json('demo_reset_url');
  85        $this->assertNotEmpty($resetUrl, 'Reset URL should be returned in demo mode');
  86
  87        // Extract the raw token from the URL query string
  88        parse_str(parse_url($resetUrl, PHP_URL_QUERY), $params);
  89        $this->assertArrayHasKey('token', $params);
  90        $this->assertArrayHasKey('email', $params);
  91
  92        // The DB stores the HASH of the token, not the raw token
  93        $this->assertDatabaseHas('password_reset_tokens', ['email' => 'forgot@test.com']);
  94
  95        // Step 2: submit new password with the token
  96        $this->postJson('/api/auth/reset-password', [
  97            'email'                 => $params['email'],
  98            'token'                 => $params['token'],
  99            'password'              => 'new-password',
 100            'password_confirmation' => 'new-password',
 101        ])->assertStatus(200);
 102
 103        // Token row should be deleted (single use)
 104        $this->assertDatabaseMissing('password_reset_tokens', ['email' => 'forgot@test.com']);
 105
 106        // Old password should no longer work
 107        $this->postJson('/api/auth/login', [
 108            'email'    => 'forgot@test.com',
 109            'password' => 'old-password',
 110        ])->assertStatus(422);
 111
 112        // New password should work
 113        $this->postJson('/api/auth/login', [
 114            'email'    => 'forgot@test.com',
 115            'password' => 'new-password',
 116        ])->assertStatus(200);
 117    }
 118
 119    /** @test */
 120    public function forgot_password_does_not_leak_email_existence()
 121    {
 122        // No user with this email exists, but the response should still be 200
 123        // and look identical to a successful request — prevents email enumeration.
 124        $response = $this->postJson('/api/auth/forgot-password', [
 125            'email' => 'never-registered@test.com',
 126        ])->assertStatus(200);
 127
 128        // Should NOT include the demo URL when the email isn't registered
 129        $this->assertArrayNotHasKey('demo_reset_url', $response->json());
 130    }
 131}
 132

backend/tests/Feature/SavedJobTest.php · 82 lines
   1<?php
   2
   3namespace Tests\Feature;
   4
   5use App\Models\Company;
   6use App\Models\JobListing;
   7use App\Models\Seeker;
   8use App\Models\User;
   9use Illuminate\Foundation\Testing\RefreshDatabase;
  10use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
  11use Laravel\Sanctum\Sanctum;
  12use Tests\TestCase;
  13
  14class SavedJobTest extends TestCase
  15{
  16    use RefreshDatabase;
  17
  18    /**
  19     * Regression target for Bug #11: SavedJob model used to assume default
  20     * created_at/updated_at columns, but the saved_jobs table uses a composite
  21     * primary key + custom `saved_at` column. INSERT failed with SQL error,
  22     * returning 500 to the seeker on every save attempt.
  23     *
  24     * @test
  25     */
  26    public function seeker_can_save_a_job_then_list_their_saved_jobs()
  27    {
  28        // Set up an employer + company + job
  29        $employer = User::create([
  30            'name' => 'Employer', 'email' => 'emp@test.com',
  31            'password' => Hash::make('password'), 'role' => 'employer', 'status' => 'active',
  32        ]);
  33        $company = Company::create([
  34            'user_id' => $employer->id, 'name' => 'Test Co.',
  35            'slug' => 'test-' . $employer->id, 'verified_status' => 'Verified',
  36        ]);
  37        $job = JobListing::create([
  38            'company_id' => $company->id, 'title' => 'Engineer',
  39            'description' => 'desc', 'location' => 'Remote',
  40            'type' => 'Full-time', 'experience_level' => 'Mid-level', 'status' => 'Open',
  41        ]);
  42
  43        // Set up a seeker
  44        $seekerUser = User::create([
  45            'name' => 'Seeker', 'email' => 'seek@test.com',
  46            'password' => Hash::make('password'), 'role' => 'seeker', 'status' => 'active',
  47        ]);
  48        Seeker::create(['user_id' => $seekerUser->id]);
  49
  50        Sanctum::actingAs($seekerUser);
  51
  52        // Save the job — this hits SavedJob::create() which previously errored on
  53        // the missing created_at column. Should return 201.
  54        $this->postJson("/api/seeker/saved-jobs/{$job->id}")
  55            ->assertStatus(201);
  56
  57        // Listing the saved jobs hits ->orderByDesc('saved_at') — previously
  58        // used ->latest() which expanded to ORDER BY created_at, also a SQL error.
  59        $list = $this->getJson('/api/seeker/saved-jobs')
  60            ->assertStatus(200)
  61            ->json();
  62
  63        // Pagination wrapper from Laravel: {data: [...], current_page, ...}
  64        $items = $list['data'] ?? $list;
  65        $this->assertCount(1, $items);
  66        $this->assertEquals($job->id, $items[0]['job_listing_id']);
  67
  68        // Saving the same job twice should be rejected with 422 (already saved)
  69        $this->postJson("/api/seeker/saved-jobs/{$job->id}")
  70            ->assertStatus(422);
  71
  72        // Unsaving works
  73        $this->deleteJson("/api/seeker/saved-jobs/{$job->id}")
  74            ->assertStatus(200);
  75
  76        $this->assertDatabaseMissing('saved_jobs', [
  77            'seeker_id'      => $seekerUser->seeker->id,
  78            'job_listing_id' => $job->id,
  79        ]);
  80    }
  81}
  82
