categories.html · 157 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Job Categories — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/public.css">
  13</head>
  14<body>
  15  <header class="public-nav" id="public-header">
  16    <div class="public-nav-inner">
  17      <a href="index.html" class="public-nav-brand">WorkBridge PH</a>
  18      <ul class="public-nav-links">
  19        <li><a href="jobs.html">Jobs</a></li>
  20        <li><a href="categories.html">Categories</a></li>
  21        <li><a href="companies.html">Companies</a></li>
  22        <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
  23        <li><a href="help.html">Help</a></li>
  24        <li><a href="auth/login.html" class="btn btn-primary">Log in</a></li>
  25      </ul>
  26    </div>
  27  </header>
  28
  29  <main class="container page-transition py-4">
  30    <div class="text-center mb-4">
  31      <h1>Browse Jobs by Category</h1>
  32      <p class="text-secondary mx-auto" style="max-width:620px">
  33        Find work that matches your field — from professional and office roles to healthcare, trades, and service work.
  34      </p>
  35    </div>
  36
  37    <div id="categories-content">
  38      <p class="text-secondary text-center py-4">Loading categories…</p>
  39    </div>
  40
  41    <div class="text-center mt-5 pt-3" style="border-top:1px solid var(--color-border)">
  42      <p class="text-secondary mb-2">Don't see your field?</p>
  43      <a href="jobs.html" class="btn btn-secondary">Browse all jobs</a>
  44    </div>
  45  </main>
  46
  47  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  48  <script type="module" src="assets/js/app.js"></script>
  49  <script type="module">
  50    import { apiGetCategories } from './assets/js/api.js';
  51    import { esc } from './assets/js/utils.js';
  52
  53    /**
  54     * Bucket categories per the proposal's three-way classification:
  55     *   Professional / Healthcare / Service.
  56     * Categories whose slug isn't listed land in "Other Fields".
  57     */
  58    const BUCKETS = [
  59      {
  60        title: 'Professional & Office',
  61        subtitle: 'Office-based roles in technology, business, education, and the public sector.',
  62        icon: 'bi-briefcase',
  63        slugs: ['it', 'business', 'engineering', 'education', 'government', 'arts'],
  64      },
  65      {
  66        title: 'Healthcare & Skilled Trades',
  67        subtitle: 'Medical professionals, technicians, and licensed trade workers.',
  68        icon: 'bi-heart-pulse',
  69        slugs: ['healthcare'],
  70      },
  71      {
  72        title: 'Service & Hospitality',
  73        subtitle: 'Customer service, hospitality, household, and tourism roles.',
  74        icon: 'bi-cup-hot',
  75        slugs: ['hospitality'],
  76      },
  77    ];
  78
  79    const el = document.getElementById('categories-content');
  80
  81    apiGetCategories().then(res => {
  82      const cats = res.data || res;
  83
  84      if (!cats.length) {
  85        el.innerHTML = '<p class="text-secondary text-center py-4">No categories available yet.</p>';
  86        return;
  87      }
  88
  89      // Build a slug → category map for quick bucket assignment
  90      const bySlug = {};
  91      cats.forEach(c => { bySlug[c.slug] = c; });
  92
  93      // Track which slugs we've placed so we can spot leftovers
  94      const placed = new Set();
  95
  96      const sectionsHtml = BUCKETS.map(bucket => {
  97        const items = bucket.slugs.map(s => bySlug[s]).filter(Boolean);
  98        if (!items.length) return '';
  99        items.forEach(c => placed.add(c.slug));
 100        return renderBucket(bucket, items);
 101      }).join('');
 102
 103      // Anything not in our predefined buckets goes here. Future-proofs the page
 104      // when admins add new categories that don't match the three-way split.
 105      const leftovers = cats.filter(c => !placed.has(c.slug));
 106      const leftoverHtml = leftovers.length
 107        ? renderBucket(
 108            { title: 'Other Fields', subtitle: 'Additional industries on WorkBridge PH.', icon: 'bi-tags' },
 109            leftovers
 110          )
 111        : '';
 112
 113      el.innerHTML = sectionsHtml + leftoverHtml;
 114    }).catch(err => {
 115      el.innerHTML = `<p class="text-danger text-center py-4">Could not load categories: ${esc(err.message)}</p>`;
 116    });
 117
 118    function renderBucket(bucket, items) {
 119      return `
 120        <section class="mb-5">
 121          <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 mb-3">
 122            <i class="bi ${esc(bucket.icon)} fs-3 text-primary"></i>
 123            <div>
 124              <h2 class="mb-0 h4">${esc(bucket.title)}</h2>
 125              <p class="text-secondary small mb-0">${esc(bucket.subtitle)}</p>
 126            </div>
 127          </div>
 128          <div class="row g-3">
 129            ${items.map(c => renderCard(c)).join('')}
 130          </div>
 131        </section>`;
 132    }
 133
 134    function renderCard(c) {
 135      const count = c.job_listings_count ?? 0;
 136      const countLabel = count === 1 ? '1 open job' : `${count} open jobs`;
 137      return `
 138        <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
 139          <a href="jobs.html?category=${esc(String(c.id))}" class="job-card text-decoration-none text-dark d-block h-100">
 140            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-2">
 141              <span class="d-inline-flex align-items-center justify-content-center"
 142                style="width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--color-accent-muted);color:var(--color-accent);font-size:1.25rem">
 143                <i class="bi ${esc(c.icon || 'bi-tag')}"></i>
 144              </span>
 145              <h3 class="job-card-title mb-0">${esc(c.name)}</h3>
 146            </div>
 147            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mt-3">
 148              <span class="text-secondary small">${esc(countLabel)}</span>
 149              <span class="text-primary small">Browse <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
 150            </div>
 151          </a>
 152        </div>`;
 153    }
 154  </script>
 155</body>
 156</html>
 157
companies.html · 98 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Companies — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/public.css">
  13</head>
  14<body>
  15  <header class="public-nav">
  16    <div class="public-nav-inner">
  17      <a href="index.html" class="public-nav-brand">WorkBridge PH</a>
  18      <ul class="public-nav-links">
  19        <li><a href="jobs.html">Jobs</a></li>
  20        <li><a href="categories.html">Categories</a></li>
  21        <li><a href="companies.html">Companies</a></li>
  22        <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
  23        <li><a href="auth/login.html" class="btn btn-primary">Log in</a></li>
  24      </ul>
  25    </div>
  26  </header>
  27
  28  <main class="container page-transition py-4">
  29    <h1 class="mb-4">Companies</h1>
  30    <div class="card mb-4">
  31      <div class="card-body">
  32        <div class="row g-2">
  33          <div class="col-md-8"><input type="text" id="search-company" class="form-input" placeholder="Search companies"></div>
  34          <div class="col-md-4">
  35            <select id="filter-verified" class="form-select">
  36              <option value="">All</option>
  37              <option value="verified">Verified only</option>
  38            </select>
  39          </div>
  40        </div>
  41      </div>
  42    </div>
  43    <div id="companies-list" class="jobs-grid"></div>
  44  </main>
  45
  46  <script type="module" src="assets/js/app.js"></script>
  47  <script type="module">
  48    import { getCompaniesForBrowse } from './assets/js/jobs.module.js';
  49    import { esc, companyAvatar, verifiedBadge, emptyState } from './assets/js/utils.js';
  50
  51    const grid = document.getElementById('companies-list');
  52    let allCompanies = [];
  53
  54    async function load() {
  55      grid.innerHTML = '<p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p>';
  56      try {
  57        const { companies } = await getCompaniesForBrowse({});
  58        allCompanies = companies;
  59        render();
  60      } catch (err) {
  61        grid.innerHTML = `<p class="text-danger">Error loading companies: ${esc(err.message)}</p>`;
  62      }
  63    }
  64
  65    function render() {
  66      const q = (document.getElementById('search-company').value || '').toLowerCase();
  67      let list = allCompanies.filter(c =>
  68        !q || c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) || (c.industry || '').toLowerCase().includes(q)
  69      );
  70      if (!list.length) {
  71        grid.innerHTML = emptyState({
  72          icon: 'building',
  73          title: 'No companies match',
  74          subtitle: 'Try a different search term or browse all companies.',
  75        });
  76        return;
  77      }
  78      grid.innerHTML = list.map(c => `
  79        <a href="company-detail.html?id=${esc(c.id)}" class="job-card card-lift text-decoration-none text-dark">
  80          <div class="d-flex gap-3 align-items-start mb-2">
  81            ${companyAvatar(c, 56)}
  82            <div style="min-width:0;flex:1">
  83              <h3 class="job-card-title mb-1">${esc(c.name)}${verifiedBadge(c)}</h3>
  84              ${(c.verifiedStatus || c.verified_status) === 'Verified' ? '<span class="badge badge-verified"><i class="bi bi-patch-check-fill me-1"></i>Verified</span>' : ''}
  85            </div>
  86          </div>
  87          <p class="job-card-company mb-1">${esc(c.industry || '—')} · ${esc(c.size || '—')} employees</p>
  88          <p class="text-muted small mb-0"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> ${esc(c.location || '—')}</p>
  89        </a>
  90      `).join('');
  91    }
  92
  93    document.getElementById('search-company').addEventListener('input', render);
  94    load();
  95  </script>
  96</body>
  97</html>
  98
company-detail.html · 106 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Company — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/public.css">
  13  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/seeker.css">
  14</head>
  15<body>
  16  <header class="public-nav" id="public-header">
  17    <div class="public-nav-inner">
  18      <a href="index.html" class="public-nav-brand">WorkBridge PH</a>
  19      <ul class="public-nav-links">
  20        <li><a href="jobs.html">Jobs</a></li>
  21        <li><a href="companies.html">Companies</a></li>
  22        <li><a href="auth/login.html" class="btn btn-primary">Log in</a></li>
  23      </ul>
  24    </div>
  25  </header>
  26
  27  <main class="container page-transition py-4">
  28    <div id="company-content"></div>
  29  </main>
  30
  31  <script type="module" src="assets/js/app.js"></script>
  32  <script type="module">
  33    import { getCompanyById } from './assets/js/jobs.module.js';
  34    import { getQueryParams } from './assets/js/router.js';
  35    import { getCurrentUser } from './assets/js/store.js';
  36    import { esc, formatSalaryRange, companyAvatar, verifiedBadge, emptyState } from './assets/js/utils.js';
  37
  38    const params = getQueryParams();
  39    const user = getCurrentUser();
  40
  41    if (user) {
  42      document.getElementById('public-header').style.display = 'none';
  43      document.body.classList.add('wb-loading');
  44      const mainEl = document.querySelector('main');
  45      mainEl.classList.remove('container', 'py-4');
  46      mainEl.classList.add('app-main');
  47      const contentWrap = document.createElement('div');
  48      contentWrap.className = 'app-content';
  49      while (mainEl.firstChild) contentWrap.appendChild(mainEl.firstChild);
  50      mainEl.appendChild(contentWrap);
  51      const appLayout = document.createElement('div');
  52      appLayout.id = 'app-layout';
  53      appLayout.className = 'app-layout';
  54      mainEl.parentNode.insertBefore(appLayout, mainEl);
  55      appLayout.appendChild(mainEl);
  56      import('./assets/js/layout.js').then(m => m.renderLayout(user.role, 'Company Detail'));
  57    }
  58
  59    const el = document.getElementById('company-content');
  60    el.innerHTML = '<p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p>';
  61
  62    getCompanyById(params.id).then(company => {
  63      document.title = company.name + ' — WorkBridge PH';
  64      el.innerHTML = `
  65        <div class="card mb-4">
  66          <div class="card-body">
  67            <div class="d-flex gap-3 align-items-start mb-3">
  68              ${companyAvatar(company, 72)}
  69              <div style="min-width:0;flex:1">
  70                <h1 class="mb-1">${esc(company.name)}${verifiedBadge(company, 18)}</h1>
  71                <p class="text-secondary mb-0">${esc(company.industry || '—')} · ${esc(company.size || '—')} employees · ${esc(company.location || '—')}</p>
  72              </div>
  73            </div>
  74            ${(company.verifiedStatus || company.verified_status) === 'Verified' ? '<span class="badge badge-verified mb-3"><i class="bi bi-patch-check-fill me-1"></i>Verified</span>' : ''}
  75            <p>${esc(company.description || '')}</p>
  76            ${company.website ? `<a href="${esc(company.website)}" class="btn btn-secondary" target="_blank">Visit Website</a>` : ''}
  77          </div>
  78        </div>
  79        <h3 class="mb-3">Open Positions (${company.openJobs?.length || 0})</h3>
  80        <div id="company-jobs" class="jobs-grid"></div>
  81      `;
  82      const jobsEl = document.getElementById('company-jobs');
  83      const jobs = company.openJobs || [];
  84      jobsEl.innerHTML = jobs.length === 0
  85        ? emptyState({
  86            icon: 'briefcase',
  87            title: 'No open positions at the moment',
  88            subtitle: 'This company is not actively hiring. Check back soon.',
  89          })
  90        : jobs.map(j => `
  91            <a href="job-detail.html?id=${esc(j.id)}" class="job-card card-lift text-decoration-none text-dark">
  92              <h3 class="job-card-title">${esc(j.title)}</h3>
  93              <div class="job-card-meta">
  94                <span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> ${esc(j.location)}</span>
  95                <span><i class="bi bi-briefcase"></i> ${esc(j.type)}</span>
  96              </div>
  97              <p class="job-card-salary mb-0">${formatSalaryRange(j.salaryMin, j.salaryMax)}</p>
  98            </a>
  99          `).join('');
 100    }).catch(() => {
 101      el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><p>Company not found.</p><a href="companies.html">Browse companies</a></div>';
 102    });
 103  </script>
 104</body>
 105</html>
 106
employer/applicant-detail.html · 116 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Applicant — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <div id="applicant-content"><p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p></div>
  19      </div>
  20    </main>
  21  </div>
  22
  23  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  24  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  25  <script type="module">
  26    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  27    import { apiGetApplication, apiUpdateApplicationStatus } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  28    import { getQueryParams } from '../assets/js/router.js';
  29    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  30    import { esc } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  31
  32    renderLayout('employer', 'Applicant Detail');
  33
  34    const params = getQueryParams();
  35    const el = document.getElementById('applicant-content');
  36
  37    if (!params.id) {
  38      el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><p>Not found.</p><a href="applicants.html" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm">Back</a></div>';
  39    } else {
  40      apiGetApplication(params.id).then(app => {
  41        const seeker = app.seeker;
  42        const job = app.job_listing;
  43        const name = seeker?.user?.name || 'Applicant';
  44        const email = seeker?.user?.email || '-';
  45        const skills = (seeker?.skills || []).map(s => s.skill || s).join(', ');
  46
  47        el.innerHTML = `
  48          <a href="applicants.html" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm mb-3"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back</a>
  49          <div class="row">
  50            <div class="col-lg-8">
  51              <div class="card mb-4">
  52                <div class="card-header"><h3>Applicant Info</h3></div>
  53                <div class="card-body">
  54                  <h4>${esc(name)}</h4>
  55                  <p class="text-secondary">${esc(email)}</p>
  56                  ${skills ? `<p><strong>Skills:</strong> ${esc(skills)}</p>` : ''}
  57                  ${seeker?.headline ? `<p><em>${esc(seeker.headline)}</em></p>` : ''}
  58                  ${app.cover_letter ? `<div class="mt-3"><strong>Cover Letter:</strong><p>${esc(app.cover_letter)}</p></div>` : ''}
  59                  ${app.skill_fit != null ? `<p class="mt-2"><strong>Skill Fit:</strong> ${app.skill_fit}%</p>` : ''}
  60                </div>
  61              </div>
  62              <div class="card mb-4">
  63                <div class="card-header"><h3>Timeline</h3></div>
  64                <div class="card-body">
  65                  ${(app.timelines || []).map(t => `
  66                    <div class="d-flex mb-3">
  67                      <div class="rounded-circle bg-primary text-white d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center me-3" style="width:36px;height:36px;flex-shrink:0">✓</div>
  68                      <div>
  69                        <strong>${esc(t.status)}</strong>
  70                        <p class="text-secondary small mb-0">${new Date(t.created_at).toLocaleString()}${t.note ? ' · ' + esc(t.note) : ''}</p>
  71                      </div>
  72                    </div>`).join('')}
  73                </div>
  74              </div>
  75            </div>
  76            <div class="col-lg-4">
  77              <div class="card mb-4">
  78                <div class="card-header"><h3>Status</h3></div>
  79                <div class="card-body">
  80                  <span id="app-status" class="badge badge-${esc(app.status.toLowerCase())}">${esc(app.status)}</span>
  81                  ${job ? `<p class="text-muted small mt-2">For: ${esc(job.title)}</p>` : ''}
  82                  <div id="status-note-wrap" class="mt-3">
  83                    <textarea id="status-note" class="form-textarea mb-2" rows="2" placeholder="Optional note..."></textarea>
  84                  </div>
  85                  <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-1 mt-2">
  86                    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary status-btn" data-s="Reviewing">Reviewing</button>
  87                    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary status-btn" data-s="Interview">Interview</button>
  88                    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-success status-btn" data-s="Hired">Hire</button>
  89                    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger status-btn" data-s="Rejected">Reject</button>
  90                  </div>
  91                </div>
  92              </div>
  93            </div>
  94          </div>`;
  95
  96        el.querySelectorAll('.status-btn').forEach(btn => {
  97          btn.onclick = async () => {
  98            const note = document.getElementById('status-note').value.trim();
  99            btn.disabled = true;
 100            try {
 101              await apiUpdateApplicationStatus(app.id, btn.dataset.s, note || null);
 102              toastSuccess('Status updated to ' + btn.dataset.s);
 103              document.getElementById('app-status').textContent = btn.dataset.s;
 104              document.getElementById('app-status').className = 'badge badge-' + btn.dataset.s.toLowerCase();
 105            } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); }
 106            finally { btn.disabled = false; }
 107          };
 108        });
 109      }).catch(() => {
 110        el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><p>Applicant not found.</p><a href="applicants.html" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm">Back</a></div>';
 111      });
 112    }
 113  </script>
 114</body>
 115</html>
 116
employer/applicants.html · 80 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Applicants — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Applicants</h1>
  19        <div class="mb-4">
  20          <label class="form-label">Select Job</label>
  21          <select id="job-select" class="form-select" style="max-width:300px"></select>
  22        </div>
  23        <div id="applicants-list"></div>
  24      </div>
  25    </main>
  26  </div>
  27
  28  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  29  <script type="module">
  30    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  31    import { getEmployerJobs } from '../assets/js/employer.module.js';
  32    import { apiJobApplications } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  33    import { esc } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  34
  35    renderLayout('employer', 'Applicants');
  36
  37    const sel = document.getElementById('job-select');
  38    const list = document.getElementById('applicants-list');
  39    list.innerHTML = '<p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p>';
  40
  41    async function renderApps() {
  42      if (!sel.value) { list.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><p>Select a job above.</p></div>'; return; }
  43      list.innerHTML = '<p class="text-secondary">Loading applicants…</p>';
  44      try {
  45        const res = await apiJobApplications(sel.value);
  46        const apps = res.data || res;
  47        if (!apps.length) { list.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><p>No applicants for this job.</p></div>'; return; }
  48        list.innerHTML = apps.map(a => {
  49          const name = a.seeker?.user?.name || 'Applicant';
  50          const skills = (a.seeker?.skills || []).map(s => s.skill || s).join(', ');
  51          return `
  52            <div class="card mb-2">
  53              <div class="card-body d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
  54                <div>
  55                  <h5 class="mb-1">${esc(name)}</h5>
  56                  ${skills ? `<p class="text-muted small mb-1">${esc(skills)}</p>` : ''}
  57                  <span class="badge badge-${esc(a.status.toLowerCase())}">${esc(a.status)}</span>
  58                  ${a.skill_fit != null ? `<span class="ms-2 text-muted small">Fit: ${a.skill_fit}%</span>` : ''}
  59                </div>
  60                <a href="applicant-detail.html?id=${esc(a.id)}" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">View</a>
  61              </div>
  62            </div>`;
  63        }).join('');
  64      } catch (err) {
  65        list.innerHTML = `<p class="text-danger">${esc(err.message)}</p>`;
  66      }
  67    }
  68
  69    getEmployerJobs().then(jobs => {
  70      sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">— Select a job —</option>';
  71      jobs.forEach(j => sel.add(new Option(j.title, j.id)));
  72      if (jobs[0]) { sel.value = jobs[0].id; renderApps(); }
  73      else list.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><p>No jobs posted yet.</p></div>';
  74    });
  75
  76    sel.onchange = renderApps;
  77  </script>
  78</body>
  79</html>
  80
employer/company-profile.html · 93 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Company Profile — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Company Profile</h1>
  19        <div class="card">
  20          <div class="card-body" id="company-form"><p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p></div>
  21        </div>
  22      </div>
  23    </main>
  24  </div>
  25
  26  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  27  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  28  <script type="module">
  29    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  30    import { apiMyCompany, apiUpdateCompany } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  31    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  32    import { esc } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  33
  34    renderLayout('employer', 'Company Profile');
  35
  36    const el = document.getElementById('company-form');
  37
  38    function renderForm(co) {
  39      co = co || {};
  40      el.innerHTML =
  41        '<form id="co-form">' +
  42          '<div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Company Name *</label>' +
  43            '<input type="text" name="name" class="form-input" value="' + esc(co.name || '') + '" required></div>' +
  44          '<div class="row"><div class="col-md-6">' +
  45            '<div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Industry</label>' +
  46              '<input type="text" name="industry" class="form-input" value="' + esc(co.industry || '') + '" placeholder="e.g. Technology"></div></div>' +
  47          '<div class="col-md-6">' +
  48            '<div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Company Size</label>' +
  49              '<select name="size" class="form-select">' +
  50                '<option value="">Select size</option>' +
  51                ['1-10','11-50','51-200','201-500','500+'].map(s => '<option value="' + s + '"' + (s === (co.size || '') ? ' selected' : '') + '>' + s + ' employees</option>').join('') +
  52              '</select></div></div></div>' +
  53          '<div class="row"><div class="col-md-6">' +
  54            '<div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">City</label>' +
  55              '<input type="text" name="city" class="form-input" value="' + esc(co.city || '') + '" placeholder="e.g. Manila"></div></div>' +
  56          '<div class="col-md-6">' +
  57            '<div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Province</label>' +
  58              '<input type="text" name="province" class="form-input" value="' + esc(co.province || '') + '"></div></div></div>' +
  59          '<div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Website</label>' +
  60            '<input type="url" name="website" class="form-input" value="' + esc(co.website || '') + '" placeholder="https://"></div>' +
  61          '<div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Description</label>' +
  62            '<textarea name="description" class="form-textarea" rows="4">' + esc(co.description || '') + '</textarea></div>' +
  63          '<button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Save Profile</button>' +
  64        '</form>';
  65
  66      document.getElementById('co-form').onsubmit = async function(e) {
  67        e.preventDefault();
  68        const fd = new FormData(e.target);
  69        const btn = e.target.querySelector('button[type=submit]');
  70        btn.disabled = true;
  71        try {
  72          await apiUpdateCompany({
  73            name: fd.get('name'),
  74            industry: fd.get('industry'),
  75            size: fd.get('size'),
  76            city: fd.get('city'),
  77            province: fd.get('province'),
  78            website: fd.get('website'),
  79            description: fd.get('description'),
  80          });
  81          toastSuccess('Company profile saved');
  82        } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); }
  83        finally { btn.disabled = false; }
  84      };
  85    }
  86
  87    apiMyCompany()
  88      .then(co => renderForm(co))
  89      .catch(() => renderForm(null));
  90  </script>
  91</body>
  92</html>
  93
employer/dashboard.html · 246 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Dashboard — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Dashboard</h1>
  19
  20        <!-- Top-line counters -->
  21        <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
  22          <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
  23            <a href="manage-jobs.html" class="text-decoration-none text-dark">
  24              <div class="stat-card card">
  25                <div class="stat-value" id="stat-jobs">—</div>
  26                <div class="stat-label">Active Jobs</div>
  27              </div>
  28            </a>
  29          </div>
  30          <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
  31            <a href="applicants.html" class="text-decoration-none text-dark">
  32              <div class="stat-card card">
  33                <div class="stat-value" id="stat-apps">—</div>
  34                <div class="stat-label">Total Applicants</div>
  35              </div>
  36            </a>
  37          </div>
  38          <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
  39            <div class="stat-card card">
  40              <div class="stat-value" id="stat-short">—</div>
  41              <div class="stat-label">Shortlisted</div>
  42            </div>
  43          </div>
  44          <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
  45            <div class="stat-card card">
  46              <div class="stat-value" id="stat-hires">—</div>
  47              <div class="stat-label">Hires</div>
  48            </div>
  49          </div>
  50        </div>
  51
  52        <!-- Row 1: pipeline donut + jobs status bar -->
  53        <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
  54          <div class="col-lg-6">
  55            <div class="card h-100">
  56              <div class="card-header"><h3 class="card-title mb-0">Applications Pipeline</h3></div>
  57              <div class="card-body">
  58                <div style="position:relative;height:280px"><canvas id="chart-apps-status"></canvas></div>
  59              </div>
  60            </div>
  61          </div>
  62          <div class="col-lg-6">
  63            <div class="card h-100">
  64              <div class="card-header"><h3 class="card-title mb-0">My Jobs by Status</h3></div>
  65              <div class="card-body">
  66                <div style="position:relative;height:280px"><canvas id="chart-jobs-status"></canvas></div>
  67              </div>
  68            </div>
  69          </div>
  70        </div>
  71
  72        <!-- Row 2: top jobs + 30-day trend -->
  73        <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
  74          <div class="col-lg-6">
  75            <div class="card h-100">
  76              <div class="card-header"><h3 class="card-title mb-0">Top Performing Jobs</h3></div>
  77              <div class="card-body">
  78                <div style="position:relative;height:280px"><canvas id="chart-top-jobs"></canvas></div>
  79              </div>
  80            </div>
  81          </div>
  82          <div class="col-lg-6">
  83            <div class="card h-100">
  84              <div class="card-header"><h3 class="card-title mb-0">Applications · Last 30 Days</h3></div>
  85              <div class="card-body">
  86                <div style="position:relative;height:280px"><canvas id="chart-apps-trend"></canvas></div>
  87              </div>
  88            </div>
  89          </div>
  90        </div>
  91      </div>
  92    </main>
  93  </div>
  94
  95  <!-- Chart.js — same CDN as admin analytics, browser caches the second load -->
  96  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.1/dist/chart.umd.js"></script>
  97  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  98  <script type="module">
  99    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
 100    import { apiEmployerDashboard } from '../assets/js/api.js';
 101
 102    renderLayout('employer', 'Dashboard');
 103
 104    // Same brand palette used by admin analytics — keeps the visual language consistent
 105    // across roles. If we ever theme the app, both pages update from one source.
 106    const PALETTE = {
 107      primary: '#4F46E5',
 108      teal:    '#0D9488',
 109      amber:   '#F59E0B',
 110      rose:    '#E11D48',
 111      slate:   '#64748B',
 112      emerald: '#10B981',
 113      sky:     '#0EA5E9',
 114      violet:  '#8B5CF6',
 115    };
 116
 117    function donut(ctx, labels, data, colors) {
 118      return new Chart(ctx, {
 119        type: 'doughnut',
 120        data: { labels, datasets: [{ data, backgroundColor: colors, borderWidth: 0 }] },
 121        options: {
 122          responsive: true,
 123          maintainAspectRatio: false,
 124          cutout: '60%',
 125          plugins: {
 126            legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { padding: 16, boxWidth: 12, font: { size: 12 } } },
 127            tooltip: { callbacks: { label: c => `${c.label}: ${c.parsed}` } },
 128          },
 129        },
 130      });
 131    }
 132
 133    function bar(ctx, labels, data, colors, horizontal = false) {
 134      return new Chart(ctx, {
 135        type: 'bar',
 136        data: { labels, datasets: [{ data, backgroundColor: colors, borderRadius: 6, borderWidth: 0 }] },
 137        options: {
 138          indexAxis: horizontal ? 'y' : 'x',
 139          responsive: true,
 140          maintainAspectRatio: false,
 141          plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
 142          scales: {
 143            [horizontal ? 'x' : 'y']: { beginAtZero: true, ticks: { precision: 0 }, grid: { color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.05)' } },
 144            [horizontal ? 'y' : 'x']: { grid: { display: false } },
 145          },
 146        },
 147      });
 148    }
 149
 150    function line(ctx, labels, data) {
 151      return new Chart(ctx, {
 152        type: 'line',
 153        data: {
 154          labels,
 155          datasets: [{
 156            data,
 157            borderColor: PALETTE.primary,
 158            backgroundColor: 'rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.1)',
 159            borderWidth: 2,
 160            tension: 0.3,
 161            fill: true,
 162            pointRadius: 2,
 163            pointHoverRadius: 4,
 164          }],
 165        },
 166        options: {
 167          responsive: true,
 168          maintainAspectRatio: false,
 169          plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
 170          scales: {
 171            y: { beginAtZero: true, ticks: { precision: 0 }, grid: { color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.05)' } },
 172            x: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { maxTicksLimit: 6 } },
 173          },
 174        },
 175      });
 176    }
 177
 178    /**
 179     * Build a dense 30-day series from a sparse {date: count} object.
 180     * The backend only returns days that had applications; we fill in zeros
 181     * so the line chart shows a continuous timeline instead of skipping days.
 182     */
 183    function fill30Days(sparse) {
 184      const labels = [];
 185      const data = [];
 186      const today = new Date();
 187      for (let i = 29; i >= 0; i--) {
 188        const d = new Date(today);
 189        d.setDate(today.getDate() - i);
 190        const key = d.toISOString().slice(0, 10); // YYYY-MM-DD
 191        labels.push(d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' }));
 192        data.push(sparse[key] || 0);
 193      }
 194      return { labels, data };
 195    }
 196
 197    apiEmployerDashboard().then(d => {
 198      // Top-line counters
 199      document.getElementById('stat-jobs').textContent  = d.totals.active_jobs ?? 0;
 200      document.getElementById('stat-apps').textContent  = d.totals.total_applicants ?? 0;
 201      document.getElementById('stat-short').textContent = d.totals.shortlisted ?? 0;
 202      document.getElementById('stat-hires').textContent = d.totals.hires ?? 0;
 203
 204      // Applications pipeline — donut, status order matches lifecycle progression
 205      const apps = d.applications_by_status || {};
 206      donut(
 207        document.getElementById('chart-apps-status'),
 208        ['Pending', 'Reviewing', 'Interview', 'Hired', 'Rejected'],
 209        [apps.Pending || 0, apps.Reviewing || 0, apps.Interview || 0, apps.Hired || 0, apps.Rejected || 0],
 210        [PALETTE.amber, PALETTE.sky, PALETTE.violet, PALETTE.emerald, PALETTE.rose]
 211      );
 212
 213      // Jobs by status — bar
 214      const jobs = d.jobs_by_status || {};
 215      bar(
 216        document.getElementById('chart-jobs-status'),
 217        ['Open', 'Draft', 'Closed'],
 218        [jobs.Open || 0, jobs.Draft || 0, jobs.Closed || 0],
 219        [PALETTE.teal, PALETTE.amber, PALETTE.slate]
 220      );
 221
 222      // Top jobs — horizontal bar (long titles read better horizontally)
 223      const top = d.top_jobs || [];
 224      if (top.length) {
 225        bar(
 226          document.getElementById('chart-top-jobs'),
 227          top.map(j => j.title.length > 28 ? j.title.slice(0, 27) + '…' : j.title),
 228          top.map(j => j.applications_count),
 229          top.map(() => PALETTE.primary),
 230          true /* horizontal */
 231        );
 232      } else {
 233        const el = document.getElementById('chart-top-jobs').parentElement;
 234        el.innerHTML = '<div class="d-flex h-100 align-items-center justify-content-center text-secondary">Post a job to start tracking applications.</div>';
 235      }
 236
 237      // Applications trend — 30-day line, fill in missing days with zero
 238      const { labels, data } = fill30Days(d.applications_last_30_days || {});
 239      line(document.getElementById('chart-apps-trend'), labels, data);
 240    }).catch(err => {
 241      console.error('Employer dashboard load failed', err);
 242    });
 243  </script>
 244</body>
 245</html>
 246
employer/job-edit.html · 82 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Edit Job — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Edit Job</h1>
  19        <div id="edit-form-wrap"></div>
  20      </div>
  21    </main>
  22  </div>
  23
  24  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  25  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  26  <script type="module">
  27    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  28    import { apiUpdateJob } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  29    import { getJobById } from '../assets/js/jobs.module.js';
  30    import { getQueryParams } from '../assets/js/router.js';
  31    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  32    import { esc } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  33
  34    renderLayout('employer', 'Edit Job');
  35    const params = getQueryParams();
  36    const wrap = document.getElementById('edit-form-wrap');
  37    wrap.innerHTML = '<p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p>';
  38
  39    getJobById(params.id).then(job => {
  40      function sel(name, val, opts) {
  41        return '<select name="' + name + '" class="form-select">' + opts.map(o => '<option value="' + o + '"' + (o === val ? ' selected' : '') + '>' + o + '</option>').join('') + '</select>';
  42      }
  43      wrap.innerHTML = '<form id="edit-form" class="card"><div class="card-body">' +
  44        '<div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Job Title *</label><input type="text" name="title" class="form-input" value="' + esc(job.title) + '" required></div>' +
  45        '<div class="row"><div class="col-md-6"><div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Job Type</label>' + sel('type', job.type, ['Full-time','Part-time','Contract','Freelance','Internship']) + '</div></div>' +
  46        '<div class="col-md-6"><div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Experience Level</label>' + sel('experience_level', job.experienceLevel, ['Entry-level','Mid-level','Senior','Executive']) + '</div></div></div>' +
  47        '<div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Location *</label><input type="text" name="location" class="form-input" value="' + esc(job.location) + '" required></div>' +
  48        '<div class="row"><div class="col-md-6"><div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Salary Min</label><input type="number" name="salary_min" class="form-input" value="' + (job.salaryMin || '') + '"></div></div>' +
  49        '<div class="col-md-6"><div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Salary Max</label><input type="number" name="salary_max" class="form-input" value="' + (job.salaryMax || '') + '"></div></div></div>' +
  50        '<div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Tags (comma-separated)</label><input type="text" name="tags" class="form-input" value="' + esc((job.tags || []).join(', ')) + '"></div>' +
  51        '<div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Description *</label><textarea name="description" class="form-textarea" required>' + esc(job.description || '') + '</textarea></div>' +
  52        '<div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Requirements</label><textarea name="requirements" class="form-textarea">' + esc(job.requirements || '') + '</textarea></div>' +
  53        '<div class="form-group mb-3"><label class="form-label">Status</label>' + sel('status', job.status === 'Active' ? 'Open' : job.status, ['Open','Closed','Draft']) + '</div>' +
  54        '<button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Save Changes</button>' +
  55        '</div></form>';
  56
  57      document.getElementById('edit-form').onsubmit = async function(e) {
  58        e.preventDefault();
  59        const fd = new FormData(e.target);
  60        const btn = e.target.querySelector('button[type=submit]');
  61        btn.disabled = true;
  62        try {
  63          await apiUpdateJob(job.id, {
  64            title: fd.get('title'), type: fd.get('type'),
  65            experience_level: fd.get('experience_level'),
  66            location: fd.get('location'),
  67            salary_min: parseInt(fd.get('salary_min')) || null,
  68            salary_max: parseInt(fd.get('salary_max')) || null,
  69            tags: (fd.get('tags') || '').split(',').map(t => t.trim()).filter(Boolean),
  70            description: fd.get('description'),
  71            requirements: fd.get('requirements') || '',
  72            status: fd.get('status'),
  73          });
  74          toastSuccess('Job updated');
  75          setTimeout(() => window.location.href = 'manage-jobs.html', 500);
  76        } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); btn.disabled = false; }
  77      };
  78    }).catch(() => { wrap.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><p>Job not found.</p></div>'; });
  79  </script>
  80</body>
  81</html>
  82
employer/manage-jobs.html · 42 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Manage Jobs — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Manage Jobs</h1>
  19        <div class="chip-group mb-4">
  20          <button class="chip active" data-status="">All</button>
  21          <button class="chip" data-status="Active">Active</button>
  22          <button class="chip" data-status="Pending">Pending</button>
  23          <button class="chip" data-status="Closed">Closed</button>
  24        </div>
  25        <div class="card">
  26          <div class="table-wrap">
  27            <table class="table">
  28              <thead><tr><th>Job</th><th>Location</th><th>Status</th><th>Posted</th><th>Actions</th></tr></thead>
  29              <tbody id="jobs-tbody"></tbody>
  30            </table>
  31          </div>
  32        </div>
  33      </div>
  34    </main>
  35  </div>
  36
  37  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  38  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  39  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/employer-manage.js"></script>
  40</body>
  41</html>
  42
employer/messages.html · 170 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Messages — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Messages</h1>
  19        <div class="row g-3">
  20          <div class="col-md-4">
  21            <div class="card" style="min-height:400px">
  22              <div class="card-body p-0">
  23                <div style="padding:var(--space-md);border-bottom:1px solid var(--color-border)">
  24                  <input type="text" id="search-contacts" class="form-input" placeholder="Search applicants...">
  25                </div>
  26                <div id="contact-list"></div>
  27              </div>
  28            </div>
  29          </div>
  30          <div class="col-md-8">
  31            <div class="card" style="min-height:400px;display:flex;flex-direction:column">
  32              <div id="chat-header" style="padding:var(--space-md);border-bottom:1px solid var(--color-border);font-weight:600"></div>
  33              <div id="chat-messages" style="flex:1;padding:var(--space-md);overflow-y:auto;max-height:300px"></div>
  34              <div id="chat-input-wrap" style="padding:var(--space-md);border-top:1px solid var(--color-border);display:none">
  35                <div class="d-flex gap-2">
  36                  <input type="text" id="chat-input" class="form-input" placeholder="Type a message...">
  37                  <button id="send-btn" class="btn btn-primary"><i class="bi bi-send"></i></button>
  38                </div>
  39              </div>
  40            </div>
  41          </div>
  42        </div>
  43      </div>
  44    </main>
  45  </div>
  46
  47  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  48  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  49  <script type="module">
  50    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  51    import { getCurrentUser } from '../assets/js/store.js';
  52    import { apiGetContacts, apiGetThread, apiSendMessage } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  53    import { toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  54    import { esc, emptyState } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  55
  56    renderLayout('employer', 'Messages');
  57
  58    const user = getCurrentUser();
  59    let contacts = [];
  60    let activeContact = null;
  61    let thread = [];
  62
  63    async function loadContacts() {
  64      try {
  65        const res = await apiGetContacts();
  66        contacts = res.data || res;
  67        renderContacts();
  68      } catch (err) {
  69        document.getElementById('contact-list').innerHTML = `<p class="text-danger p-3">${esc(err.message)}</p>`;
  70      }
  71    }
  72
  73    function renderContacts() {
  74      const q = (document.getElementById('search-contacts').value || '').toLowerCase();
  75      const contactList = document.getElementById('contact-list');
  76      const filtered = contacts.filter(c => {
  77        const name = c.name || '';
  78        return !q || name.toLowerCase().includes(q);
  79      });
  80
  81      if (!filtered.length) {
  82        contactList.innerHTML = emptyState({
  83          icon: 'chat-dots',
  84          title: 'No conversations yet',
  85          subtitle: 'Applicants will appear here once you message them.',
  86        });
  87        return;
  88      }
  89
  90      contactList.innerHTML = filtered.map(c => {
  91        const isActive = activeContact?.id === c.id;
  92        return `<div class="msg-contact${isActive ? ' msg-contact-active' : ''}" data-id="${esc(String(c.id))}" style="padding:var(--space-md);border-bottom:1px solid var(--color-border-subtle);cursor:pointer;${isActive ? 'background:var(--color-accent-muted)' : ''}">
  93          <div class="fw-bold">${esc(c.name || 'Applicant')}</div>
  94          <div class="text-muted small text-truncate">${c.last_message ? esc(c.last_message) : 'No messages'}</div>
  95        </div>`;
  96      }).join('');
  97
  98      contactList.querySelectorAll('.msg-contact').forEach(el => {
  99        el.onclick = () => {
 100          activeContact = contacts.find(c => String(c.id) === el.dataset.id);
 101          renderContacts();
 102          loadThread();
 103        };
 104      });
 105    }
 106
 107    async function loadThread() {
 108      if (!activeContact) return;
 109      const header = document.getElementById('chat-header');
 110      const messagesEl = document.getElementById('chat-messages');
 111      const inputWrap = document.getElementById('chat-input-wrap');
 112
 113      header.textContent = activeContact.name || 'Applicant';
 114      inputWrap.style.display = 'block';
 115      messagesEl.innerHTML = '<p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p>';
 116
 117      try {
 118        const res = await apiGetThread(activeContact.id);
 119        thread = res.data || res;
 120        renderThread();
 121      } catch (err) {
 122        messagesEl.innerHTML = `<p class="text-danger">${esc(err.message)}</p>`;
 123      }
 124    }
 125
 126    function renderThread() {
 127      const messagesEl = document.getElementById('chat-messages');
 128      if (!thread.length) {
 129        messagesEl.innerHTML = '<div class="text-muted text-center py-4">No messages yet. Start the conversation!</div>';
 130        return;
 131      }
 132      messagesEl.innerHTML = thread.map(m => {
 133        const isMine = m.sender_id === user?.id;
 134        return `<div style="margin-bottom:var(--space-sm);text-align:${isMine ? 'right' : 'left'}">
 135          <div style="display:inline-block;max-width:75%;padding:var(--space-sm) var(--space-md);border-radius:var(--radius-md);background:${isMine ? 'var(--color-accent)' : 'var(--color-bg-elevated)'};color:${isMine ? 'white' : 'var(--color-text)'}">
 136            ${esc(m.body)}
 137          </div>
 138          <div class="text-muted" style="font-size:var(--text-xs)">${new Date(m.created_at).toLocaleTimeString([], {hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})}</div>
 139        </div>`;
 140      }).join('');
 141      messagesEl.scrollTop = messagesEl.scrollHeight;
 142    }
 143
 144    async function sendMessage() {
 145      const input = document.getElementById('chat-input');
 146      const text = input.value.trim();
 147      if (!text || !activeContact) return;
 148      input.value = '';
 149      try {
 150        const msg = await apiSendMessage(activeContact.id, text);
 151        thread.push(msg);
 152        renderThread();
 153      } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); input.value = text; }
 154    }
 155
 156    document.getElementById('send-btn').onclick = sendMessage;
 157    document.getElementById('chat-input').onkeydown = e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') sendMessage(); };
 158    document.getElementById('search-contacts').oninput = renderContacts;
 159
 160    document.getElementById('chat-messages').innerHTML = emptyState({
 161      icon: 'chat-left-text',
 162      title: 'Select a conversation',
 163      subtitle: 'Pick a contact on the left to view your messages.',
 164    });
 165
 166    loadContacts();
 167  </script>
 168</body>
 169</html>
 170
employer/post-job.html · 167 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Post Job — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Post a Job</h1>
  19        <div class="row">
  20          <div class="col-lg-8">
  21            <form id="job-form" class="card mb-4">
  22              <div class="card-body">
  23                <div class="form-group mb-3">
  24                  <label class="form-label">Job Title *</label>
  25                  <input type="text" name="title" class="form-input" required>
  26                </div>
  27                <div class="row">
  28                  <div class="col-md-6">
  29                    <div class="form-group mb-3">
  30                      <label class="form-label">Job Type</label>
  31                      <select name="type" class="form-select"><option value="Full-time">Full-time</option><option value="Part-time">Part-time</option><option value="Contract">Contract</option></select>
  32                    </div>
  33                  </div>
  34                  <div class="col-md-6">
  35                    <div class="form-group mb-3">
  36                      <label class="form-label">Setup</label>
  37                      <select name="setup" class="form-select"><option value="On-site">On-site</option><option value="Remote">Remote</option><option value="Hybrid">Hybrid</option></select>
  38                    </div>
  39                  </div>
  40                </div>
  41                <div class="form-group mb-3">
  42                  <label class="form-label">Location *</label>
  43                  <input type="text" name="location" class="form-input" required placeholder="e.g. Manila">
  44                </div>
  45                <div class="row">
  46                  <div class="col-md-6">
  47                    <div class="form-group mb-3">
  48                      <label class="form-label">Salary Min (₱)</label>
  49                      <input type="number" name="salaryMin" class="form-input" placeholder="15000">
  50                    </div>
  51                  </div>
  52                  <div class="col-md-6">
  53                    <div class="form-group mb-3">
  54                      <label class="form-label">Salary Max (₱)</label>
  55                      <input type="number" name="salaryMax" class="form-input" placeholder="25000">
  56                    </div>
  57                  </div>
  58                </div>
  59                <div class="form-group mb-3">
  60                  <label class="form-label">Description *</label>
  61                  <textarea name="description" class="form-textarea" required></textarea>
  62                </div>
  63                <div class="form-group mb-3">
  64                  <label class="form-label">Requirements</label>
  65                  <textarea name="requirements" class="form-textarea"></textarea>
  66                </div>
  67                <div class="form-group mb-3">
  68                  <label class="form-label">Experience Level</label>
  69                  <select name="experience" class="form-select">
  70                    <option value="Entry level">Entry level</option>
  71                    <option value="1-2 years">1-2 years</option>
  72                    <option value="3-5 years">3-5 years</option>
  73                    <option value="5+ years">5+ years</option>
  74                  </select>
  75                </div>
  76                <div class="form-group mb-3">
  77                  <label class="form-label">Tags (comma-separated)</label>
  78                  <input type="text" name="tags" class="form-input" placeholder="PHP, JavaScript, Communication">
  79                </div>
  80                <div class="form-group mb-3">
  81                  <label class="form-label">Benefits</label>
  82                  <input type="text" name="benefits" class="form-input" placeholder="HMO, 13th month pay">
  83                </div>
  84                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Submit for Review</button>
  85              </div>
  86            </form>
  87          </div>
  88          <div class="col-lg-4">
  89            <div class="card sticky-top" style="top: 80px;">
  90              <div class="card-header"><h3 class="card-title mb-0">Preview</h3></div>
  91              <div class="card-body" id="preview-panel">
  92                <p class="text-muted small">Fill the form to see preview.</p>
  93              </div>
  94            </div>
  95          </div>
  96        </div>
  97      </div>
  98    </main>
  99  </div>
 100
 101  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
 102  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
 103  <script type="module">
 104    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
 105    import { getCurrentUser } from '../assets/js/store.js';
 106    import { apiCreateJob, apiMyCompany } from '../assets/js/api.js';
 107    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
 108    import { formatSalaryRange } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
 109
 110    renderLayout('employer', 'Post Job');
 111
 112    const form = document.getElementById('job-form');
 113    const preview = document.getElementById('preview-panel');
 114    let companyName = 'Company';
 115
 116    apiMyCompany().then(c => { companyName = c?.name || 'Company'; }).catch(() => {});
 117
 118    form.querySelectorAll('input, select, textarea').forEach(el => {
 119      el.addEventListener('input', updatePreview);
 120      el.addEventListener('change', updatePreview);
 121    });
 122
 123    function updatePreview() {
 124      const fd = new FormData(form);
 125      const title = fd.get('title') || 'Job Title';
 126      const loc = fd.get('location') || 'Location';
 127      const type = fd.get('type') || 'Full-time';
 128      const salMin = fd.get('salary_min');
 129      const salMax = fd.get('salary_max');
 130      const sal = formatSalaryRange(salMin, salMax);
 131      preview.innerHTML = `<h4>${title}</h4><p class="text-secondary small">${companyName}</p><p>${loc} · ${type}</p><p class="text-primary fw-bold">${sal}</p>`;
 132    }
 133
 134    form.onsubmit = async (e) => {
 135      e.preventDefault();
 136      const btn = form.querySelector('button[type=submit]');
 137      btn.disabled = true;
 138      btn.textContent = 'Posting…';
 139      const fd = new FormData(form);
 140      try {
 141        await apiCreateJob({
 142          title: fd.get('title'),
 143          location: fd.get('location'),
 144          type: fd.get('type'),
 145          experience_level: fd.get('experience_level') || 'Entry-level',
 146          salary_min: parseInt(fd.get('salary_min')) || null,
 147          salary_max: parseInt(fd.get('salary_max')) || null,
 148          description: fd.get('description'),
 149          requirements: fd.get('requirements') || '',
 150          tags: (fd.get('tags') || '').split(',').map(t => t.trim()).filter(Boolean),
 151          slots: parseInt(fd.get('slots')) || 1,
 152          deadline: fd.get('deadline') || null,
 153        });
 154        toastSuccess('Job posted successfully');
 155        form.reset();
 156        updatePreview();
 157        setTimeout(() => window.location.href = 'manage-jobs.html', 1000);
 158      } catch (err) {
 159        toastError(err.message);
 160        btn.disabled = false;
 161        btn.textContent = 'Post Job';
 162      }
 163    };
 164  </script>
 165</body>
 166</html>
 167
employer/settings.html · 80 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Settings — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Settings</h1>
  19        <div class="card mb-4">
  20          <div class="card-body">
  21            <h3 class="mb-3">Dark Mode</h3>
  22            <div class="form-check form-switch">
  23              <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="dark-mode">
  24              <label class="form-check-label" for="dark-mode">Enable dark mode</label>
  25            </div>
  26          </div>
  27        </div>
  28        <div class="card mb-4">
  29          <div class="card-body">
  30            <h3 class="mb-3">Change Password</h3>
  31            <div class="form-group mb-2">
  32              <label class="form-label">Current password</label>
  33              <input type="password" class="form-input" id="curr-pw">
  34            </div>
  35            <div class="form-group mb-2">
  36              <label class="form-label">New password</label>
  37              <input type="password" class="form-input" id="new-pw">
  38            </div>
  39            <button id="change-pw" class="btn btn-primary">Change password</button>
  40          </div>
  41        </div>
  42      </div>
  43    </main>
  44  </div>
  45
  46  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  47  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  48  <script type="module">
  49    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  50    import { getTheme } from '../assets/js/store.js';
  51    import { toggleDarkMode } from '../assets/js/app.js';
  52    import { apiChangePassword } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  53    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  54
  55    renderLayout('employer', 'Settings');
  56
  57    const dm = document.getElementById('dark-mode');
  58    dm.checked = getTheme() === 'dark';
  59    dm.onchange = () => { toggleDarkMode(); dm.checked = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark'; };
  60
  61    document.getElementById('change-pw').onclick = async () => {
  62      const curr = document.getElementById('curr-pw').value.trim();
  63      const newPw = document.getElementById('new-pw').value.trim();
  64      if (!curr) { toastError('Enter your current password'); return; }
  65      if (!newPw || newPw.length < 6) { toastError('New password must be at least 6 characters'); return; }
  66      if (curr === newPw) { toastError('New password must be different'); return; }
  67      const btn = document.getElementById('change-pw');
  68      btn.disabled = true;
  69      try {
  70        await apiChangePassword(curr, newPw);
  71        document.getElementById('curr-pw').value = '';
  72        document.getElementById('new-pw').value = '';
  73        toastSuccess('Password updated');
  74      } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); }
  75      finally { btn.disabled = false; }
  76    };
  77  </script>
  78</body>
  79</html>
  80
employer/verification.html · 77 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Verification — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Employer Verification</h1>
  19        <div class="card mb-4">
  20          <div class="card-body">
  21            <p class="mb-3">Status: <span id="verify-status" class="badge badge-pending">Loading…</span></p>
  22            <p class="text-secondary small">Submit your business permit or other official documents to get verified. Verified employers get a trust badge on their listings.</p>
  23            <div class="form-group mt-3">
  24              <label class="form-label">Document Type</label>
  25              <select id="doc-type" class="form-select mb-2" style="max-width:240px">
  26                <option value="business_permit">Business Permit</option>
  27                <option value="bir_certificate">BIR Certificate</option>
  28                <option value="sec_registration">SEC Registration</option>
  29                <option value="dti_certificate">DTI Certificate</option>
  30                <option value="other">Other</option>
  31              </select>
  32              <label class="form-label">Upload document</label>
  33              <input type="file" id="proof-file" class="form-input mb-2" accept=".pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png">
  34              <button id="upload-proof" class="btn btn-primary">Upload Document</button>
  35            </div>
  36          </div>
  37        </div>
  38      </div>
  39    </main>
  40  </div>
  41
  42  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  43  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  44  <script type="module">
  45    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  46    import { apiMyCompany, apiUploadVerificationDoc } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  47    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  48
  49    renderLayout('employer', 'Verification');
  50
  51    apiMyCompany().then(co => {
  52      const vs = co?.verified_status || 'Unverified';
  53      const el = document.getElementById('verify-status');
  54      el.textContent = vs;
  55      el.className = 'badge badge-' + (vs === 'Verified' ? 'verified' : vs === 'Rejected' ? 'rejected' : 'pending');
  56    }).catch(() => {});
  57
  58    document.getElementById('upload-proof').onclick = async () => {
  59      const file = document.getElementById('proof-file').files[0];
  60      const docType = document.getElementById('doc-type').value;
  61      if (!file) { toastError('Select a file first'); return; }
  62      const btn = document.getElementById('upload-proof');
  63      btn.disabled = true;
  64      btn.textContent = 'Uploading…';
  65      try {
  66        await apiUploadVerificationDoc(file, docType);
  67        toastSuccess('Document uploaded. Your verification is under review.');
  68        document.getElementById('proof-file').value = '';
  69        document.getElementById('verify-status').textContent = 'Pending';
  70        document.getElementById('verify-status').className = 'badge badge-pending';
  71      } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); }
  72      finally { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Upload Document'; }
  73    };
  74  </script>
  75</body>
  76</html>
  77
help.html · 45 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Help — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/public.css">
  13</head>
  14<body>
  15  <header class="public-nav">
  16    <div class="public-nav-inner">
  17      <a href="index.html" class="public-nav-brand">WorkBridge PH</a>
  18      <ul class="public-nav-links">
  19        <li><a href="jobs.html">Jobs</a></li>
  20        <li><a href="categories.html">Categories</a></li>
  21        <li><a href="companies.html">Companies</a></li>
  22        <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
  23        <li><a href="help.html">Help</a></li>
  24        <li><a href="auth/login.html" class="btn btn-primary">Log in</a></li>
  25      </ul>
  26    </div>
  27  </header>
  28
  29  <main class="container page-transition py-5">
  30    <div class="card">
  31      <div class="card-body p-5">
  32        <h1>Help Center</h1>
  33        <p>Find answers to common questions.</p>
  34        <h4 class="mt-4">For Job Seekers</h4>
  35        <p>Create an account, complete your profile, and start applying. You can save jobs and track your applications.</p>
  36        <h4 class="mt-4">For Employers</h4>
  37        <p>Register as an employer, complete verification, and post job listings. Manage applicants from your dashboard.</p>
  38        <p class="mt-4 text-secondary">Contact: support@workbridge.ph</p>
  39      </div>
  40    </div>
  41  </main>
  42  <script type="module" src="assets/js/app.js"></script>
  43</body>
  44</html>

index.html · 140 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>WorkBridge PH — Decent Work for Every Filipino</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/public.css">
  13</head>
  14<body>
  15  <header class="public-nav">
  16    <div class="public-nav-inner">
  17      <a href="index.html" class="public-nav-brand">WorkBridge PH</a>
  18      <ul class="public-nav-links">
  19        <li><a href="jobs.html">Jobs</a></li>
  20        <li><a href="categories.html">Categories</a></li>
  21        <li><a href="companies.html">Companies</a></li>
  22        <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
  23        <li><a href="help.html">Help</a></li>
  24        <li><a href="auth/login.html" class="btn btn-primary">Log in</a></li>
  25      </ul>
  26    </div>
  27  </header>
  28
  29  <main class="container page-transition">
  30    <section class="hero">
  31      <h1 class="hero-title">Decent Work for Everyone, Everywhere</h1>
  32      <p class="hero-subtitle">Connect with employers worldwide. Find opportunities that match your skills and aspirations.</p>
  33      <form class="hero-search" action="jobs.html" method="get">
  34        <input type="text" name="keyword" placeholder="Job title or keyword">
  35        <input type="text" name="location" placeholder="Location (e.g. Manila)">
  36        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</button>
  37      </form>
  38    </section>
  39
  40    <section class="mb-5">
  41      <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-end mb-3">
  42        <h2 class="mb-0">Browse by Category</h2>
  43        <a href="categories.html" class="text-primary small">View all <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></a>
  44      </div>
  45      <div class="categories-grid" id="home-categories">
  46        <a href="categories.html" class="category-card">Loading…</a>
  47      </div>
  48    </section>
  49
  50    <section class="mb-5">
  51      <h2 class="mb-3">Featured Jobs</h2>
  52      <div id="featured-jobs" class="jobs-grid"></div>
  53    </section>
  54
  55    <section class="mb-5">
  56      <h2 class="mb-3">How It Works</h2>
  57      <div class="steps">
  58        <div class="step">
  59          <div class="step-num">1</div>
  60          <h4>Create Profile</h4>
  61          <p class="text-secondary">Sign up and build your profile</p>
  62        </div>
  63        <div class="step">
  64          <div class="step-num">2</div>
  65          <h4>Browse Jobs</h4>
  66          <p class="text-secondary">Find opportunities that fit</p>
  67        </div>
  68        <div class="step">
  69          <div class="step-num">3</div>
  70          <h4>Apply & Connect</h4>
  71          <p class="text-secondary">Apply and get hired</p>
  72        </div>
  73      </div>
  74    </section>
  75  </main>
  76
  77  <footer class="footer">
  78    <div class="footer-inner">
  79      <span>© 2026 WorkBridge PH</span>
  80      <div class="footer-links">
  81        <a href="safety.html">Safety</a>
  82        <a href="terms.html">Terms</a>
  83        <a href="privacy.html">Privacy</a>
  84      </div>
  85    </div>
  86  </footer>
  87
  88  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  89  <script type="module" src="assets/js/app.js"></script>
  90  <script type="module">
  91    import { getJobsWithCompanies } from './assets/js/jobs.module.js';
  92    import { apiGetCategories } from './assets/js/api.js';
  93    import { esc, formatSalaryRange, companyAvatar, verifiedBadge, skeletonJobCards } from './assets/js/utils.js';
  94
  95    // Populate the category tiles from real API data instead of hardcoded labels.
  96    // Top 6 categories by job count, fallback to first 6 if counts aren't returned.
  97    apiGetCategories().then(res => {
