  98      const cats = (res.data || res).slice().sort((a, b) =>
  99        (b.job_listings_count || 0) - (a.job_listings_count || 0)
 100      ).slice(0, 6);
 101      const grid = document.getElementById('home-categories');
 102      if (!cats.length) { grid.innerHTML = '<a href="categories.html" class="category-card">View all categories</a>'; return; }
 103      grid.innerHTML = cats.map(c =>
 104        `<a href="jobs.html?category=${esc(String(c.id))}" class="category-card">${esc(c.name)}</a>`
 105      ).join('');
 106    }).catch(() => {
 107      // If the API is down, gracefully degrade to a single fallback link.
 108      document.getElementById('home-categories').innerHTML =
 109        '<a href="categories.html" class="category-card">View all categories</a>';
 110    });
 111
 112    const grid = document.getElementById('featured-jobs');
 113    grid.innerHTML = skeletonJobCards(6);
 114
 115    getJobsWithCompanies({}).then(({ jobs }) => {
 116      const featured = jobs.slice(0, 6);
 117      if (!featured.length) { grid.innerHTML = '<p class="text-secondary">No jobs available.</p>'; return; }
 118      grid.innerHTML = featured.map(j => `
 119        <a href="job-detail.html?id=${esc(j.id)}" class="job-card text-decoration-none text-dark">
 120          <div class="d-flex gap-3 align-items-start mb-2" style="min-width:0">
 121            ${companyAvatar(j.company, 44)}
 122            <div style="min-width:0">
 123              <h3 class="job-card-title mb-1">${esc(j.title)}</h3>
 124              <p class="job-card-company mb-0">${esc(j.company?.name || 'Company')}${verifiedBadge(j.company)}</p>
 125            </div>
 126          </div>
 127          <div class="job-card-meta">
 128            <span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> ${esc(j.location)}</span>
 129            <span><i class="bi bi-briefcase"></i> ${esc(j.type)}</span>
 130          </div>
 131          <p class="job-card-salary">${formatSalaryRange(j.salaryMin, j.salaryMax)}</p>
 132        </a>
 133      `).join('');
 134    }).catch(() => {
 135      grid.innerHTML = '<p class="text-danger">Could not load jobs. Make sure the backend server is running.</p>';
 136    });
 137  </script>
 138</body>
 139</html>
 140
job-detail.html · 271 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Job Detail — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/public.css">
  13  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/seeker.css">
  14</head>
  15<body>
  16  <header class="public-nav" id="public-header">
  17    <div class="public-nav-inner">
  18      <a href="index.html" class="public-nav-brand">WorkBridge PH</a>
  19      <ul class="public-nav-links">
  20        <li><a href="jobs.html">Jobs</a></li>
  21        <li><a href="companies.html">Companies</a></li>
  22        <li><a href="auth/login.html" class="btn btn-primary" id="login-link">Log in</a></li>
  23      </ul>
  24    </div>
  25  </header>
  26
  27  <main class="container page-transition py-4">
  28    <div id="job-content" class="row">
  29      <div class="col-lg-8">
  30        <div class="card mb-4">
  31          <div class="card-body">
  32            <div id="job-main"></div>
  33            <div class="tabs mt-4">
  34              <button class="tab active" data-tab="overview">Overview</button>
  35              <button class="tab" data-tab="responsibilities">Responsibilities</button>
  36              <button class="tab" data-tab="qualifications">Qualifications</button>
  37              <button class="tab" data-tab="benefits">Benefits</button>
  38            </div>
  39            <div id="tab-overview" class="tab-content">
  40              <p id="job-description"></p>
  41            </div>
  42            <div id="tab-responsibilities" class="tab-content" style="display:none">
  43              <p id="job-responsibilities"></p>
  44            </div>
  45            <div id="tab-qualifications" class="tab-content" style="display:none">
  46              <p id="job-requirements"></p>
  47            </div>
  48            <div id="tab-benefits" class="tab-content" style="display:none">
  49              <p id="job-benefits"></p>
  50            </div>
  51          </div>
  52        </div>
  53      </div>
  54      <div class="col-lg-4">
  55        <!-- sticky-lg-top: only sticks on lg+ where it's a side column.
  56             On mobile it stacks below the main content and flows naturally. -->
  57        <div class="card sticky-lg-top" style="top: 80px;">
  58          <div class="card-body" id="apply-card">
  59            <p class="text-secondary mb-0">Loading…</p>
  60          </div>
  61        </div>
  62      </div>
  63    </div>
  64  </main>
  65
  66  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  67  <script type="module" src="assets/js/app.js"></script>
  68  <script type="module">
  69    import { getJobById } from './assets/js/jobs.module.js';
  70    import { getQueryParams } from './assets/js/router.js';
  71    import { getCurrentUser } from './assets/js/store.js';
  72    import { apiApply, apiSaveJob, apiUnsaveJob, apiSavedJobs, apiSeekerProfile, apiMyApplications } from './assets/js/api.js';
  73    import { openModal } from './assets/js/ui.modal.js';
  74    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from './assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  75    import { esc, formatSalaryRange, companyAvatar, verifiedBadge } from './assets/js/utils.js';
  76
  77    const params = getQueryParams();
  78    const user = getCurrentUser();
  79
  80    // If user is logged in, show dashboard layout instead of public nav
  81    if (user) {
  82      document.getElementById('public-header').style.display = 'none';
  83      document.body.classList.add('wb-loading');
  84      const mainEl = document.querySelector('main');
  85      mainEl.classList.remove('container', 'py-4');
  86      mainEl.classList.add('app-main');
  87      const contentWrap = document.createElement('div');
  88      contentWrap.className = 'app-content';
  89      while (mainEl.firstChild) contentWrap.appendChild(mainEl.firstChild);
  90      mainEl.appendChild(contentWrap);
  91      const appLayout = document.createElement('div');
  92      appLayout.id = 'app-layout';
  93      appLayout.className = 'app-layout';
  94      mainEl.parentNode.insertBefore(appLayout, mainEl);
  95      appLayout.appendChild(mainEl);
  96      import('./assets/js/layout.js').then(m => m.renderLayout(user.role, 'Job Detail'));
  97    }
  98
  99    const contentEl = document.getElementById('job-content');
 100    document.getElementById('job-main').innerHTML = '<p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p>';
 101
 102    async function init() {
 103      let job, savedIds = new Set(), seekerProfile = null, alreadyApplied = false;
 104
 105      try {
 106        job = await getJobById(params.id);
 107      } catch {
 108        contentEl.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><p>Job not found.</p><a href="jobs.html">Browse jobs</a></div>';
 109        return;
 110      }
 111
 112      // Load seeker state in parallel — saved jobs, profile, and applications (to detect already-applied)
 113      if (user?.role === 'seeker') {
 114        const [savedRes, profileRes, appsRes] = await Promise.allSettled([
 115          apiSavedJobs(), apiSeekerProfile(), apiMyApplications()
 116        ]);
 117        if (savedRes.status === 'fulfilled') {
 118          savedIds = new Set((savedRes.value.data || savedRes.value).map(s => String(s.job_listing_id)));
 119        }
 120        if (profileRes.status === 'fulfilled') seekerProfile = profileRes.value;
 121        if (appsRes.status === 'fulfilled') {
 122          alreadyApplied = (appsRes.value.data || appsRes.value).some(a => String(a.job_listing_id) === String(job.id));
 123        }
 124      }
 125
 126      document.title = job.title + ' — WorkBridge PH';
 127
 128      document.getElementById('job-main').innerHTML = `
 129        <div class="d-flex gap-3 align-items-start mb-3">
 130          ${companyAvatar(job.company, 56)}
 131          <div style="min-width:0">
 132            <h1 class="mb-1">${esc(job.title)}</h1>
 133            <p class="job-card-company mb-0">${esc(job.company?.name || 'Company')}${verifiedBadge(job.company)}</p>
 134          </div>
 135        </div>
 136        <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-2">
 137          <span class="badge badge-teal">${esc(job.type)}</span>
 138          <span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> ${esc(job.location)}</span>
 139          <span><i class="bi bi-clock"></i> Posted ${new Date(job.postedAt).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
 140        </div>
 141      `;
 142
 143      document.getElementById('job-description').textContent = job.description || '';
 144      document.getElementById('job-responsibilities').textContent = job.description || '';
 145      document.getElementById('job-requirements').textContent = job.requirements || '';
 146      document.getElementById('job-benefits').textContent = 'Contact the employer for benefits information.';
 147
 148      document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => {
 149        t.addEventListener('click', () => {
 150          document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
 151          document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(x => x.style.display = 'none');
 152          t.classList.add('active');
 153          const el = document.getElementById('tab-' + t.dataset.tab);
 154          if (el) el.style.display = 'block';
 155        });
 156      });
 157
 158      // Render the right-column card based on viewer role
 159      renderActionCard(job);
 160
 161      function renderActionCard(job) {
 162        const card = document.getElementById('apply-card');
 163        const companyName = esc(job.company?.name || 'Company') + verifiedBadge(job.company);
 164        const salary = formatSalaryRange(job.salaryMin, job.salaryMax);
 165
 166        // Employer view
 167        if (user?.role === 'employer') {
 168          card.innerHTML = `
 169            <h4 class="mb-3">${companyName}</h4>
 170            <p class="job-card-salary mb-3">${salary}</p>
 171            <div class="alert alert-info mb-3"><i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i> You're viewing this as an employer. Apply functionality is for job seekers only.</div>
 172            <a href="employer/manage-jobs.html" class="btn btn-secondary w-100">Go to Manage Jobs</a>`;
 173          return;
 174        }
 175
 176        // Admin view
 177        if (user?.role === 'admin') {
 178          card.innerHTML = `
 179            <h4 class="mb-3">${companyName}</h4>
 180            <p class="job-card-salary mb-3">${salary}</p>
 181            <div class="alert alert-info mb-3"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i> Admin view.</div>
 182            <a href="admin/job-moderation.html" class="btn btn-secondary w-100">Open in Moderation</a>`;
 183          return;
 184        }
 185
 186        // Seeker / public view (Apply + Save)
 187        const isSaved   = savedIds.has(String(job.id));
 188        const applyText = alreadyApplied ? 'Applied' : 'Apply Now';
 189        const applyDis  = alreadyApplied ? 'disabled' : '';
 190        card.innerHTML = `
 191          <h4 class="mb-3">Apply for this job</h4>
 192          <p class="text-secondary mb-3">${companyName}</p>
 193          <p class="job-card-salary mb-3">${salary}</p>
 194          <button id="btn-apply" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg w-100" ${applyDis}>${applyText}</button>
 195          <button id="btn-save" class="btn btn-secondary w-100 mt-2">
 196            <i class="bi bi-bookmark${isSaved ? '-fill' : ''}"></i> ${isSaved ? 'Saved' : 'Save'}
 197          </button>`;
 198
 199        document.getElementById('btn-apply').addEventListener('click', onApplyClick);
 200        document.getElementById('btn-save').addEventListener('click', onSaveClick);
 201      }
 202
 203      async function onApplyClick() {
 204        if (!user) {
 205          openModal({
 206            title: 'Login Required',
 207            body: '<p>Please log in to apply for this job.</p>',
 208            footer: `<a href="auth/login.html?redirect=${encodeURIComponent('job-detail.html?id=' + job.id)}" class="btn btn-primary">Log in</a>`
 209          });
 210          return;
 211        }
 212        if (alreadyApplied) return;
 213
 214        const resumes  = seekerProfile?.resumes || [];
 215        const hasResume = resumes.length > 0;
 216        const skills = (seekerProfile?.skills || []).map(s => (s.skill || s).toLowerCase());
 217        const tags   = (job.tags || []).map(t => t.toLowerCase());
 218        const skillFit = tags.length === 0 ? 100
 219          : Math.round((skills.filter(sk => tags.some(t => t.includes(sk) || sk.includes(t))).length / tags.length) * 100);
 220
 221        let warnings = '';
 222        if (!hasResume) warnings += '<div class="alert alert-warning mb-2"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i> No resume uploaded. <a href="seeker/resume.html">Upload resume</a></div>';
 223        if (skills.length === 0) warnings += '<div class="alert alert-warning mb-2">No skills on profile. <a href="seeker/profile.html">Update profile</a></div>';
 224        else if (tags.length > 0) warnings += `<div class="alert alert-${skillFit >= 50 ? 'success' : 'info'} mb-2"><i class="bi bi-${skillFit >= 50 ? 'check-circle' : 'info-circle'}"></i> Skill match: <strong>${skillFit}%</strong></div>`;
 225
 226        const { close } = openModal({
 227          title: 'Apply for Job',
 228          body: `<p>Apply for <strong>${esc(job.title)}</strong>?</p>${warnings}${!hasResume ? '<p class="text-danger fw-bold">Upload a resume before applying.</p>' : ''}`,
 229          footer: hasResume
 230            ? '<button class="btn btn-secondary" id="modal-cancel">Cancel</button> <button class="btn btn-primary" id="modal-confirm">Confirm</button>'
 231            : '<button class="btn btn-secondary" id="modal-cancel">Close</button>'
 232        });
 233
 234        document.getElementById('modal-cancel')?.addEventListener('click', close);
 235        document.getElementById('modal-confirm')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
 236          const primaryResume = resumes.find(r => r.is_primary) || resumes[0];
 237          try {
 238            await apiApply(job.id, { resume_id: primaryResume?.id, skill_fit: skillFit });
 239            close();
 240            toastSuccess('Application submitted!');
 241            alreadyApplied = true;
 242            renderActionCard(job);
 243          } catch (err) { close(); toastError(err.message); }
 244        });
 245      }
 246
 247      async function onSaveClick() {
 248        if (!user) {
 249          openModal({ title: 'Login Required', body: '<p>Please log in to save jobs.</p>', footer: '<a href="auth/login.html" class="btn btn-primary">Log in</a>' });
 250          return;
 251        }
 252        try {
 253          if (savedIds.has(String(job.id))) {
 254            await apiUnsaveJob(job.id);
 255            savedIds.delete(String(job.id));
 256            toastSuccess('Job removed from saved');
 257          } else {
 258            await apiSaveJob(job.id);
 259            savedIds.add(String(job.id));
 260            toastSuccess('Job saved');
 261          }
 262          renderActionCard(job);
 263        } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); }
 264      }
 265    }
 266
 267    init();
 268  </script>
 269</body>
 270</html>
 271
jobs.html · 214 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Browse Jobs — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/public.css">
  13</head>
  14<body>
  15  <header class="public-nav">
  16    <div class="public-nav-inner">
  17      <a href="index.html" class="public-nav-brand">WorkBridge PH</a>
  18      <ul class="public-nav-links">
  19        <li><a href="jobs.html">Jobs</a></li>
  20        <li><a href="categories.html">Categories</a></li>
  21        <li><a href="companies.html">Companies</a></li>
  22        <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
  23        <li><a href="auth/login.html" class="btn btn-primary">Log in</a></li>
  24      </ul>
  25    </div>
  26  </header>
  27
  28  <main class="container page-transition py-4">
  29    <h1 class="mb-4">Browse Jobs</h1>
  30    <div class="card mb-4">
  31      <div class="card-body">
  32        <form class="row g-3" id="filter-form">
  33          <div class="col-md-3"><input type="text" name="keyword" class="form-input" placeholder="Keyword" id="f-keyword"></div>
  34          <div class="col-md-2"><input type="text" name="location" class="form-input" placeholder="Location" id="f-location"></div>
  35          <div class="col-md-2">
  36            <select name="type" class="form-select" id="f-type">
  37              <option value="">Job Type</option>
  38              <option value="Full-time">Full-time</option>
  39              <option value="Part-time">Part-time</option>
  40              <option value="Contract">Contract</option>
  41            </select>
  42          </div>
  43          <div class="col-md-2">
  44            <select name="setup" class="form-select" id="f-setup">
  45              <option value="">Setup</option>
  46              <option value="Remote">Remote</option>
  47              <option value="Hybrid">Hybrid</option>
  48              <option value="On-site">On-site</option>
  49            </select>
  50          </div>
  51          <div class="col-md-2">
  52            <select name="sort" class="form-select" id="f-sort">
  53              <option value="">Sort by</option>
  54              <option value="newest">Newest</option>
  55              <option value="salary">Salary (High)</option>
  56            </select>
  57          </div>
  58          <div class="col-md-1"><button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></button></div>
  59        </form>
  60      </div>
  61    </div>
  62    <div id="active-filter-banner" class="mb-3" hidden></div>
  63    <div id="jobs-list" class="jobs-grid"></div>
  64    <div id="pagination" class="pagination mt-4"></div>
  65  </main>
  66
  67  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  68  <script type="module" src="assets/js/app.js"></script>
  69  <script type="module">
  70    import { getJobsWithCompanies } from './assets/js/jobs.module.js';
  71    import { getQueryParams, buildQueryString } from './assets/js/router.js';
  72    import { getCurrentUser } from './assets/js/store.js';
  73    import { apiSaveJob, apiUnsaveJob, apiSavedJobs, apiGetCategories } from './assets/js/api.js';
  74    import { openModal } from './assets/js/ui.modal.js';
  75    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from './assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  76    import { esc, formatSalaryRange, companyAvatar, verifiedBadge, emptyState, skeletonJobCards } from './assets/js/utils.js';
  77
  78    const user = getCurrentUser();
  79    let savedIds = new Set();
  80    let categoriesById = {};
  81
  82    // Fetch category names once so we can show "Filtered: IT" banner instead of just the ID.
  83    apiGetCategories().then(res => {
  84      (res.data || res).forEach(c => { categoriesById[c.id] = c; });
  85      const params = getQueryParams();
  86      if (params.category) renderCategoryBanner(params.category);
  87    }).catch(() => {});
  88
  89    function renderCategoryBanner(catId) {
  90      const cat = categoriesById[catId];
  91      const banner = document.getElementById('active-filter-banner');
  92      if (!cat) { banner.hidden = true; return; }
  93      banner.hidden = false;
  94      banner.innerHTML = `
  95        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 p-2 px-3" style="background:var(--color-accent-muted);border-radius:var(--radius-md);width:fit-content">
  96          <i class="bi ${esc(cat.icon || 'bi-tag')}"></i>
  97          <span>Showing jobs in <strong>${esc(cat.name)}</strong></span>
  98          <a href="jobs.html" class="ms-2" title="Clear filter"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i></a>
  99        </div>`;
 100    }
 101
 102    async function loadSaved() {
 103      if (!user) return;
 104      try {
 105        const res = await apiSavedJobs();
 106        savedIds = new Set((res.data || res).map(s => s.job_listing_id));
 107      } catch {}
 108    }
 109
 110    async function render() {
 111      const params = getQueryParams();
 112      const grid = document.getElementById('jobs-list');
 113      grid.innerHTML = skeletonJobCards(6);
 114
 115      ['keyword','location','type','setup','sort'].forEach(k => {
 116        const el = document.getElementById('f-' + k);
 117        if (el && params[k]) el.value = params[k];
 118      });
 119
 120      try {
 121        const { jobs, lastPage, currentPage } = await getJobsWithCompanies({ ...params, page: params.page || 1 });
 122
 123        if (!jobs.length) {
 124          grid.innerHTML = emptyState({
 125            icon: 'search',
 126            title: 'No jobs match your filters',
 127            subtitle: 'Try removing some filters or searching for different keywords.',
 128          });
 129          return;
 130        }
 131
 132        grid.innerHTML = jobs.map(j => `
 133          <div class="job-card card-lift">
 134            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3">
 135              <div class="d-flex gap-3 align-items-start" style="min-width:0;flex:1">
 136                ${companyAvatar(j.company, 48)}
 137                <div style="min-width:0">
 138                  <a href="job-detail.html?id=${esc(j.id)}" class="text-dark text-decoration-none"><h3 class="job-card-title">${esc(j.title)}</h3></a>
 139                  <p class="job-card-company">${esc(j.company?.name || 'Company')}${verifiedBadge(j.company)}</p>
 140                </div>
 141              </div>
 142              <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm save-job flex-shrink-0" data-id="${esc(j.id)}" title="Save job">
 143                <i class="bi bi-${savedIds.has(j.id) ? 'bookmark-fill' : 'bookmark'}"></i>
 144              </button>
 145            </div>
 146            <div class="job-card-meta">
 147              <span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> ${esc(j.location)}</span>
 148              <span><i class="bi bi-briefcase"></i> ${esc(j.type)}</span>
 149            </div>
 150            <p class="job-card-salary mb-0">${formatSalaryRange(j.salaryMin, j.salaryMax)}</p>
 151          </div>
 152        `).join('');
 153
 154        grid.querySelectorAll('.save-job').forEach(btn => {
 155          btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
 156            const id = parseInt(btn.dataset.id);
 157            if (!user) {
 158              openModal({ title: 'Login Required', body: '<p>Please log in to save jobs.</p>', footer: '<a href="auth/login.html" class="btn btn-primary">Log in</a>' });
 159              return;
 160            }
 161            try {
 162              if (savedIds.has(id)) {
 163                await apiUnsaveJob(id);
 164                savedIds.delete(id);
 165                toastSuccess('Job removed from saved');
 166              } else {
 167                await apiSaveJob(id);
 168                savedIds.add(id);
 169                toastSuccess('Job saved');
 170              }
 171              btn.querySelector('i').className = `bi bi-${savedIds.has(id) ? 'bookmark-fill' : 'bookmark'}`;
 172            } catch (err) {
 173              toastError(err.message);
 174            }
 175          });
 176        });
 177
 178        const pag = document.getElementById('pagination');
 179        if (lastPage <= 1) { pag.innerHTML = ''; return; }
 180        let html = '';
 181        if (currentPage > 1) html += `<button data-page="${currentPage - 1}">Previous</button>`;
 182        for (let i = 1; i <= lastPage; i++) html += `<button class="${i === currentPage ? 'active' : ''}" data-page="${i}">${i}</button>`;
 183        if (currentPage < lastPage) html += `<button data-page="${currentPage + 1}">Next</button>`;
 184        pag.innerHTML = html;
 185        pag.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => {
 186          b.addEventListener('click', () => {
 187            window.location.search = buildQueryString({ ...params, page: b.dataset.page });
 188          });
 189        });
 190      } catch (err) {
 191        grid.innerHTML = `<p class="text-danger p-3">Error loading jobs: ${esc(err.message)}</p>`;
 192      }
 193    }
 194
 195    document.getElementById('filter-form').addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
 196      e.preventDefault();
 197      // Preserve category from URL across form submissions — otherwise user
 198      // searching while filtered by category would lose their category filter.
 199      const existing = getQueryParams();
 200      const p = {
 201        keyword: document.getElementById('f-keyword').value,
 202        location: document.getElementById('f-location').value,
 203        type: document.getElementById('f-type').value,
 204        sort: document.getElementById('f-sort').value,
 205        category: existing.category || '',
 206      };
 207      window.location.href = 'jobs.html' + buildQueryString(p);
 208    });
 209
 210    loadSaved().then(render);
 211  </script>
 212</body>
 213</html>
 214
package.json · 19 lines
   1{
   2  "name": "employment",
   3  "version": "1.0.0",
   4  "description": "Web-Based Unified Employment Platform for Decent Work Access (Philippines)",
   5  "main": "index.js",
   6  "scripts": {
   7    "test": "playwright test",
   8    "test:e2e": "playwright test",
   9    "serve": "npx --yes serve . -l 3000"
  10  },
  11  "keywords": [],
  12  "author": "",
  13  "license": "ISC",
  14  "type": "commonjs",
  15  "devDependencies": {
  16    "@playwright/test": "^1.58.2"
  17  }
  18}
  19
playwright.config.cjs · 28 lines
   1const { defineConfig } = require('@playwright/test');
   2
   3/** Dedicated port so tests never reuse an old `serve` process started before serve.json existed */
   4const STATIC_PORT = 3333;
   5const STATIC_ORIGIN = `http://localhost:${STATIC_PORT}`;
   6
   7module.exports = defineConfig({
   8  testDir: './tests',
   9  // Serialize: tests share a single Laravel API + DB. Parallel runs collide on
  10  // login rate limit (5/min per email+ip) and on data state.
  11  fullyParallel: false,
  12  workers: 1,
  13  forbidOnly: !!process.env.CI,
  14  retries: process.env.CI ? 2 : 0,
  15  use: {
  16    baseURL: STATIC_ORIGIN,
  17    trace: 'on-first-retry',
  18  },
  19  webServer: {
  20    // Use `serve .` with cwd = project root (avoids Windows quoting issues with absolute paths)
  21    command: `npx --yes serve . -l ${STATIC_PORT}`,
  22    cwd: __dirname,
  23    url: STATIC_ORIGIN,
  24    reuseExistingServer: false,
  25    timeout: 120 * 1000,
  26  },
  27});
  28
privacy.html · 35 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Privacy — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/tokens.css">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/base.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/components.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/public.css">
  12</head>
  13<body>
  14  <header class="public-nav">
  15    <div class="public-nav-inner">
  16      <a href="index.html" class="public-nav-brand">WorkBridge PH</a>
  17      <ul class="public-nav-links">
  18        <li><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
  19        <li><a href="auth/login.html" class="btn btn-primary">Log in</a></li>
  20      </ul>
  21    </div>
  22  </header>
  23
  24  <main class="container page-transition py-5">
  25    <div class="card">
  26      <div class="card-body p-5">
  27        <h1>Privacy Policy</h1>
  28        <p>We collect information you provide when registering and using the platform. This data is used to connect job seekers with employers and improve our services. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.</p>
  29      </div>
  30    </div>
  31  </main>
  32  <script type="module" src="assets/js/app.js"></script>
  33</body>
  34</html>
  35
safety.html · 37 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Safety — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/tokens.css">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/base.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/components.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/public.css">
  12</head>
  13<body>
  14  <header class="public-nav">
  15    <div class="public-nav-inner">
  16      <a href="index.html" class="public-nav-brand">WorkBridge PH</a>
  17      <ul class="public-nav-links">
  18        <li><a href="jobs.html">Jobs</a></li>
  19        <li><a href="companies.html">Companies</a></li>
  20        <li><a href="auth/login.html" class="btn btn-primary">Log in</a></li>
  21      </ul>
  22    </div>
  23  </header>
  24
  25  <main class="container page-transition py-5">
  26    <div class="card">
  27      <div class="card-body p-5">
  28        <h1>Safety Guidelines</h1>
  29        <p>WorkBridge PH is committed to providing a safe platform for job seekers and employers. We verify employers and moderate job listings to reduce fraud and inappropriate content.</p>
  30        <p>Never share sensitive personal or financial information before verifying the employer. Report suspicious activity through our reporting system.</p>
  31      </div>
  32    </div>
  33  </main>
  34  <script type="module" src="assets/js/app.js"></script>
  35</body>
  36</html>
  37
seeker/application-detail.html · 78 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Application — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <div id="app-detail"><p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p></div>
  19      </div>
  20    </main>
  21  </div>
  22
  23  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  24  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  25  <script type="module">
  26    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  27    import { apiGetApplication } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  28    import { getQueryParams } from '../assets/js/router.js';
  29    import { esc } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  30
  31    renderLayout('seeker', 'Application');
  32
  33    const params = getQueryParams();
  34    const el = document.getElementById('app-detail');
  35
  36    if (!params.id) {
  37      el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><p>Application not found.</p><a href="applications.html">Back to applications</a></div>';
  38    } else {
  39      apiGetApplication(params.id).then(app => {
  40        const job = app.job_listing;
  41        const title = job?.title || 'Job';
  42        const companyName = job?.company?.name || 'Company';
  43
  44        el.innerHTML = `
  45          <a href="applications.html" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm mb-3"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back</a>
  46          <div class="card mb-4">
  47            <div class="card-body">
  48              <h2 class="mb-2">${esc(title)}</h2>
  49              <p class="text-secondary">${esc(companyName)}</p>
  50              <span class="badge badge-${esc(app.status.toLowerCase())}">${esc(app.status)}</span>
  51              ${app.skill_fit != null ? `<span class="ms-2 text-muted small">Skill fit: ${app.skill_fit}%</span>` : ''}
  52            </div>
  53          </div>
  54          <div class="card mb-4">
  55            <div class="card-header"><h3 class="card-title mb-0">Timeline</h3></div>
  56            <div class="card-body">
  57              <div class="timeline">
  58                ${(app.timelines || []).map(t => `
  59                  <div class="d-flex mb-3">
  60                    <div class="rounded-circle bg-primary text-white d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center me-3" style="width:36px;height:36px;flex-shrink:0">✓</div>
  61                    <div>
  62                      <strong>${esc(t.status)}</strong>
  63                      <p class="text-secondary small mb-0">${new Date(t.created_at).toLocaleString()}${t.note ? ' · ' + esc(t.note) : ''}</p>
  64                    </div>
  65                  </div>`).join('')}
  66              </div>
  67            </div>
  68          </div>
  69          ${app.cover_letter ? `<div class="card"><div class="card-header"><h3 class="card-title mb-0">Cover Letter</h3></div><div class="card-body"><p>${esc(app.cover_letter)}</p></div></div>` : ''}
  70        `;
  71      }).catch(() => {
  72        el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><p>Application not found.</p><a href="applications.html" class="btn btn-primary mt-2">Back to applications</a></div>';
  73      });
  74    }
  75  </script>
  76</body>
  77</html>
  78
seeker/applications.html · 82 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Applications — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Applications</h1>
  19        <div class="chip-group mb-4">
  20          <button class="chip active" data-status="">All</button>
  21          <button class="chip" data-status="Submitted">Submitted</button>
  22          <button class="chip" data-status="Reviewed">Reviewed</button>
  23          <button class="chip" data-status="Interview">Interview</button>
  24          <button class="chip" data-status="Rejected">Rejected</button>
  25          <button class="chip" data-status="Hired">Hired</button>
  26        </div>
  27        <div id="applications-list"></div>
  28      </div>
  29    </main>
  30  </div>
  31
  32  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  33  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  34  <script type="module">
  35    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  36    import { getMyApplications } from '../assets/js/seeker.module.js';
  37    import { esc, emptyState } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  38
  39    renderLayout('seeker', 'Applications');
  40
  41    let allApps = [], statusFilter = '';
  42
  43    function render() {
  44      const list = document.getElementById('applications-list');
  45      document.querySelectorAll('.chip').forEach(c => {
  46        c.classList.toggle('active', c.dataset.status === statusFilter);
  47        c.onclick = () => { statusFilter = c.dataset.status; render(); };
  48      });
  49
  50      const apps = statusFilter ? allApps.filter(a => a.status === statusFilter) : allApps;
  51      if (!apps.length) {
  52        list.innerHTML = emptyState({
  53          icon: 'file-earmark-text',
  54          title: statusFilter ? `No ${statusFilter.toLowerCase()} applications` : 'No applications yet',
  55          subtitle: 'Apply to jobs you like and track their progress here.',
  56          actionLabel: 'Browse jobs',
  57          actionHref: '../jobs.html',
  58        });
  59        return;
  60      }
  61      list.innerHTML = apps.map(a => `
  62        <a href="application-detail.html?id=${esc(a.id)}" class="card card-lift text-decoration-none text-dark mb-3">
  63          <div class="card-body d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
  64            <div>
  65              <h4 class="mb-1">${esc(a.job?.title || 'Job')}</h4>
  66              <p class="text-secondary small mb-1">${esc(a.job?.company?.name || 'Company')} · Applied ${new Date(a.appliedAt).toLocaleDateString()}</p>
  67              <span class="badge badge-${esc(a.status.toLowerCase())}">${esc(a.status)}</span>
  68            </div>
  69            <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
  70          </div>
  71        </a>
  72      `).join('');
  73    }
  74
  75    const list = document.getElementById('applications-list');
  76    list.innerHTML = '<p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p>';
  77    getMyApplications().then(apps => { allApps = apps; render(); })
  78      .catch(() => { list.innerHTML = '<p class="text-danger">Could not load applications.</p>'; });
  79  </script>
  80</body>
  81</html>
  82
seeker/dashboard.html · 101 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Dashboard — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/public.css">
  13  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  14</head>
  15<body class="wb-loading">
  16  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  17    <main class="app-main">
  18      <div class="app-content">
  19        <h1 class="mb-4">Dashboard</h1>
  20        <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
  21          <div class="col-md-4 col-12">
  22            <div class="stat-card card">
  23              <div class="stat-value" id="stat-saved">0</div>
  24              <div class="stat-label">Saved Jobs</div>
  25            </div>
  26          </div>
  27          <div class="col-md-4 col-12">
  28            <div class="stat-card card">
  29              <div class="stat-value" id="stat-apps">0</div>
  30              <div class="stat-label">Applications</div>
  31            </div>
  32          </div>
  33          <div class="col-md-4 col-12">
  34            <div class="stat-card card">
  35              <div class="stat-value" id="stat-profile">0%</div>
  36              <div class="stat-label">Profile Strength</div>
  37            </div>
  38          </div>
  39        </div>
  40        <h3 class="mb-3">Recommended for you</h3>
  41        <div id="recommended-jobs" class="jobs-grid"></div>
  42      </div>
  43    </main>
  44  </div>
  45
  46  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  47  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  48  <script type="module">
  49    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  50    import { getRecommendedJobs, getSeekerStats } from '../assets/js/seeker.module.js';
  51    import { getCurrentUser } from '../assets/js/store.js';
  52    import { apiSavedJobs } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  53    import { animateCounter } from '../assets/js/ui.animations.js';
  54    import { esc, formatSalaryRange, companyAvatar, verifiedBadge, emptyState, skeletonJobCards } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  55
  56    renderLayout('seeker', 'Dashboard');
  57
  58    const user = getCurrentUser();
  59    if (user) {
  60      const grid = document.getElementById('recommended-jobs');
  61      grid.innerHTML = skeletonJobCards(6);
  62
  63      Promise.all([getSeekerStats(), apiSavedJobs(), getRecommendedJobs(6)]).then(([stats, savedRes, jobs]) => {
  64        const savedCount = (savedRes.data || savedRes).length;
  65
  66        const s1 = document.getElementById('stat-saved');
  67        const s2 = document.getElementById('stat-apps');
  68        const s3 = document.getElementById('stat-profile');
  69        if (s1) { s1.textContent = savedCount; animateCounter(s1, savedCount, 600); }
  70        if (s2) { s2.textContent = stats.totalApplications; animateCounter(s2, stats.totalApplications, 600); }
  71        if (s3) s3.textContent = stats.profileStrength + '%';
  72
  73        grid.innerHTML = jobs.length ? jobs.map(j => `
  74          <div class="card card-lift">
  75            <div class="card-body">
  76              <div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-start mb-2" style="min-width:0">
  77                ${companyAvatar(j.company, 40)}
  78                <div style="min-width:0">
  79                  <a href="../job-detail.html?id=${esc(j.id)}" class="text-dark text-decoration-none"><h4 class="card-title mb-0">${esc(j.title)}</h4></a>
  80                  <p class="text-secondary small mb-0">${esc(j.company?.name || 'Company')}${verifiedBadge(j.company)} · ${esc(j.location)}</p>
  81                </div>
  82              </div>
  83              <p class="text-primary fw-bold mb-2">${formatSalaryRange(j.salaryMin, j.salaryMax)}</p>
  84              <a href="../job-detail.html?id=${esc(j.id)}" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">Apply</a>
  85            </div>
  86          </div>
  87        `).join('') : emptyState({
  88          icon: 'briefcase',
  89          title: 'No jobs available',
  90          subtitle: 'Check back soon — new opportunities are posted regularly.',
  91          actionLabel: 'Browse all jobs',
  92          actionHref: '../jobs.html',
  93        });
  94      }).catch(() => {
  95        grid.innerHTML = '<p class="text-danger">Could not load data.</p>';
  96      });
  97    }
  98  </script>
  99</body>
 100</html>
 101
seeker/jobs.html · 43 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Jobs — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/public.css">
  13  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  14</head>
  15<body class="wb-loading">
  16  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  17    <main class="app-main">
  18      <div class="app-content">
  19        <h1 class="mb-4">Browse Jobs</h1>
  20        <div class="card mb-4">
  21          <div class="card-body">
  22            <form class="row g-3" id="filter-form">
  23              <div class="col-md-3"><input type="text" name="keyword" class="form-input" placeholder="Keyword" id="f-keyword"></div>
  24              <div class="col-md-2"><input type="text" name="location" class="form-input" placeholder="Location" id="f-location"></div>
  25              <div class="col-md-2"><select name="type" class="form-select" id="f-type"><option value="">Type</option><option value="Full-time">Full-time</option></select></div>
  26              <div class="col-md-2"><select name="setup" class="form-select" id="f-setup"><option value="">Setup</option><option value="Remote">Remote</option></select></div>
  27              <div class="col-md-2"><select name="sort" class="form-select" id="f-sort"><option value="">Sort</option><option value="newest">Newest</option></select></div>
  28              <div class="col-md-1"><button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></button></div>
  29            </form>
  30          </div>
  31        </div>
  32        <div id="jobs-list" class="jobs-grid"></div>
  33        <div id="pagination" class="pagination mt-4"></div>
  34      </div>
  35    </main>
  36  </div>
  37
  38  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  39  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  40  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/seeker-jobs.js"></script>
  41</body>
  42</html>
  43
seeker/messages.html · 172 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Messages — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Messages</h1>
  19        <div class="row g-3">
  20          <div class="col-md-4">
  21            <div class="card" style="min-height:400px">
  22              <div class="card-body p-0">
  23                <div style="padding:var(--space-md);border-bottom:1px solid var(--color-border)">
  24                  <input type="text" id="search-contacts" class="form-input" placeholder="Search conversations...">
  25                </div>
  26                <div id="contact-list"></div>
  27              </div>
  28            </div>
  29          </div>
  30          <div class="col-md-8">
  31            <div class="card" style="min-height:400px;display:flex;flex-direction:column">
  32              <div id="chat-header" style="padding:var(--space-md);border-bottom:1px solid var(--color-border);font-weight:600"></div>
  33              <div id="chat-messages" style="flex:1;padding:var(--space-md);overflow-y:auto;max-height:300px"></div>
  34              <div id="chat-input-wrap" style="padding:var(--space-md);border-top:1px solid var(--color-border);display:none">
  35                <div class="d-flex gap-2">
  36                  <input type="text" id="chat-input" class="form-input" placeholder="Type a message...">
  37                  <button id="send-btn" class="btn btn-primary"><i class="bi bi-send"></i></button>
  38                </div>
  39              </div>
  40            </div>
  41          </div>
  42        </div>
  43      </div>
  44    </main>
  45  </div>
  46
  47  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  48  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  49  <script type="module">
  50    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  51    import { getCurrentUser } from '../assets/js/store.js';
  52    import { apiGetContacts, apiGetThread, apiSendMessage } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  53    import { toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  54    import { esc, emptyState } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  55
  56    renderLayout('seeker', 'Messages');
  57
  58    const user = getCurrentUser();
  59    let contacts = [];
  60    let activeContact = null;
  61    let thread = [];
  62
  63    async function loadContacts() {
  64      try {
  65        const res = await apiGetContacts();
  66        contacts = res.data || res;
  67        renderContacts();
  68      } catch (err) {
  69        document.getElementById('contact-list').innerHTML = `<p class="text-danger p-3">${esc(err.message)}</p>`;
  70      }
  71    }
  72
  73    function renderContacts() {
  74      const q = (document.getElementById('search-contacts').value || '').toLowerCase();
  75      const contactList = document.getElementById('contact-list');
  76      const filtered = contacts.filter(c => {
  77        const name = c.name || c.company?.name || '';
  78        return !q || name.toLowerCase().includes(q);
  79      });
  80
  81      if (!filtered.length) {
  82        contactList.innerHTML = emptyState({
  83          icon: 'chat-dots',
  84          title: 'No conversations yet',
  85          subtitle: 'Messages from employers will appear here.',
  86        });
  87        return;
  88      }
  89
  90      contactList.innerHTML = filtered.map(c => {
  91        const name = c.name || 'Unknown';
  92        const isActive = activeContact?.id === c.id;
  93        return `<div class="msg-contact${isActive ? ' msg-contact-active' : ''}" data-id="${esc(String(c.id))}" style="padding:var(--space-md);border-bottom:1px solid var(--color-border-subtle);cursor:pointer;${isActive ? 'background:var(--color-accent-muted)' : ''}">
  94          <div class="fw-bold">${esc(name)}</div>
  95          <div class="text-muted small text-truncate">${c.last_message ? esc(c.last_message) : 'No messages'}</div>
  96        </div>`;
  97      }).join('');
  98
  99      contactList.querySelectorAll('.msg-contact').forEach(el => {
 100        el.onclick = () => {
 101          activeContact = contacts.find(c => String(c.id) === el.dataset.id);
 102          renderContacts();
 103          loadThread();
 104        };
 105      });
 106    }
 107
 108    async function loadThread() {
 109      if (!activeContact) return;
 110      const header = document.getElementById('chat-header');
 111      const messagesEl = document.getElementById('chat-messages');
 112      const inputWrap = document.getElementById('chat-input-wrap');
 113
 114      header.textContent = activeContact.name || 'Unknown';
 115      inputWrap.style.display = 'block';
 116      messagesEl.innerHTML = '<p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p>';
 117
 118      try {
 119        const res = await apiGetThread(activeContact.id);
 120        thread = res.data || res;
 121        renderThread();
 122      } catch (err) {
 123        messagesEl.innerHTML = `<p class="text-danger">${esc(err.message)}</p>`;
 124      }
 125    }
 126
 127    function renderThread() {
 128      const messagesEl = document.getElementById('chat-messages');
 129      if (!thread.length) {
 130        messagesEl.innerHTML = '<div class="text-muted text-center py-4">No messages in this conversation yet.</div>';
 131        return;
 132      }
 133      messagesEl.innerHTML = thread.map(m => {
 134        const isMine = m.sender_id === user?.id;
 135        return `<div style="margin-bottom:var(--space-sm);text-align:${isMine ? 'right' : 'left'}">
 136          <div style="display:inline-block;max-width:75%;padding:var(--space-sm) var(--space-md);border-radius:var(--radius-md);background:${isMine ? 'var(--color-accent)' : 'var(--color-bg-elevated)'};color:${isMine ? 'white' : 'var(--color-text)'}">
 137            ${esc(m.body)}
 138          </div>
 139          <div class="text-muted" style="font-size:var(--text-xs)">${new Date(m.created_at).toLocaleTimeString([], {hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})}</div>
 140        </div>`;
 141      }).join('');
 142      messagesEl.scrollTop = messagesEl.scrollHeight;
 143    }
 144
 145    async function sendMessage() {
 146      const input = document.getElementById('chat-input');
 147      const text = input.value.trim();
 148      if (!text || !activeContact) return;
 149      input.value = '';
 150      try {
 151        const msg = await apiSendMessage(activeContact.id, text);
 152        thread.push(msg);
 153        renderThread();
 154      } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); input.value = text; }
 155    }
 156
 157    document.getElementById('send-btn').onclick = sendMessage;
 158    document.getElementById('chat-input').onkeydown = e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') sendMessage(); };
 159    document.getElementById('search-contacts').oninput = renderContacts;
 160
 161    // Initial empty state
 162    document.getElementById('chat-messages').innerHTML = emptyState({
 163      icon: 'chat-left-text',
 164      title: 'Select a conversation',
 165      subtitle: 'Pick a contact on the left to view your messages.',
 166    });
 167
 168    loadContacts();
 169  </script>
 170</body>
 171</html>
 172
seeker/notifications.html · 86 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Notifications — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
  19          <h1 class="mb-0">Notifications</h1>
  20          <button id="mark-all" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm">Mark all read</button>
  21        </div>
  22        <div id="notif-list"><p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p></div>
  23      </div>
  24    </main>
  25  </div>
  26
  27  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  28  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  29  <script type="module">
  30    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  31    import { apiGetNotifications, apiMarkNotificationRead, apiMarkAllNotificationsRead } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  32    import { toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  33    import { esc, emptyState } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  34
  35    renderLayout('seeker', 'Notifications');
  36
  37    let notifs = [];
  38
  39    function render() {
  40      const list = document.getElementById('notif-list');
  41      if (!notifs.length) {
  42        list.innerHTML = emptyState({
  43          icon: 'bell',
  44          title: 'No notifications yet',
  45          subtitle: 'Application updates and messages from employers will show up here.',
  46        });
  47        return;
  48      }
  49      list.innerHTML = notifs.map(n => `
  50        <div class="card mb-2 ${n.is_read ? '' : 'border-primary'}">
  51          <div class="card-body d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start">
  52            <div>
  53              <h5 class="mb-1">${esc(n.title)}</h5>
  54              <p class="mb-0 text-secondary small">${esc(n.body)}</p>
  55              <p class="mb-0 text-muted" style="font-size:var(--text-xs)">${new Date(n.created_at).toLocaleString()}</p>
  56            </div>
  57            ${!n.is_read ? `<button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm mark-read ms-2 flex-shrink-0" data-id="${esc(String(n.id))}">Mark read</button>` : '<span class="text-muted small ms-2">Read</span>'}
  58          </div>
  59        </div>`).join('');
  60
  61      list.querySelectorAll('.mark-read').forEach(b => {
  62        b.onclick = async () => {
  63          try {
  64            await apiMarkNotificationRead(b.dataset.id);
  65            notifs = notifs.map(n => String(n.id) === b.dataset.id ? { ...n, is_read: true } : n);
  66            render();
  67          } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); }
  68        };
  69      });
  70    }
  71
  72    document.getElementById('mark-all').onclick = async () => {
  73      try {
  74        await apiMarkAllNotificationsRead();
  75        notifs = notifs.map(n => ({ ...n, is_read: true }));
  76        render();
  77      } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); }
  78    };
  79
  80    apiGetNotifications()
  81      .then(res => { notifs = res.data || res; render(); })
  82      .catch(err => { document.getElementById('notif-list').innerHTML = `<p class="text-danger">${esc(err.message)}</p>`; });
  83  </script>
  84</body>
  85</html>
  86
seeker/profile.html · 182 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Profile — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Profile</h1>
  19
  20        <div class="card mb-4">
  21          <div class="card-body">
  22            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start mb-3 flex-wrap gap-2">
  23              <h3 class="mb-0">Profile Strength</h3>
  24              <span class="badge badge-teal" id="profile-strength">—</span>
  25            </div>
  26
  27            <!-- Avatar + upload section -->
  28            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-4 flex-wrap">
  29              <div id="avatar-wrap" style="position:relative;flex-shrink:0">
  30                <!-- Filled by render() — either an <img> if photo exists, or a colored initials block -->
  31              </div>
  32              <div style="min-width:0;flex:1">
  33                <p class="mb-1 fw-bold" id="profile-name-inline">—</p>
  34                <p class="text-secondary small mb-2" id="profile-headline">—</p>
  35                <input type="file" id="photo-input" accept="image/png,image/jpeg,image/webp" hidden>
  36                <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" id="photo-btn">
  37                  <i class="bi bi-camera"></i> <span id="photo-btn-label">Change Photo</span>
  38                </button>
  39                <p class="text-muted small mt-1 mb-0">JPG, PNG, or WEBP — max 2MB.</p>
  40              </div>
  41            </div>
  42
  43            <hr>
  44
  45            <div class="mb-3">
  46              <label class="form-label text-secondary small mb-1">Name</label>
  47              <p class="mb-0" id="profile-name">—</p>
  48            </div>
  49            <div class="mb-3">
  50              <label class="form-label text-secondary small mb-1">Location</label>
  51              <p class="mb-0" id="profile-location">—</p>
  52            </div>
  53            <div class="mb-3">
  54              <label class="form-label text-secondary small mb-1">Bio</label>
  55              <p class="mb-0" id="profile-bio">—</p>
  56            </div>
  57            <div class="mb-3">
  58              <label class="form-label text-secondary small mb-1">Skills</label>
  59              <p class="mb-0" id="profile-skills">—</p>
  60            </div>
  61
  62            <button class="btn btn-primary" id="edit-btn">Edit Profile</button>
  63          </div>
  64        </div>
  65      </div>
  66    </main>
  67  </div>
  68
  69  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  70  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  71  <script type="module">
  72    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  73    import { getCurrentUser } from '../assets/js/store.js';
  74    import { apiSeekerProfile, apiUpdateSeekerProfile, apiUploadPhoto, storageUrl } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  75    import { openModal } from '../assets/js/ui.modal.js';
  76    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  77    import { esc, companyAvatar } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  78
  79    renderLayout('seeker', 'Profile');
  80
  81    const user = getCurrentUser();
  82    let profile = null;
  83
  84    function render() {
  85      const skills = (profile?.skills || []).map(s => s.skill || s);
  86
  87      document.getElementById('profile-name').textContent     = user?.name || '—';
  88      document.getElementById('profile-name-inline').textContent = user?.name || '—';
  89      document.getElementById('profile-headline').textContent = profile?.headline || 'Add a headline to stand out';
  90      document.getElementById('profile-location').textContent = profile?.location || '—';
  91      document.getElementById('profile-bio').textContent      = profile?.bio || '—';
  92      document.getElementById('profile-skills').textContent   = skills.length ? skills.join(', ') : '—';
  93      document.getElementById('profile-strength').textContent = (profile?.profile_strength || 0) + '%';
  94
  95      // Avatar: real photo if uploaded, otherwise initials block (re-using the company avatar
  96      // helper since the visual is identical — colored circle with initials).
  97      const wrap = document.getElementById('avatar-wrap');
  98      const photoUrl = profile?.profile_photo ? storageUrl(profile.profile_photo) : null;
  99      if (photoUrl) {
 100        wrap.innerHTML = `<img src="${esc(photoUrl)}" alt="Profile photo"
 101          style="width:88px;height:88px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid var(--color-border)">`;
 102      } else {
 103        // Fake-shape a "company" object so companyAvatar renders initials based on user name
 104        wrap.innerHTML = companyAvatar({ name: user?.name || 'You' }, 88).replace(
 105          'border-radius:17.6px',  // companyAvatar computes radius = size/5
 106          'border-radius:50%'      // override to a circle for human profile photos
 107        );
 108      }
 109
 110      // If a previous upload finished, update the topbar greeting/avatar too (next page load picks up DB)
 111    }
 112
 113    /* --- Photo upload --- */
 114    document.getElementById('photo-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
 115      document.getElementById('photo-input').click();
 116    });
 117
 118    document.getElementById('photo-input').addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
 119      const file = e.target.files[0];
 120      if (!file) return;
 121
 122      // Client-side guard: 2MB cap matches the backend validator
 123      if (file.size > 2 * 1024 * 1024) {
 124        toastError('Photo must be 2MB or smaller.');
 125        e.target.value = '';
 126        return;
 127      }
 128
 129      const btn = document.getElementById('photo-btn');
 130      const label = document.getElementById('photo-btn-label');
 131      btn.disabled = true;
 132      label.textContent = 'Uploading…';
 133
 134      try {
 135        const res = await apiUploadPhoto(file);
 136        // Update local profile state and re-render — no page reload needed
 137        if (profile) profile.profile_photo = res.profile_photo;
 138        else profile = { profile_photo: res.profile_photo };
 139        render();
 140        toastSuccess('Photo updated');
 141      } catch (err) {
 142        toastError(err.message);
 143      } finally {
 144        btn.disabled = false;
 145        label.textContent = 'Change Photo';
 146        e.target.value = '';  // allows re-selecting the same file later
 147      }
 148    });
 149
 150    /* --- Edit profile (existing flow) --- */
 151    document.getElementById('edit-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
 152      const skills = (profile?.skills || []).map(s => s.skill || s).join(', ');
 153      openModal({
 154        title: 'Edit Profile',
 155        body: `<div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Headline</label><input type="text" id="edit-headline" class="form-input" value="${esc(profile?.headline || '')}"></div>
 156               <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Location</label><input type="text" id="edit-location" class="form-input" value="${esc(profile?.location || '')}"></div>
 157               <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Bio</label><textarea id="edit-bio" class="form-input" rows="3">${esc(profile?.bio || '')}</textarea></div>
 158               <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Skills (comma-separated)</label><input type="text" id="edit-skills" class="form-input" value="${esc(skills)}"></div>`,
 159        footer: '<button class="btn btn-secondary" id="modal-cancel">Cancel</button> <button class="btn btn-primary" id="save-profile">Save</button>',
 160      });
 161      document.getElementById('modal-cancel')?.addEventListener('click', () => document.querySelector('.wb-modal-backdrop')?.remove());
 162      document.getElementById('save-profile').onclick = async () => {
 163        const skillArr = document.getElementById('edit-skills').value.split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
 164        try {
 165          profile = await apiUpdateSeekerProfile({
 166            headline: document.getElementById('edit-headline').value,
 167            location: document.getElementById('edit-location').value,
 168            bio: document.getElementById('edit-bio').value,
 169            skills: skillArr,
 170          });
 171          toastSuccess('Profile updated');
 172          document.querySelector('.wb-modal-backdrop')?.remove();
 173          render();
 174        } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); }
 175      };
 176    });
 177
 178    apiSeekerProfile().then(p => { profile = p; render(); }).catch(() => render());
 179  </script>
 180</body>
 181</html>
 182
seeker/resume.html · 114 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Resume — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Resume</h1>
  19        <div class="card mb-4">
  20          <div class="card-body">
  21            <h3 class="mb-3">Upload Resume</h3>
  22            <input type="file" id="resume-file" accept=".pdf,.doc,.docx" class="form-input mb-2">
  23            <button id="upload-btn" class="btn btn-primary">Upload</button>
  24          </div>
  25        </div>
  26        <h3 class="mb-3">My Resumes</h3>
  27        <div id="resume-list"></div>
  28      </div>
  29    </main>
  30  </div>
  31
  32  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  33  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  34  <script type="module">
  35    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  36    import { apiSeekerProfile, apiUploadResume, apiDeleteResume, apiDownloadResume } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  37    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  38    import { esc, emptyState } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  39
  40    renderLayout('seeker', 'Resume');
  41
  42    let resumes = [];
  43
  44    function render() {
  45      const list = document.getElementById('resume-list');
  46      if (!resumes.length) {
  47        list.innerHTML = emptyState({
  48          icon: 'file-earmark-pdf',
  49          title: 'No resumes uploaded yet',
  50          subtitle: 'Upload your resume above so employers can review your applications.',
  51        });
  52        return;
  53      }
  54      list.innerHTML = resumes.map(r => `
  55        <div class="card mb-2">
  56          <div class="card-body d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 justify-content-between align-items-center">
  57            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2" style="min-width:0;flex:1 1 auto">
  58              <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf text-danger flex-shrink-0"></i>
  59              <span class="text-truncate" title="${esc(r.original_name || r.name)}">${esc(r.original_name || r.name)}</span>
  60              ${r.is_primary ? '<span class="badge badge-teal flex-shrink-0">Primary</span>' : ''}
  61            </div>
  62            <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-shrink-0">
  63              <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm download-resume" data-id="${esc(String(r.id))}" data-name="${esc(r.original_name || 'resume')}">
  64                <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download
  65              </button>
  66              <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm text-danger remove-resume" data-id="${esc(String(r.id))}">Remove</button>
  67            </div>
  68          </div>
  69        </div>`).join('');
  70
  71      list.querySelectorAll('.download-resume').forEach(b => {
  72        b.onclick = async () => {
  73          b.disabled = true;
  74          try {
  75            await apiDownloadResume(b.dataset.id, b.dataset.name);
  76          } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); }
  77          finally { b.disabled = false; }
  78        };
  79      });
  80
  81      list.querySelectorAll('.remove-resume').forEach(b => {
  82        b.onclick = async () => {
  83          b.disabled = true;
  84          try {
  85            await apiDeleteResume(b.dataset.id);
  86            toastSuccess('Resume removed');
  87            resumes = resumes.filter(r => String(r.id) !== b.dataset.id);
  88            render();
  89          } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); b.disabled = false; }
  90        };
  91      });
  92    }
  93
  94    document.getElementById('upload-btn').onclick = async () => {
  95      const input = document.getElementById('resume-file');
  96      const file = input.files[0];
  97      if (!file) { toastError('Select a file first'); return; }
  98      const btn = document.getElementById('upload-btn');
  99      btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Uploading…';
 100      try {
 101        const r = await apiUploadResume(file);
 102        resumes.push(r);
 103        toastSuccess('Resume uploaded');
 104        input.value = '';
 105        render();
 106      } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); }
 107      finally { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Upload'; }
 108    };
 109
 110    apiSeekerProfile().then(p => { resumes = p.resumes || []; render(); });
 111  </script>
 112</body>
 113</html>
 114
seeker/saved-jobs.html · 96 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Saved Jobs — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/public.css">
  13  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  14</head>
  15<body class="wb-loading">
  16  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  17    <main class="app-main">
  18      <div class="app-content">
  19        <h1 class="mb-4">Saved Jobs</h1>
  20        <div id="saved-list" class="jobs-grid"></div>
  21      </div>
  22    </main>
  23  </div>
  24
  25  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  26  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  27  <script type="module">
  28    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  29    import { apiSavedJobs, apiUnsaveJob } from '../assets/js/api.js';
  30    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  31    import { esc, formatSalaryRange, companyAvatar, verifiedBadge, emptyState } from '../assets/js/utils.js';
  32
  33    renderLayout('seeker', 'Saved Jobs');
  34
  35    const list = document.getElementById('saved-list');
  36    list.innerHTML = '<p class="text-secondary">Loading…</p>';
  37
  38    async function render() {
  39      try {
  40        const res = await apiSavedJobs();
  41        const saved = res.data || res;
  42        if (!saved.length) {
  43          // Override the .jobs-grid display so the empty state takes the full width.
  44          // Otherwise it gets cramped into a single grid column.
  45          list.style.display = 'block';
  46          list.innerHTML = emptyState({
  47            icon: 'bookmark',
  48            title: 'No saved jobs yet',
  49            subtitle: 'Save jobs you\'re interested in and find them here later.',
  50            actionLabel: 'Browse jobs',
  51            actionHref: '../jobs.html',
  52          });
  53          return;
  54        }
  55        // Restore grid display when we have saved jobs to show
  56        list.style.display = '';
  57        list.innerHTML = saved.map(s => {
  58          const j = s.job_listing;
  59          if (!j) return '';
  60          return `
  61            <div class="card card-lift">
  62              <div class="card-body">
  63                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between gap-2 mb-2">
  64                  <div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-start" style="min-width:0;flex:1">
  65                    ${companyAvatar(j.company, 40)}
  66                    <div style="min-width:0">
  67                      <a href="../job-detail.html?id=${esc(j.id)}" class="text-dark text-decoration-none"><h4 class="card-title mb-0">${esc(j.title)}</h4></a>
  68                      <p class="text-secondary small mb-0">${esc(j.company?.name || 'Company')}${verifiedBadge(j.company)}</p>
  69                    </div>
  70                  </div>
  71                  <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm remove-saved flex-shrink-0" data-id="${esc(j.id)}"><i class="bi bi-bookmark-fill text-warning"></i></button>
  72                </div>
  73                <p class="text-primary fw-bold">${formatSalaryRange(j.salary_min, j.salary_max)}</p>
  74                <a href="../job-detail.html?id=${esc(j.id)}" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">View & Apply</a>
  75              </div>
  76            </div>`;
  77        }).filter(Boolean).join('');
  78
  79        list.querySelectorAll('.remove-saved').forEach(btn => {
  80          btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
  81            try {
  82              await apiUnsaveJob(btn.dataset.id);
  83              toastSuccess('Removed from saved');
  84              render();
  85            } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); }
  86          });
  87        });
  88      } catch (err) {
  89        list.innerHTML = `<p class="text-danger">${esc(err.message)}</p>`;
  90      }
  91    }
  92    render();
  93  </script>
  94</body>
  95</html>
  96
seeker/settings.html · 84 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Settings — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css" rel="stylesheet">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/tokens.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/base.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/components.css">
  12  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/css/seeker.css">
  13</head>
  14<body class="wb-loading">
  15  <div id="app-layout" class="app-layout">
  16    <main class="app-main">
  17      <div class="app-content">
  18        <h1 class="mb-4">Settings</h1>
  19        <div class="card mb-4">
  20          <div class="card-body">
  21            <h3 class="mb-3">Dark Mode</h3>
  22            <div class="form-check form-switch">
  23              <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="dark-mode">
  24              <label class="form-check-label" for="dark-mode">Enable dark mode</label>
  25            </div>
  26          </div>
  27        </div>
  28        <div class="card mb-4">
  29          <div class="card-body">
  30            <h3 class="mb-3">Change Password</h3>
  31            <div class="form-group mb-2">
  32              <label class="form-label">Current password</label>
  33              <input type="password" class="form-input" id="curr-pw">
  34            </div>
  35            <div class="form-group mb-2">
  36              <label class="form-label">New password</label>
  37              <input type="password" class="form-input" id="new-pw">
  38            </div>
  39            <button id="change-pw" class="btn btn-primary">Change password</button>
  40          </div>
  41        </div>
  42      </div>
  43    </main>
  44  </div>
  45
  46  <div id="toast-container" class="toast-container"></div>
  47  <script type="module" src="../assets/js/app.js"></script>
  48  <script type="module">
  49    import { renderLayout } from '../assets/js/layout.js';
  50    import { getTheme } from '../assets/js/store.js';
  51    import { toggleDarkMode } from '../assets/js/app.js';
  52    import { apiChangePassword } from '../assets/js/api.js';
