  53    import { toastSuccess, toastError } from '../assets/js/ui.toast.js';
  54
  55    renderLayout('seeker', 'Settings');
  56
  57    const dm = document.getElementById('dark-mode');
  58    dm.checked = getTheme() === 'dark';
  59    dm.onchange = () => {
  60      toggleDarkMode();
  61      dm.checked = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark';
  62    };
  63
  64    document.getElementById('change-pw').onclick = async () => {
  65      const curr = document.getElementById('curr-pw').value.trim();
  66      const newPw = document.getElementById('new-pw').value.trim();
  67      if (!curr) { toastError('Enter your current password'); return; }
  68      if (!newPw) { toastError('Enter a new password'); return; }
  69      if (newPw.length < 6) { toastError('New password must be at least 6 characters'); return; }
  70      if (curr === newPw) { toastError('New password must be different from current'); return; }
  71      const btn = document.getElementById('change-pw');
  72      btn.disabled = true;
  73      try {
  74        await apiChangePassword(curr, newPw);
  75        document.getElementById('curr-pw').value = '';
  76        document.getElementById('new-pw').value = '';
  77        toastSuccess('Password updated successfully');
  78      } catch (err) { toastError(err.message); }
  79      finally { btn.disabled = false; }
  80    };
  81  </script>
  82</body>
  83</html>
  84

terms.html · 35 lines
   1<!DOCTYPE html>
   2<html lang="en">
   3<head>
   4  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   5  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   6  <title>Terms — WorkBridge PH</title>
   7  <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
   8  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/tokens.css">
   9  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/base.css">
  10  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/components.css">
  11  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/css/public.css">
  12</head>
  13<body>
  14  <header class="public-nav">
  15    <div class="public-nav-inner">
  16      <a href="index.html" class="public-nav-brand">WorkBridge PH</a>
  17      <ul class="public-nav-links">
  18        <li><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
  19        <li><a href="auth/login.html" class="btn btn-primary">Log in</a></li>
  20      </ul>
  21    </div>
  22  </header>
  23
  24  <main class="container page-transition py-5">
  25    <div class="card">
  26      <div class="card-body p-5">
  27        <h1>Terms of Service</h1>
  28        <p>By using WorkBridge PH, you agree to these terms. You must provide accurate information and use the platform responsibly. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate our policies.</p>
  29      </div>
  30    </div>
  31  </main>
  32  <script type="module" src="assets/js/app.js"></script>
  33</body>
  34</html>

tests/regression.spec.js · 129 lines
   1// @ts-check
   2/**
   3 * Regression tests for Bugs #1, #2, #3 fixed in May 2026.
   4 *
   5 * Preconditions:
   6 *   1. Laravel API running at http://localhost:8000   (php artisan serve)
   7 *   2. Database seeded                                 (php artisan migrate:fresh --seed)
   8 *   3. Static server on port 3333                      (started automatically by playwright.config.cjs)
   9 *
  10 * Notes on robustness:
  11 *   - Tests run sequentially (workers=1 in playwright.config.cjs) to avoid
  12 *     the auth.login rate limiter (5/min per email+IP) tripping when multiple
  13 *     workers hit the API at once.
  14 *   - We avoid waitUntil: 'networkidle' because some pages (notifications,
  15 *     layout) make background calls that prevent the network from settling.
  16 *     Instead, we wait for specific visible elements, which is deterministic.
  17 */
  18const { test, expect } = require('@playwright/test');
  19
  20/**
  21 * Log in via the form and wait for the role dashboard URL.
  22 * @param {import('@playwright/test').Page} page
  23 * @param {string} email
  24 * @param {string} password
  25 * @param {RegExp} dashboardRegex
  26 */
  27async function login(page, email, password, dashboardRegex) {
  28  await page.goto('/auth/login.html', { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' });
  29  await page.fill('input[name="email"]', email);
  30  await page.fill('input[name="password"]', password);
  31
  32  // Wait for the login API response and the redirect concurrently.
  33  const [response] = await Promise.all([
  34    page.waitForResponse(
  35      /** @param {import('@playwright/test').Response} r */
  36      r => r.url().includes('/api/auth/login') && r.request().method() === 'POST',
  37      { timeout: 15000 }
  38    ),
  39    page.click('button[type="submit"]'),
  40  ]);
  41  expect(response.status(), `Login failed for ${email}: ${response.status()}`).toBe(200);
  42  await page.waitForURL(dashboardRegex, { timeout: 15000 });
  43}
  44
  45test('Bug #1 — employer can update application status without 500', async ({ page }) => {
  46  await login(page, 'hr@technova.ph', 'password', /\/employer\/dashboard/);
  47
  48  // Seeded application id 1 = Juan's application to TechNova's first job
  49  await page.goto('/employer/applicant-detail.html?id=1', { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' });
  50  await expect(page.locator('#app-status')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15000 });
  51
  52  const [response] = await Promise.all([
  53    page.waitForResponse(
  54      /** @param {import('@playwright/test').Response} r */
  55      r => r.url().includes('/api/applications/1/status') && r.request().method() === 'PATCH',
  56      { timeout: 15000 }
  57    ),
  58    page.locator('.status-btn[data-s="Interview"]').click(),
  59  ]);
  60
  61  // The bug returned 500 because wb_notifications was missing columns
  62  expect(response.status()).toBe(200);
  63  await expect(page.locator('#app-status')).toHaveText('Interview');
  64});
  65
  66test('Bug #3 — sidebar Dashboard link is path-aware on root-level pages', async ({ page }) => {
  67  await login(page, 'juan@example.com', 'password', /\/seeker\/dashboard/);
  68
  69  // Sanity check: when inside /seeker/, sidebar logo href is plain "dashboard.html".
  70  await page.goto('/seeker/dashboard.html', { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' });
  71  await expect(page.locator('.sidebar-logo a')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15000 });
  72  expect(await page.locator('.sidebar-logo a').getAttribute('href')).toBe('dashboard.html');
  73
  74  // The actual bug: from a root-level page (job-detail.html), the layout must
  75  // prefix the path with the role folder so it doesn't resolve to /workbridge/dashboard.html.
  76  await page.goto('/job-detail.html?id=1', { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' });
  77  await expect(page.locator('.sidebar-logo a')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15000 });
  78  expect(await page.locator('.sidebar-logo a').getAttribute('href')).toBe('seeker/dashboard.html');
  79
  80  // Spot-check a nav item too — the same prefix logic applies to the whole sidebar.
  81  const jobsHref = await page.locator('.sidebar-nav a').filter({ hasText: 'Jobs' }).first().getAttribute('href');
  82  expect(jobsHref).toBe('seeker/jobs.html');
  83});
  84
  85test('Apply flow — seeker can submit application and button shows Applied', async ({ page }) => {
  86  await login(page, 'juan@example.com', 'password', /\/seeker\/dashboard/);
  87
  88  // Job id 2 (IT Support Specialist) — not in Juan's seeded applications.
  89  await page.goto('/job-detail.html?id=2', { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' });
  90  await expect(page.locator('#job-main h1')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15000 });
  91
  92  const applyBtn = page.locator('#btn-apply');
  93  await expect(applyBtn).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15000 });
  94
  95  // Idempotent: if a previous run already applied (no migrate:fresh between runs),
  96  // verify the disabled "Applied" state and exit. Either path proves the bug is fixed.
  97  const label = (await applyBtn.textContent())?.trim();
  98  if (label === 'Applied') {
  99    await expect(applyBtn).toBeDisabled();
 100    return;
 101  }
 102
 103  await applyBtn.click();
 104
 105  // Modal uses CSS animations (opacity 0→1, scale 0.95→1) and is appended
 106  // outside the main layout flow. Playwright's actionability checks misjudge
 107  // its position. Wait for DOM attachment, then dispatch the click via the
 108  // page's own JS — this fires the real click handler bound by openModal()
 109  // without depending on any visibility/scroll heuristics.
 110  const confirmBtn = page.locator('#modal-confirm');
 111  await confirmBtn.waitFor({ state: 'attached', timeout: 5000 });
 112
 113  const [response] = await Promise.all([
 114    page.waitForResponse(
 115      /** @param {import('@playwright/test').Response} r */
 116      r => r.url().includes('/api/jobs/2/apply') && r.request().method() === 'POST',
 117      { timeout: 15000 }
 118    ),
 119    page.evaluate(() => {
 120      const btn = /** @type {HTMLButtonElement | null} */ (document.getElementById('modal-confirm'));
 121      btn?.click();
 122    }),
 123  ]);
 124  expect([200, 201]).toContain(response.status());
 125
 126  await expect(page.locator('#btn-apply')).toHaveText(/Applied/, { timeout: 5000 });
 127  await expect(page.locator('#btn-apply')).toBeDisabled();
 128});
 129
tests/router.spec.js · 11 lines
   1const { test, expect } = require('@playwright/test');
   2
   3test('Router: fresh context visit seeker dashboard when logged out', async ({ browser }) => {
   4  const baseURL = test.info().project.use.baseURL;
   5  const ctx = await browser.newContext({ baseURL });
   6  const page = await ctx.newPage();
   7  await page.goto('/seeker/dashboard.html', { waitUntil: 'networkidle' });
   8  expect(page.url().includes('login')).toBe(true);
   9  await ctx.close();
  10});
  11
tests/workbridge.spec.js · 39 lines
   1// @ts-check
   2const { test, expect } = require('@playwright/test');
   3
   4test('Landing pages load', async ({ page }) => {
   5  const errors = [];
   6  page.on('console', msg => {
   7    if (msg.type() === 'error') errors.push(msg.text());
   8  });
   9  await page.route('**/favicon.ico', (route) =>
  10    route.fulfill({ status: 204, body: '', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'image/x-icon' } })
  11  );
  12  // Relative URLs use `use.baseURL` from playwright.config.cjs. Use /index.html so `serve` does not list the directory for `/`.
  13  const nav = { waitUntil: 'load' };
  14  await page.goto('/index.html', nav);
  15  await expect(page).toHaveTitle(/WorkBridge/);
  16  await page.goto('/jobs.html', nav);
  17  await page.goto('/companies.html', nav);
  18  await page.goto('/job-detail.html#id=1', nav);
  19  await page.goto('/company-detail.html#id=1', nav);
  20  if (errors.length) console.log('Console errors:', errors);
  21  expect(errors).toHaveLength(0);
  22});
  23
  24test('Login seeker redirects to seeker dashboard', async ({ page }) => {
  25  await page.goto('/auth/login.html', { waitUntil: 'networkidle' });
  26  await page.fill('input[name="email"]', 'juan@example.com');
  27  await page.fill('input[name="password"]', 'password');
  28  await page.click('button[type="submit"]');
  29  await page.waitForURL(/\/seeker\/dashboard(\.html)?(\?|$)/, { timeout: 15000 });
  30});
  31
  32test('Router: logged out access to seeker dashboard', async ({ page }) => {
  33  await page.goto('/', { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' });
  34  await page.context().clearCookies();
  35  await page.evaluate(() => localStorage.clear());
  36  await page.goto('/seeker/dashboard.html', { waitUntil: 'networkidle' });
  37  expect(page.url().includes('login')).toBe(true);
  38});
  39
